authors_text: Adam K. Kiss,Tamas G. Molnar,Aaron D. Ames,Gabor Orosz
title: Control Barrier Functionals: Safety-critical Control for Time Delay Systems
title_zh: 控制屏障功能：时滞系统的安全关键控制
comment: Submitted to the International Journal of Robust and Nonlinear Control (JRNC). 25 pages, 3 figures
comments: Submitted to the International Journal of Robust and Nonlinear Control (JRNC). 25 pages, 3 figures
abstract: This work presents a theoretical framework for the safety-critical control of time delay systems. The theory of control barrier functions, that provides formal safety guarantees for delay-free systems, is extended to systems with state delay. The notion of control barrier functionals is introduced to attain formal safety guarantees, by enforcing the forward invariance of safe sets defined in the infinite dimensional state space. The proposed framework is able to handle multiple delays and distributed delays both in the dynamics and in the safety condition, and provides an affine constraint on the control input that yields provable safety. This constraint can be incorporated into optimization problems to synthesize pointwise optimal and provable safe controllers. The applicability of the proposed method is demonstrated by numerical simulation examples.
summary: This work presents a theoretical framework for the safety-critical control of time delay systems. The theory of control barrier functions, that provides formal safety guarantees for delay-free systems, is extended to systems with state delay. The notion of control barrier functionals is introduced to attain formal safety guarantees, by enforcing the forward invariance of safe sets defined in the infinite dimensional state space. The proposed framework is able to handle multiple delays and distributed delays both in the dynamics and in the safety condition, and provides an affine constraint on the control input that yields provable safety. This constraint can be incorporated into optimization problems to synthesize pointwise optimal and provable safe controllers. The applicability of the proposed method is demonstrated by numerical simulation examples.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了时滞系统的安全关键控制的理论框架。控制屏障函数理论为无延迟系统提供形式安全保证，并扩展到有状态延迟的系统。引入控制屏障泛函的概念，通过强制无限维状态空间中定义的安全集的前向不变性来获得形式安全保证。所提出的框架能够处理动态和安全条件下的多重延迟和分布式延迟，并对控制输入提供仿射约束，从而产生可证明的安全性。该约束可以合并到优化问题中，以合成逐点最优且可证明安全的控制器。通过数值模拟算例证明了该方法的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对时滞系统的安全关键控制理论框架，通过引入控制屏障泛函确保无限维状态空间中安全集的向前不变性。
AI.motivation: 现有控制屏障函数理论仅适用于无延迟系统，而实际工程系统中普遍存在状态延迟，需扩展理论以处理时滞带来的安全控制难题。
AI.method: 提出控制屏障泛函概念，通过仿射约束限制控制输入，并将其嵌入优化问题中，实现多延迟和分布延迟系统的安全控制器合成。
AI.result: 数值仿真验证了该方法在处理多种延迟场景下的有效性，证明了控制器的可证明安全性与优化性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为时滞系统的安全控制提供了理论保障，可推广至复杂动态系统与安全约束场景的工程应用中。

authors_text: Qing Meng,Tharun Suresh,Roy Ka-Wei Lee,Tanmoy Chakraborty
title: Predicting Hate Intensity of Twitter Conversation Threads
title_zh: 预测 Twitter 对话线程的仇恨强度
comment: Accepted in Knowledge-Based Systems, 30 pages (main content) + 9 pages (Refs.), 11 figures, 3 tables
comments: Accepted in Knowledge-Based Systems, 30 pages (main content) + 9 pages (Refs.), 11 figures, 3 tables
abstract: Tweets are the most concise form of communication in online social media, wherein a single tweet has the potential to make or break the discourse of the conversation. Online hate speech is more accessible than ever, and stifling its propagation is of utmost importance for social media companies and users for congenial communication. Most of the research barring a recent few has focused on classifying an individual tweet regardless of the tweet thread/context leading up to that point. One of the classical approaches to curb hate speech is to adopt a reactive strategy after the hate speech postage. The ex-post facto strategy results in neglecting subtle posts that do not show the potential to instigate hate speech on their own but may portend in the subsequent discussion ensuing in the post's replies. In this paper, we propose DRAGNET++, which aims to predict the intensity of hatred that a tweet can bring in through its reply chain in the future. It uses the semantic and propagating structure of the tweet threads to maximize the contextual information leading up to and the fall of hate intensity at each subsequent tweet. We explore three publicly available Twitter datasets -- Anti-Racism contains the reply tweets of a collection of social media discourse on racist remarks during US political and Covid-19 background; Anti-Social presents a dataset of 40 million tweets amidst the COVID-19 pandemic on anti-social behaviours; and Anti-Asian presents Twitter datasets collated based on anti-Asian behaviours during COVID-19 pandemic. All the curated datasets consist of structural graph information of the Tweet threads. We show that DRAGNET++ outperforms all the state-of-the-art baselines significantly. It beats the best baseline by an 11% margin on the Person correlation coefficient and a decrease of 25% on RMSE for the Anti-Racism dataset with a similar performance on the other two datasets.
summary: Tweets are the most concise form of communication in online social media, wherein a single tweet has the potential to make or break the discourse of the conversation. Online hate speech is more accessible than ever, and stifling its propagation is of utmost importance for social media companies and users for congenial communication. Most of the research barring a recent few has focused on classifying an individual tweet regardless of the tweet thread/context leading up to that point. One of the classical approaches to curb hate speech is to adopt a reactive strategy after the hate speech postage. The ex-post facto strategy results in neglecting subtle posts that do not show the potential to instigate hate speech on their own but may portend in the subsequent discussion ensuing in the post's replies. In this paper, we propose DRAGNET++, which aims to predict the intensity of hatred that a tweet can bring in through its reply chain in the future. It uses the semantic and propagating structure of the tweet threads to maximize the contextual information leading up to and the fall of hate intensity at each subsequent tweet. We explore three publicly available Twitter datasets -- Anti-Racism contains the reply tweets of a collection of social media discourse on racist remarks during US political and Covid-19 background; Anti-Social presents a dataset of 40 million tweets amidst the COVID-19 pandemic on anti-social behaviours; and Anti-Asian presents Twitter datasets collated based on anti-Asian behaviours during COVID-19 pandemic. All the curated datasets consist of structural graph information of the Tweet threads. We show that DRAGNET++ outperforms all the state-of-the-art baselines significantly. It beats the best baseline by an 11% margin on the Person correlation coefficient and a decrease of 25% on RMSE for the Anti-Racism dataset with a similar performance on the other two datasets.
abstract_zh: 推文是在线社交媒体中最简洁的交流形式，其中一条推文就有可能决定或打破对话的话语。在线仇恨言论比以往任何时候都更容易获得，而抑制其传播对于社交媒体公司和用户进行友好的交流至关重要。除了最近的一些研究之外，大多数研究都集中在对单个推文进行分类，而不管导致该点的推文线程/上下文如何。遏制仇恨言论的经典方法之一是在仇恨言论邮寄后采取反应策略。事后策略会导致忽略一些微妙的帖子，这些帖子本身并没有表现出煽动仇恨言论的潜力，但可能预示着帖子回复中随后的讨论。在本文中，我们提出了 DRAGNET++，其目的是预测一条推文未来通过其回复链可能带来的仇恨强度。它使用推文线程的语义和传播结构来最大化导致每条后续推文的上下文信息以及仇恨强度的下降。我们探索了三个公开的 Twitter 数据集——Anti-Racism 包含美国政治和 Covid-19 背景下有关种族主义言论的社交媒体言论集合的回复推文； Anti-Social 提供了 COVID-19 大流行期间有关反社会行为的 4000 万条推文的数据集； Anti-Asian 提供了根据 COVID-19 大流行期间的反亚洲行为整理的 Twitter 数据集。所有整理的数据集都包含推文线程的结构图信息。我们证明 DRAGNET++ 的性能显着优于所有最先进的基线。它在反种族主义数据集的人相关系数上比最佳基线高出 11%，在 RMSE 上下降了 25%，而在其他两个数据集上的表现相似。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DRAGNET++方法，用于预测Twitter对话线中未来回复链可能产生的仇恨强度，突破传统单条推文分类的局限。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注单条推文分类而忽略上下文，导致无法及时发现潜在仇恨传播。需通过分析对话线结构和语义信息预测仇恨强度演变。
AI.method: 构建DRAGNET++模型，结合语义分析与传播结构，利用推文线的图结构信息建模上下文关联，预测后续回复中的仇恨强度变化。
AI.result: 在Anti-Racism等三个数据集上，DRAGNET++相较最佳基线提升Person相关系数11%，RMSE降低25%，其他数据集表现相近。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合语义与传播结构信息，DRAGNET++显著提升仇恨强度预测性能，为遏制仇恨言论传播提供新思路。

authors_text: Sofia Broomé,Marcelo Feighelstein,Anna Zamansky,Gabriel Carreira Lencioni,Pia Haubro Andersen,Francisca Pessanha,Marwa Mahmoud,Hedvig Kjellström,Albert Ali Salah
title: Going Deeper than Tracking: a Survey of Computer-Vision Based Recognition of Animal Pain and Affective States
title_zh: 比追踪更深入：基于计算机视觉的动物疼痛和情感状态识别调查
abstract: Advances in animal motion tracking and pose recognition have been a game changer in the study of animal behavior. Recently, an increasing number of works go 'deeper' than tracking, and address automated recognition of animals' internal states such as emotions and pain with the aim of improving animal welfare, making this a timely moment for a systematization of the field. This paper provides a comprehensive survey of computer vision-based research on recognition of affective states and pain in animals, addressing both facial and bodily behavior analysis. We summarize the efforts that have been presented so far within this topic -- classifying them across different dimensions, highlight challenges and research gaps, and provide best practice recommendations for advancing the field, and some future directions for research.
summary: Advances in animal motion tracking and pose recognition have been a game changer in the study of animal behavior. Recently, an increasing number of works go 'deeper' than tracking, and address automated recognition of animals' internal states such as emotions and pain with the aim of improving animal welfare, making this a timely moment for a systematization of the field. This paper provides a comprehensive survey of computer vision-based research on recognition of affective states and pain in animals, addressing both facial and bodily behavior analysis. We summarize the efforts that have been presented so far within this topic -- classifying them across different dimensions, highlight challenges and research gaps, and provide best practice recommendations for advancing the field, and some future directions for research.
abstract_zh: 动物运动跟踪和姿势识别的进步已经改变了动物行为研究的游戏规则。最近，越来越多的工作比跟踪更“深入”，并解决动物内部状态（例如情绪和疼痛）的自动识别，目的是改善动物福利，这使得该领域的系统化恰逢其时。本文对基于计算机视觉的动物情感状态和疼痛识别研究进行了全面调查，涉及面部和身体行为分析。我们总结了迄今为止在该主题中所做的努力——对它们进行不同维度的分类，突出挑战和研究差距，并提供推进该领域的最佳实践建议，以及一些未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本论文系统综述了基于计算机视觉的动物疼痛及情感状态识别研究，涵盖面部与身体行为分析。
AI.motivation: 动物行为研究因运动跟踪技术进步而发展，但需进一步识别其内部状态（如疼痛、情绪）以提升福利，亟需领域系统化总结。
AI.method: 通过文献分类整理，从多维度总结现有研究方法，分析技术挑战与研究空白，并提出实践建议与未来方向。
AI.result: 归纳了当前动物情感与疼痛识别的技术路线，明确数据获取、模型泛化等核心难题，提出跨学科协作与标准化数据集构建等建议。
AI.conclusion: 系统化梳理推动领域发展，未来需结合多模态数据与跨物种研究，以实现更精准的动物福利评估技术。

search_text: Going Deeper than Tracking: a Survey of Computer-Vision Based Recognition of Animal Pain and Affective States 比追踪更深入：基于计算机视觉的动物疼痛和情感状态识别调查 Advances in animal motion tracking and pose recognition have been a game changer in the study of animal behavior. Recently, an increasing number of works go 'deeper' than tracking, and address automated recognition of animals' internal states such as emotions and pain with the aim of improving animal welfare, making this a timely moment for a systematization of the field. This paper provides a comprehensive survey of computer vision-based research on recognition of affective states and pain in animals, addressing both facial and bodily behavior analysis. We summarize the efforts that have been presented so far within this topic -- classifying them across different dimensions, highlight challenges and research gaps, and provide best practice recommendations for advancing the field, and some future directions for research. 动物运动跟踪和姿势识别的进步已经改变了动物行为研究的游戏规则。最近，越来越多的工作比跟踪更“深入”，并解决动物内部状态（例如情绪和疼痛）的自动识别，目的是改善动物福利，这使得该领域的系统化恰逢其时。本文对基于计算机视觉的动物情感状态和疼痛识别研究进行了全面调查，涉及面部和身体行为分析。我们总结了迄今为止在该主题中所做的努力——对它们进行不同维度的分类，突出挑战和研究差距，并提供推进该领域的最佳实践建议，以及一些未来的研究方向。 本论文系统综述了基于计算机视觉的动物疼痛及情感状态识别研究，涵盖面部与身体行为分析。 Sofia Broomé,Marcelo Feighelstein,Anna Zamansky,Gabriel Carreira Lencioni,Pia Haubro Andersen,Francisca Pessanha,Marwa Mahmoud,Hedvig Kjellström,Albert Ali Salah cs.CV

authors_text: Arjun Roy,Eirini Ntoutsi
title: Learning to Teach Fairness-aware Deep Multi-task Learning
title_zh: 学习教授公平意识深度多任务学习
comment: Accepted to be published in the Proceedings of the "European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECMLPKDD)", Sept. 19th to 23rd 2022
comments: Accepted to be published in the Proceedings of the "European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECMLPKDD)", Sept. 19th to 23rd 2022
abstract: Fairness-aware learning mainly focuses on single task learning (STL). The fairness implications of multi-task learning (MTL) have only recently been considered and a seminal approach has been proposed that considers the fairness-accuracy trade-off for each task and the performance trade-off among different tasks. Instead of a rigid fairness-accuracy trade-off formulation, we propose a flexible approach that learns how to be fair in a MTL setting by selecting which objective (accuracy or fairness) to optimize at each step. We introduce the L2T-FMT algorithm that is a teacher-student network trained collaboratively; the student learns to solve the fair MTL problem while the teacher instructs the student to learn from either accuracy or fairness, depending on what is harder to learn for each task. Moreover, this dynamic selection of which objective to use at each step for each task reduces the number of trade-off weights from 2T to T, where T is the number of tasks. Our experiments on three real datasets show that L2T-FMT improves on both fairness (12-19%) and accuracy (up to 2%) over state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Fairness-aware learning mainly focuses on single task learning (STL). The fairness implications of multi-task learning (MTL) have only recently been considered and a seminal approach has been proposed that considers the fairness-accuracy trade-off for each task and the performance trade-off among different tasks. Instead of a rigid fairness-accuracy trade-off formulation, we propose a flexible approach that learns how to be fair in a MTL setting by selecting which objective (accuracy or fairness) to optimize at each step. We introduce the L2T-FMT algorithm that is a teacher-student network trained collaboratively; the student learns to solve the fair MTL problem while the teacher instructs the student to learn from either accuracy or fairness, depending on what is harder to learn for each task. Moreover, this dynamic selection of which objective to use at each step for each task reduces the number of trade-off weights from 2T to T, where T is the number of tasks. Our experiments on three real datasets show that L2T-FMT improves on both fairness (12-19%) and accuracy (up to 2%) over state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 公平意识学习主要集中在单任务学习（STL）。多任务学习（MTL）的公平性影响最近才被考虑，并且提出了一种开创性的方法，该方法考虑每个任务的公平性与准确性的权衡以及不同任务之间的性能权衡。我们提出了一种灵活的方法，而不是严格的公平性-准确性权衡公式，通过选择每一步要优化的目标（准确性或公平性）来学习如何在 MTL 设置中做到公平。我们介绍了L2T-FMT算法，这是一个师生协同训练的网络；学生学习解决公平的 MTL 问题，而教师指导学生从准确性或公平性中学习，具体取决于每项任务的难学程度。此外，动态选择每个任务的每个步骤使用哪个目标将权衡权重的数量从 2T 减少到 T，其中 T 是任务数量。我们对三个真实数据集的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，L2T-FMT 在公平性 (12-19%) 和准确性 (高达 2%) 方面都有所提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态选择优化目标的公平感知多任务学习方法L2T-FMT，通过教师-学生网络框架提升模型公平性与准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有公平学习方法局限于单任务场景，且多任务学习中公平性与准确性的权衡策略过于僵化，难以适应不同任务的动态需求。
AI.method: 设计L2T-FMT算法，采用教师-学生网络协作机制，教师根据任务难度动态选择优化目标（准确性或公平性），学生据此学习，将权衡参数数量从2T减少至T。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上，该方法相比现有方法公平性提升12-19%，准确性最高提升2%。
AI.conclusion: 动态目标选择机制有效平衡多任务学习中的公平性与准确性，且显著降低模型复杂度。

authors_text: Gautam Rajendrakumar Gare,Tom Fox,Pete Lowery,Kevin Zamora,Hai V. Tran,Laura Hutchins,David Montgomery,Amita Krishnan,Deva Kannan Ramanan,Ricardo Luis Rodriguez,Bennett P deBoisblanc,John Michael Galeotti
title: Learning Generic Lung Ultrasound Biomarkers for Decoupling Feature Extraction from Downstream Tasks
title_zh: 学习通用肺部超声生物标志物以从下游任务中解耦特征提取
abstract: Contemporary artificial neural networks (ANN) are trained end-to-end, jointly learning both features and classifiers for the task of interest. Though enormously effective, this paradigm imposes significant costs in assembling annotated task-specific datasets and training large-scale networks. We propose to decouple feature learning from downstream lung ultrasound tasks by introducing an auxiliary pre-task of visual biomarker classification. We demonstrate that one can learn an informative, concise, and interpretable feature space from ultrasound videos by training models for predicting biomarker labels. Notably, biomarker feature extractors can be trained from data annotated with weak video-scale supervision. These features can be used by a variety of downstream Expert models targeted for diverse clinical tasks (Diagnosis, lung severity, S/F ratio). Crucially, task-specific expert models are comparable in accuracy to end-to-end models directly trained for such target tasks, while being significantly lower cost to train.
summary: Contemporary artificial neural networks (ANN) are trained end-to-end, jointly learning both features and classifiers for the task of interest. Though enormously effective, this paradigm imposes significant costs in assembling annotated task-specific datasets and training large-scale networks. We propose to decouple feature learning from downstream lung ultrasound tasks by introducing an auxiliary pre-task of visual biomarker classification. We demonstrate that one can learn an informative, concise, and interpretable feature space from ultrasound videos by training models for predicting biomarker labels. Notably, biomarker feature extractors can be trained from data annotated with weak video-scale supervision. These features can be used by a variety of downstream Expert models targeted for diverse clinical tasks (Diagnosis, lung severity, S/F ratio). Crucially, task-specific expert models are comparable in accuracy to end-to-end models directly trained for such target tasks, while being significantly lower cost to train.
abstract_zh: 当代人工神经网络（ANN）经过端到端训练，联合学习感兴趣任务的特征和分类器。尽管非常有效，但这种范式在组装带注释的特定任务数据集和训练大规模网络方面带来了巨大的成本。我们建议通过引入视觉生物标志物分类的辅助前置任务，将特征学习与下游肺部超声任务解耦。我们证明，通过训练预测生物标志物标签的模型，可以从超声视频中学习信息丰富、简洁且可解释的特征空间。值得注意的是，生物标记特征提取器可以根据弱视频尺度监督注释的数据进行训练。这些功能可供针对不同临床任务（诊断、肺部严重程度、S/F 比）的各种下游 Expert 模型使用。至关重要的是，特定任务的专家模型在准确性上与直接针对此类目标任务训练的端到端模型相当，同时训练成本显着降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过预训练视觉生物标志物分类器解耦肺超声特征提取与下游临床任务，降低模型训练成本。
AI.motivation: 端到端神经网络需大量标注数据且训练成本高，而弱标注数据可利用性高，需探索通用特征提取方法以适配多任务场景。
AI.method: 引入辅助预任务进行生物标志物分类，从弱标注超声视频中学习通用特征空间，再基于该特征训练多样化下游专家模型。
AI.result: 下游任务模型准确率与端到端模型相当，但训练成本显著降低，验证了特征解耦的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦特征提取与任务模型可提升效率，为医学影像分析提供低成本高泛化性的解决方案。

conclusion: 解耦特征提取与任务模型可提升效率，为医学影像分析提供低成本高泛化性的解决方案。
search_text: Learning Generic Lung Ultrasound Biomarkers for Decoupling Feature Extraction from Downstream Tasks 学习通用肺部超声生物标志物以从下游任务中解耦特征提取 Contemporary artificial neural networks (ANN) are trained end-to-end, jointly learning both features and classifiers for the task of interest. Though enormously effective, this paradigm imposes significant costs in assembling annotated task-specific datasets and training large-scale networks. We propose to decouple feature learning from downstream lung ultrasound tasks by introducing an auxiliary pre-task of visual biomarker classification. We demonstrate that one can learn an informative, concise, and interpretable feature space from ultrasound videos by training models for predicting biomarker labels. Notably, biomarker feature extractors can be trained from data annotated with weak video-scale supervision. These features can be used by a variety of downstream Expert models targeted for diverse clinical tasks (Diagnosis, lung severity, S/F ratio). Crucially, task-specific expert models are comparable in accuracy to end-to-end models directly trained for such target tasks, while being significantly lower cost to train. 当代人工神经网络（ANN）经过端到端训练，联合学习感兴趣任务的特征和分类器。尽管非常有效，但这种范式在组装带注释的特定任务数据集和训练大规模网络方面带来了巨大的成本。我们建议通过引入视觉生物标志物分类的辅助前置任务，将特征学习与下游肺部超声任务解耦。我们证明，通过训练预测生物标志物标签的模型，可以从超声视频中学习信息丰富、简洁且可解释的特征空间。值得注意的是，生物标记特征提取器可以根据弱视频尺度监督注释的数据进行训练。这些功能可供针对不同临床任务（诊断、肺部严重程度、S/F 比）的各种下游 Expert 模型使用。至关重要的是，特定任务的专家模型在准确性上与直接针对此类目标任务训练的端到端模型相当，同时训练成本显着降低。 本文提出通过预训练视觉生物标志物分类器解耦肺超声特征提取与下游临床任务，降低模型训练成本。 Gautam Rajendrakumar Gare,Tom Fox,Pete Lowery,Kevin Zamora,Hai V. Tran,Laura Hutchins,David Montgomery,Amita Krishnan,Deva Kannan Ramanan,Ricardo Luis Rodriguez,Bennett P deBoisblanc,John Michael Galeotti eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Erik C. M. Johnson,Marc Habermann,Soshi Shimada,Vladislav Golyanik,Christian Theobalt
title: Unbiased 4D: Monocular 4D Reconstruction with a Neural Deformation Model
title_zh: 无偏 4D：使用神经变形模型进行单目 4D 重建
comment: 26 pages, 17 figures, 8 tables
comments: 26 pages, 17 figures, 8 tables
abstract: Capturing general deforming scenes from monocular RGB video is crucial for many computer graphics and vision applications. However, current approaches suffer from drawbacks such as struggling with large scene deformations, inaccurate shape completion or requiring 2D point tracks. In contrast, our method, Ub4D, handles large deformations, performs shape completion in occluded regions, and can operate on monocular RGB videos directly by using differentiable volume rendering. This technique includes three new in the context of non-rigid 3D reconstruction components, i.e., 1) A coordinate-based and implicit neural representation for non-rigid scenes, which in conjunction with differentiable volume rendering enables an unbiased reconstruction of dynamic scenes, 2) a proof that extends the unbiased formulation of volume rendering to dynamic scenes, and 3) a novel dynamic scene flow loss, which enables the reconstruction of larger deformations by leveraging the coarse estimates of other methods. Results on our new dataset, which will be made publicly available, demonstrate a clear improvement over the state of the art in terms of surface reconstruction accuracy and robustness to large deformations.
summary: Capturing general deforming scenes from monocular RGB video is crucial for many computer graphics and vision applications. However, current approaches suffer from drawbacks such as struggling with large scene deformations, inaccurate shape completion or requiring 2D point tracks. In contrast, our method, Ub4D, handles large deformations, performs shape completion in occluded regions, and can operate on monocular RGB videos directly by using differentiable volume rendering. This technique includes three new in the context of non-rigid 3D reconstruction components, i.e., 1) A coordinate-based and implicit neural representation for non-rigid scenes, which in conjunction with differentiable volume rendering enables an unbiased reconstruction of dynamic scenes, 2) a proof that extends the unbiased formulation of volume rendering to dynamic scenes, and 3) a novel dynamic scene flow loss, which enables the reconstruction of larger deformations by leveraging the coarse estimates of other methods. Results on our new dataset, which will be made publicly available, demonstrate a clear improvement over the state of the art in terms of surface reconstruction accuracy and robustness to large deformations.
abstract_zh: 从单目 RGB 视频中捕获一般变形场景对于许多计算机图形和视觉应用至关重要。然而，当前的方法存在一些缺点，例如难以应对大场景变形、形状完成不准确或需要 2D 点轨迹。相比之下，我们的方法 Ub4D 可以处理大变形，在遮挡区域执行形状补全，并且可以使用可微分体渲染直接对单目 RGB 视频进行操作。该技术包括非刚性 3D 重建组件背景下的三个新组件，即 1）非刚性场景的基于坐标的隐式神经表示，与可微分体渲染相结合，可以实现动态场景的无偏重建；2）将体渲染的无偏公式扩展到动态场景的证明；3）一种新颖的动态场景流损失，它可以通过利用其他方法的粗略估计来重建更大的变形。我们将公开发布的新数据集的结果表明，在表面重建精度和对大变形的鲁棒性方面，较现有技术有了明显的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经变形模型的单目4D重建方法，用于处理动态场景中的大范围变形，无需依赖2D点轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大场景变形、形状补全及依赖2D点轨迹方面存在局限，需提出更鲁棒的单目4D重建方法。
AI.method: 提出坐标基隐式神经表示与可微体积渲染结合，扩展无偏体积渲染至动态场景，并引入动态场景流损失以提升大变形重建能力。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验表明，该方法在表面重建精度和大变形鲁棒性方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过神经变形模型和新型损失函数，有效解决了动态场景重建中的挑战，推动了单目4D重建的发展。

authors_text: Tao Sun,Mattia Segu,Janis Postels,Yuxuan Wang,Luc Van Gool,Bernt Schiele,Federico Tombari,Fisher Yu
title: SHIFT: A Synthetic Driving Dataset for Continuous Multi-Task Domain Adaptation
title_zh: SHIFT：用于连续多任务域适应的综合驾驶数据集
comment: Published at IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022
comments: Published at IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022
abstract: Adapting to a continuously evolving environment is a safety-critical challenge inevitably faced by all autonomous driving systems. Existing image and video driving datasets, however, fall short of capturing the mutable nature of the real world. In this paper, we introduce the largest multi-task synthetic dataset for autonomous driving, SHIFT. It presents discrete and continuous shifts in cloudiness, rain and fog intensity, time of day, and vehicle and pedestrian density. Featuring a comprehensive sensor suite and annotations for several mainstream perception tasks, SHIFT allows investigating the degradation of a perception system performance at increasing levels of domain shift, fostering the development of continuous adaptation strategies to mitigate this problem and assess model robustness and generality. Our dataset and benchmark toolkit are publicly available at www.vis.xyz/shift.
summary: Adapting to a continuously evolving environment is a safety-critical challenge inevitably faced by all autonomous driving systems. Existing image and video driving datasets, however, fall short of capturing the mutable nature of the real world. In this paper, we introduce the largest multi-task synthetic dataset for autonomous driving, SHIFT. It presents discrete and continuous shifts in cloudiness, rain and fog intensity, time of day, and vehicle and pedestrian density. Featuring a comprehensive sensor suite and annotations for several mainstream perception tasks, SHIFT allows investigating the degradation of a perception system performance at increasing levels of domain shift, fostering the development of continuous adaptation strategies to mitigate this problem and assess model robustness and generality. Our dataset and benchmark toolkit are publicly available at www.vis.xyz/shift.
abstract_zh: 适应不断变化的环境是所有自动驾驶系统不可避免地面临的安全关键挑战。然而，现有的图像和视频驱动数据集无法捕捉现实世界的可变性质。在本文中，我们介绍了最大的自动驾驶多任务综合数据集 SHIFT。它呈现出云量、雨雾强度、一天中的时间以及车辆和行人密度的离散和连续变化。 SHIFT 具有针对多个主流感知任务的全面传感器套件和注释，允许调查感知系统性能在域转移水平不断提高时的退化情况，促进持续适应策略的开发，以缓解这一问题并评估模型的稳健性和通用性。我们的数据集和基准工具包可在 www.vis.xyz/shift 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SHIFT数据集，用于自动驾驶的连续多任务领域自适应研究。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集无法模拟真实世界动态变化，而自动驾驶系统需应对持续变化的环境以确保安全。
AI.method: 构建包含天气、时间、交通密度等连续变化的合成数据集，配备多传感器数据和主流感知任务标注。
AI.result: 公开发布数据集及基准工具包，支持研究感知系统性能退化及连续自适应策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SHIFT为评估模型鲁棒性和开发持续领域自适应方法提供了重要资源。

authors_text: Sebastian Ament,Carla Gomes
title: Scalable First-Order Bayesian Optimization via Structured Automatic Differentiation
title_zh: 通过结构化自动微分的可扩展一阶贝叶斯优化
abstract: Bayesian Optimization (BO) has shown great promise for the global optimization of functions that are expensive to evaluate, but despite many successes, standard approaches can struggle in high dimensions. To improve the performance of BO, prior work suggested incorporating gradient information into a Gaussian process surrogate of the objective, giving rise to kernel matrices of size $nd \times nd$ for $n$ observations in $d$ dimensions. Naïvely multiplying with (resp. inverting) these matrices requires $\mathcal{O}(n^2d^2)$ (resp. $\mathcal{O}(n^3d^3$)) operations, which becomes infeasible for moderate dimensions and sample sizes. Here, we observe that a wide range of kernels gives rise to structured matrices, enabling an exact $\mathcal{O}(n^2d)$ matrix-vector multiply for gradient observations and $\mathcal{O}(n^2d^2)$ for Hessian observations. Beyond canonical kernel classes, we derive a programmatic approach to leveraging this type of structure for transformations and combinations of the discussed kernel classes, which constitutes a structure-aware automatic differentiation algorithm. Our methods apply to virtually all canonical kernels and automatically extend to complex kernels, like the neural network, radial basis function network, and spectral mixture kernels without any additional derivations, enabling flexible, problem-dependent modeling while scaling first-order BO to high $d$.
summary: Bayesian Optimization (BO) has shown great promise for the global optimization of functions that are expensive to evaluate, but despite many successes, standard approaches can struggle in high dimensions. To improve the performance of BO, prior work suggested incorporating gradient information into a Gaussian process surrogate of the objective, giving rise to kernel matrices of size $nd \times nd$ for $n$ observations in $d$ dimensions. Naïvely multiplying with (resp. inverting) these matrices requires $\mathcal{O}(n^2d^2)$ (resp. $\mathcal{O}(n^3d^3$)) operations, which becomes infeasible for moderate dimensions and sample sizes. Here, we observe that a wide range of kernels gives rise to structured matrices, enabling an exact $\mathcal{O}(n^2d)$ matrix-vector multiply for gradient observations and $\mathcal{O}(n^2d^2)$ for Hessian observations. Beyond canonical kernel classes, we derive a programmatic approach to leveraging this type of structure for transformations and combinations of the discussed kernel classes, which constitutes a structure-aware automatic differentiation algorithm. Our methods apply to virtually all canonical kernels and automatically extend to complex kernels, like the neural network, radial basis function network, and spectral mixture kernels without any additional derivations, enabling flexible, problem-dependent modeling while scaling first-order BO to high $d$.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化 (BO) 在评估成本高昂的函数的全局优化方面显示出了巨大的前景，但尽管取得了许多成功，但标准方法在高维度上仍然举步维艰。为了提高 BO 的性能，之前的工作建议将梯度信息合并到目标的高斯过程代理中，从而为 $d$ 维度的 $n$ 观测值产生大小为 $nd \times nd$ 的核矩阵。与这些矩阵相乘（或求逆）需要 $\mathcal{O}(n^2d^2)$（或 $\mathcal{O}(n^3d^3$)）运算，这对于中等尺寸和样本大小来说是不可行的。在这里，我们观察到各种内核产生了结构化矩阵，使得梯度观测能够进行精确的 $\mathcal{O}(n^2d)$ 矩阵向量乘法，而对于 Hessian 观测则能够实现精确的 $\mathcal{O}(n^2d^2)$ 矩阵向量乘法。除了规范的内核类之外，我们还推导了一种编程方法来利用这种类型的结构进行所讨论的内核类的转换和组合，这构成了一种结构感知的自动微分算法。我们的方法几乎适用于所有规范核，并自动扩展到复杂核，例如神经网络、径向基函数网络和谱混合核，无需任何额外的推导，从而实现灵活的、与问题相关的建模，同时将一阶 BO 扩展到高 $d$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构化自动微分的可扩展一阶贝叶斯优化方法，解决高维优化中的计算效率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯优化在高维场景下因梯度信息处理导致计算复杂度过高（O(n²d²)或O(n³d³)），难以实际应用。
AI.method: 利用核函数生成的结构化矩阵特性，开发结构感知自动微分算法，将矩阵向量乘法复杂度降至O(n²d)，并自动适配复杂核函数。
AI.result: 方法支持所有标准核函数及神经网络、径向基函数等复杂核，实现高维场景下高效的一阶贝叶斯优化。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化自动微分突破高维优化瓶颈，为复杂模型提供灵活且可扩展的优化方案。

search_text: Scalable First-Order Bayesian Optimization via Structured Automatic Differentiation 通过结构化自动微分的可扩展一阶贝叶斯优化 Bayesian Optimization (BO) has shown great promise for the global optimization of functions that are expensive to evaluate, but despite many successes, standard approaches can struggle in high dimensions. To improve the performance of BO, prior work suggested incorporating gradient information into a Gaussian process surrogate of the objective, giving rise to kernel matrices of size $nd \times nd$ for $n$ observations in $d$ dimensions. Naïvely multiplying with (resp. inverting) these matrices requires $\mathcal{O}(n^2d^2)$ (resp. $\mathcal{O}(n^3d^3$)) operations, which becomes infeasible for moderate dimensions and sample sizes. Here, we observe that a wide range of kernels gives rise to structured matrices, enabling an exact $\mathcal{O}(n^2d)$ matrix-vector multiply for gradient observations and $\mathcal{O}(n^2d^2)$ for Hessian observations. Beyond canonical kernel classes, we derive a programmatic approach to leveraging this type of structure for transformations and combinations of the discussed kernel classes, which constitutes a structure-aware automatic differentiation algorithm. Our methods apply to virtually all canonical kernels and automatically extend to complex kernels, like the neural network, radial basis function network, and spectral mixture kernels without any additional derivations, enabling flexible, problem-dependent modeling while scaling first-order BO to high $d$. 贝叶斯优化 (BO) 在评估成本高昂的函数的全局优化方面显示出了巨大的前景，但尽管取得了许多成功，但标准方法在高维度上仍然举步维艰。为了提高 BO 的性能，之前的工作建议将梯度信息合并到目标的高斯过程代理中，从而为 $d$ 维度的 $n$ 观测值产生大小为 $nd \times nd$ 的核矩阵。与这些矩阵相乘（或求逆）需要 $\mathcal{O}(n^2d^2)$（或 $\mathcal{O}(n^3d^3$)）运算，这对于中等尺寸和样本大小来说是不可行的。在这里，我们观察到各种内核产生了结构化矩阵，使得梯度观测能够进行精确的 $\mathcal{O}(n^2d)$ 矩阵向量乘法，而对于 Hessian 观测则能够实现精确的 $\mathcal{O}(n^2d^2)$ 矩阵向量乘法。除了规范的内核类之外，我们还推导了一种编程方法来利用这种类型的结构进行所讨论的内核类的转换和组合，这构成了一种结构感知的自动微分算法。我们的方法几乎适用于所有规范核，并自动扩展到复杂核，例如神经网络、径向基函数网络和谱混合核，无需任何额外的推导，从而实现灵活的、与问题相关的建模，同时将一阶 BO 扩展到高 $d$。 本文提出一种基于结构化自动微分的可扩展一阶贝叶斯优化方法，解决高维优化中的计算效率问题。 Sebastian Ament,Carla Gomes cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MS,math.OC,stat.ML

authors_text: Wei-Chiu Ma,Anqi Joyce Yang,Shenlong Wang,Raquel Urtasun,Antonio Torralba
title: Virtual Correspondence: Humans as a Cue for Extreme-View Geometry
title_zh: 虚拟对应：人类作为极端几何的线索
comment: CVPR 2022. Project page: https://people.csail.mit.edu/weichium/virtual-correspondence/
comments: CVPR 2022. Project page: https://people.csail.mit.edu/weichium/virtual-correspondence/
abstract: Recovering the spatial layout of the cameras and the geometry of the scene from extreme-view images is a longstanding challenge in computer vision. Prevailing 3D reconstruction algorithms often adopt the image matching paradigm and presume that a portion of the scene is co-visible across images, yielding poor performance when there is little overlap among inputs. In contrast, humans can associate visible parts in one image to the corresponding invisible components in another image via prior knowledge of the shapes. Inspired by this fact, we present a novel concept called virtual correspondences (VCs). VCs are a pair of pixels from two images whose camera rays intersect in 3D. Similar to classic correspondences, VCs conform with epipolar geometry; unlike classic correspondences, VCs do not need to be co-visible across views. Therefore VCs can be established and exploited even if images do not overlap. We introduce a method to find virtual correspondences based on humans in the scene. We showcase how VCs can be seamlessly integrated with classic bundle adjustment to recover camera poses across extreme views. Experiments show that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art camera pose estimation methods in challenging scenarios and is comparable in the traditional densely captured setup. Our approach also unleashes the potential of multiple downstream tasks such as scene reconstruction from multi-view stereo and novel view synthesis in extreme-view scenarios.
summary: Recovering the spatial layout of the cameras and the geometry of the scene from extreme-view images is a longstanding challenge in computer vision. Prevailing 3D reconstruction algorithms often adopt the image matching paradigm and presume that a portion of the scene is co-visible across images, yielding poor performance when there is little overlap among inputs. In contrast, humans can associate visible parts in one image to the corresponding invisible components in another image via prior knowledge of the shapes. Inspired by this fact, we present a novel concept called virtual correspondences (VCs). VCs are a pair of pixels from two images whose camera rays intersect in 3D. Similar to classic correspondences, VCs conform with epipolar geometry; unlike classic correspondences, VCs do not need to be co-visible across views. Therefore VCs can be established and exploited even if images do not overlap. We introduce a method to find virtual correspondences based on humans in the scene. We showcase how VCs can be seamlessly integrated with classic bundle adjustment to recover camera poses across extreme views. Experiments show that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art camera pose estimation methods in challenging scenarios and is comparable in the traditional densely captured setup. Our approach also unleashes the potential of multiple downstream tasks such as scene reconstruction from multi-view stereo and novel view synthesis in extreme-view scenarios.
abstract_zh: 从极端视图图像中恢复相机的空间布局和场景的几何形状是计算机视觉领域的长期挑战。流行的 3D 重建算法通常采用图像匹配范例，并假设场景的一部分在图像之间是共同可见的，当输入之间几乎没有重叠时，会产生较差的性能。相比之下，人类可以通过形状的先验知识将一幅图像中的可见部分与另一幅图像中相应的不可见部分相关联。受这一事实的启发，我们提出了一个称为虚拟对应（VC）的新概念。 VC 是相机光线在 3D 中相交的两幅图像中的一对像素。与经典对应类似，VC 符合对极几何；与经典通信不同，VC 不需要跨视图共同可见。因此，即使图像不重叠，也可以建立和利用 VC。我们介绍了一种基于场景中的人类来查找虚拟对应关系的方法。我们展示了如何将 VC 与经典的捆绑调整无缝集成，以在极端视图中恢复相机姿势。实验表明，我们的方法在具有挑战性的场景中显着优于最先进的相机姿态估计方法，并且在传统的密集捕获设置中具有可比性。我们的方法还释放了多个下游任务的潜力，例如多视图立体场景重建和极端视图场景中的新颖视图合成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人类先验知识的虚拟对应关系（VCs）方法，用于解决极端视角下相机姿态和场景几何重建的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统三维重建算法依赖图像匹配和共视区域，但在极端视角下输入图像重叠极少时表现不佳。人类能通过形状先验知识关联不同视角的可见与不可见部分，启发了虚拟对应关系的提出。
AI.method: 通过场景中的人类作为线索，建立无需共视的虚拟对应关系（VCs），利用相机光线在三维空间的交点特性，并将VCs与经典光束法平差结合，实现极端视角下的相机姿态恢复。
AI.result: 在极端视角场景中显著优于现有相机姿态估计方法，在传统密集视角设置下表现相当，同时提升了多视角立体重建和新视角合成等下游任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过人类启发的虚拟对应关系有效解决了极端视角几何问题，为低重叠场景的三维重建提供了新思路和实用工具。

authors_text: Tengyang Xie,Akanksha Saran,Dylan J. Foster,Lekan Molu,Ida Momennejad,Nan Jiang,Paul Mineiro,John Langford
title: Interaction-Grounded Learning with Action-inclusive Feedback
title_zh: 以互动为基础的学习与包含行动的反馈
comment: Published in NeurIPS 2022
comments: Published in NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Consider the problem setting of Interaction-Grounded Learning (IGL), in which a learner's goal is to optimally interact with the environment with no explicit reward to ground its policies. The agent observes a context vector, takes an action, and receives a feedback vector, using this information to effectively optimize a policy with respect to a latent reward function. Prior analyzed approaches fail when the feedback vector contains the action, which significantly limits IGL's success in many potential scenarios such as Brain-computer interface (BCI) or Human-computer interface (HCI) applications. We address this by creating an algorithm and analysis which allows IGL to work even when the feedback vector contains the action, encoded in any fashion. We provide theoretical guarantees and large-scale experiments based on supervised datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of the new approach.
summary: Consider the problem setting of Interaction-Grounded Learning (IGL), in which a learner's goal is to optimally interact with the environment with no explicit reward to ground its policies. The agent observes a context vector, takes an action, and receives a feedback vector, using this information to effectively optimize a policy with respect to a latent reward function. Prior analyzed approaches fail when the feedback vector contains the action, which significantly limits IGL's success in many potential scenarios such as Brain-computer interface (BCI) or Human-computer interface (HCI) applications. We address this by creating an algorithm and analysis which allows IGL to work even when the feedback vector contains the action, encoded in any fashion. We provide theoretical guarantees and large-scale experiments based on supervised datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of the new approach.
abstract_zh: 考虑基于交互的学习（IGL）的问题设置，其中学习者的目标是与环境进行最佳交互，而没有明确的奖励来支持其策略。代理观察上下文向量，采取行动并接收反馈向量，使用此信息有效地优化有关潜在奖励函数的策略。当反馈向量包含动作时，先前分析的方法会失败，这极大地限制了 IGL 在许多潜在场景中的成功，例如脑机接口 (BCI) 或人机接口 (HCI) 应用。我们通过创建一种算法和分析来解决这个问题，即使反馈向量包含以任何方式编码的动作，IGL 也能工作。我们提供理论保证和基于监督数据集的大规模实验来证明新方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的交互基础学习算法，解决反馈向量包含动作时的优化问题，扩展了IGL在脑机接口等场景的应用可能。
AI.motivation: 传统IGL方法在反馈包含动作时失效，导致其难以应用于需要动作反馈的脑机接口或人机交互等关键场景。
AI.method: 设计允许反馈向量包含动作信息的算法框架，并通过理论分析证明其有效性，结合大规模监督数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 理论证明了新方法的收敛性，实验显示其在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法，验证了算法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新方法突破了IGL对反馈形式的限制，为动作感知型交互系统提供了理论支持和实用解决方案。

search_text: Interaction-Grounded Learning with Action-inclusive Feedback 以互动为基础的学习与包含行动的反馈 Consider the problem setting of Interaction-Grounded Learning (IGL), in which a learner's goal is to optimally interact with the environment with no explicit reward to ground its policies. The agent observes a context vector, takes an action, and receives a feedback vector, using this information to effectively optimize a policy with respect to a latent reward function. Prior analyzed approaches fail when the feedback vector contains the action, which significantly limits IGL's success in many potential scenarios such as Brain-computer interface (BCI) or Human-computer interface (HCI) applications. We address this by creating an algorithm and analysis which allows IGL to work even when the feedback vector contains the action, encoded in any fashion. We provide theoretical guarantees and large-scale experiments based on supervised datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of the new approach. 考虑基于交互的学习（IGL）的问题设置，其中学习者的目标是与环境进行最佳交互，而没有明确的奖励来支持其策略。代理观察上下文向量，采取行动并接收反馈向量，使用此信息有效地优化有关潜在奖励函数的策略。当反馈向量包含动作时，先前分析的方法会失败，这极大地限制了 IGL 在许多潜在场景中的成功，例如脑机接口 (BCI) 或人机接口 (HCI) 应用。我们通过创建一种算法和分析来解决这个问题，即使反馈向量包含以任何方式编码的动作，IGL 也能工作。我们提供理论保证和基于监督数据集的大规模实验来证明新方法的有效性。 本文提出一种新的交互基础学习算法，解决反馈向量包含动作时的优化问题，扩展了IGL在脑机接口等场景的应用可能。 Tengyang Xie,Akanksha Saran,Dylan J. Foster,Lekan Molu,Ida Momennejad,Nan Jiang,Paul Mineiro,John Langford cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.HC,stat.ML

authors_text: Jonathan Crabbé,Alicia Curth,Ioana Bica,Mihaela van der Schaar
title: Benchmarking Heterogeneous Treatment Effect Models through the Lens of Interpretability
title_zh: 通过可解释性的视角对异质治疗效果模型进行基准测试
abstract: Estimating personalized effects of treatments is a complex, yet pervasive problem. To tackle it, recent developments in the machine learning (ML) literature on heterogeneous treatment effect estimation gave rise to many sophisticated, but opaque, tools: due to their flexibility, modularity and ability to learn constrained representations, neural networks in particular have become central to this literature. Unfortunately, the assets of such black boxes come at a cost: models typically involve countless nontrivial operations, making it difficult to understand what they have learned. Yet, understanding these models can be crucial -- in a medical context, for example, discovered knowledge on treatment effect heterogeneity could inform treatment prescription in clinical practice. In this work, we therefore use post-hoc feature importance methods to identify features that influence the model's predictions. This allows us to evaluate treatment effect estimators along a new and important dimension that has been overlooked in previous work: We construct a benchmarking environment to empirically investigate the ability of personalized treatment effect models to identify predictive covariates -- covariates that determine differential responses to treatment. Our benchmarking environment then enables us to provide new insight into the strengths and weaknesses of different types of treatment effects models as we modulate different challenges specific to treatment effect estimation -- e.g. the ratio of prognostic to predictive information, the possible nonlinearity of potential outcomes and the presence and type of confounding.
summary: Estimating personalized effects of treatments is a complex, yet pervasive problem. To tackle it, recent developments in the machine learning (ML) literature on heterogeneous treatment effect estimation gave rise to many sophisticated, but opaque, tools: due to their flexibility, modularity and ability to learn constrained representations, neural networks in particular have become central to this literature. Unfortunately, the assets of such black boxes come at a cost: models typically involve countless nontrivial operations, making it difficult to understand what they have learned. Yet, understanding these models can be crucial -- in a medical context, for example, discovered knowledge on treatment effect heterogeneity could inform treatment prescription in clinical practice. In this work, we therefore use post-hoc feature importance methods to identify features that influence the model's predictions. This allows us to evaluate treatment effect estimators along a new and important dimension that has been overlooked in previous work: We construct a benchmarking environment to empirically investigate the ability of personalized treatment effect models to identify predictive covariates -- covariates that determine differential responses to treatment. Our benchmarking environment then enables us to provide new insight into the strengths and weaknesses of different types of treatment effects models as we modulate different challenges specific to treatment effect estimation -- e.g. the ratio of prognostic to predictive information, the possible nonlinearity of potential outcomes and the presence and type of confounding.
abstract_zh: 估计治疗的个性化效果是一个复杂但普遍的问题。为了解决这个问题，关于异质治疗效果估计的机器学习 (ML) 文献的最新发展催生了许多复杂但不透明的工具：由于其灵活性、模块化和学习约束表示的能力，神经网络尤其成为该文献的核心。不幸的是，此类黑匣子的资产是有代价的：模型通常涉及无数的重要操作，因此很难理解它们所学到的内容。然而，理解这些模型可能至关重要——例如，在医学背景下，发现的治疗效果异质性知识可以为临床实践中的治疗处方提供信息。因此，在这项工作中，我们使用事后特征重要性方法来识别影响模型预测的特征。这使我们能够沿着一个在以前的工作中被忽视的新的重要维度来评估治疗效果估计器：我们构建了一个基准环境来实证研究个性化治疗效果模型识别预测协变量的能力，即确定对治疗的差异反应的协变量。然后，我们的基准测试环境使我们能够在调整针对治疗效果估计的不同挑战时，对不同类型的治疗效果模型的优点和缺点提供新的见解——例如预后与预测信息的比率、潜在结果可能的非线性以及混杂因素的存在和类型。

AI.tldr: 通过可解释性视角构建基准环境，评估异质性处理效应模型识别预测协变量的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有异质性处理效应模型虽复杂但缺乏可解释性，阻碍其在医疗等领域的实际应用，需评估模型对关键特征的识别能力。
AI.method: 采用事后特征重要性分析方法，构建包含不同挑战（如预后与预测信息比例、非线性结果等）的基准环境进行模型评估。
AI.result: 发现不同模型在识别预测协变量时的性能差异，揭示了处理效应估计中关键挑战对模型表现的影响机制。
AI.conclusion: 可解释性分析为模型选择提供新维度，未来需在提升准确性与可解释性间寻求平衡。

authors_text: Yinshuang Xu,Jiahui Lei,Edgar Dobriban,Kostas Daniilidis
title: Unified Fourier-based Kernel and Nonlinearity Design for Equivariant Networks on Homogeneous Spaces
title_zh: 齐次空间上等变网络的统一基于傅里叶核和非线性设计
comment: Accepted at ICML2022 Thirty-ninth International Conference on Machine Learning
comments: Accepted at ICML2022 Thirty-ninth International Conference on Machine Learning
abstract: We introduce a unified framework for group equivariant networks on homogeneous spaces derived from a Fourier perspective. We consider tensor-valued feature fields, before and after a convolutional layer. We present a unified derivation of kernels via the Fourier domain by leveraging the sparsity of Fourier coefficients of the lifted feature fields. The sparsity emerges when the stabilizer subgroup of the homogeneous space is a compact Lie group. We further introduce a nonlinear activation, via an elementwise nonlinearity on the regular representation after lifting and projecting back to the field through an equivariant convolution. We show that other methods treating features as the Fourier coefficients in the stabilizer subgroup are special cases of our activation. Experiments on $SO(3)$ and $SE(3)$ show state-of-the-art performance in spherical vector field regression, point cloud classification, and molecular completion.
summary: We introduce a unified framework for group equivariant networks on homogeneous spaces derived from a Fourier perspective. We consider tensor-valued feature fields, before and after a convolutional layer. We present a unified derivation of kernels via the Fourier domain by leveraging the sparsity of Fourier coefficients of the lifted feature fields. The sparsity emerges when the stabilizer subgroup of the homogeneous space is a compact Lie group. We further introduce a nonlinear activation, via an elementwise nonlinearity on the regular representation after lifting and projecting back to the field through an equivariant convolution. We show that other methods treating features as the Fourier coefficients in the stabilizer subgroup are special cases of our activation. Experiments on $SO(3)$ and $SE(3)$ show state-of-the-art performance in spherical vector field regression, point cloud classification, and molecular completion.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了从傅立叶角度导出的同质空间上的群等变网络的统一框架。我们考虑卷积层之前和之后的张量值特征场。我们利用提升特征场的傅里叶系数的稀疏性，通过傅里叶域提出了核的统一推导。当齐次空间的稳定子群是紧李群时，就会出现稀疏性。我们通过等变卷积提升并投影回场后，通过正则表示上的元素非线性进一步引入非线性激活。我们表明，将特征视为稳定子组中的傅里叶系数的其他方法是我们激活的特殊情况。 $SO(3)$ 和 $SE(3)$ 上的实验显示了球向量场回归、点云分类和分子补全方面最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于傅里叶分析的统一框架，用于在齐性空间上设计等变网络，通过张量特征场的傅里叶稀疏性优化卷积核与非线性激活。
AI.motivation: 现有等变网络方法针对不同群结构需独立设计，缺乏统一性；利用傅里叶域稀疏性可提升计算效率并兼容多种群结构。
AI.method: 通过傅里叶域推导卷积核，利用稳定子群为紧李群时的特征场稀疏性；设计基于正则表示的逐元素非线性激活，并证明其他方法为其特例。
AI.result: 在SO(3)和SE(3)上的实验显示，该框架在球面矢量场回归、点云分类和分子补全任务中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该统一框架通过傅里叶分析与稀疏性约束，有效提升了等变网络的通用性与性能，为多任务学习提供了新思路。

Experiments on $SO(3)$ and $SE(3)$ show state-of-the-art performance in spherical vector field regression, point cloud classification, and molecular completion. 我们引入了从傅立叶角度导出的同质空间上的群等变网络的统一框架。我们考虑卷积层之前和之后的张量值特征场。我们利用提升特征场的傅里叶系数的稀疏性，通过傅里叶域提出了核的统一推导。当齐次空间的稳定子群是紧李群时，就会出现稀疏性。我们通过等变卷积提升并投影回场后，通过正则表示上的元素非线性进一步引入非线性激活。我们表明，将特征视为稳定子组中的傅里叶系数的其他方法是我们激活的特殊情况。 $SO(3)$ 和 $SE(3)$ 上的实验显示了球向量场回归、点云分类和分子补全方面最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种基于傅里叶分析的统一框架，用于在齐性空间上设计等变网络，通过张量特征场的傅里叶稀疏性优化卷积核与非线性激活。 Yinshuang Xu,Jiahui Lei,Edgar Dobriban,Kostas Daniilidis cs.CV

authors_text: Keqiang Sun,Shangzhe Wu,Zhaoyang Huang,Ning Zhang,Quan Wang,HongSheng Li
title: Controllable 3D Face Synthesis with Conditional Generative Occupancy Fields
title_zh: 具有条件生成占用场的可控 3D 人脸合成
abstract: Capitalizing on the recent advances in image generation models, existing controllable face image synthesis methods are able to generate high-fidelity images with some levels of controllability, e.g., controlling the shapes, expressions, textures, and poses of the generated face images. However, these methods focus on 2D image generative models, which are prone to producing inconsistent face images under large expression and pose changes. In this paper, we propose a new NeRF-based conditional 3D face synthesis framework, which enables 3D controllability over the generated face images by imposing explicit 3D conditions from 3D face priors. At its core is a conditional Generative Occupancy Field (cGOF) that effectively enforces the shape of the generated face to commit to a given 3D Morphable Model (3DMM) mesh. To achieve accurate control over fine-grained 3D face shapes of the synthesized image, we additionally incorporate a 3D landmark loss as well as a volume warping loss into our synthesis algorithm. Experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, which is able to generate high-fidelity face images and shows more precise 3D controllability than state-of-the-art 2D-based controllable face synthesis methods. Find code and demo at https://keqiangsun.github.io/projects/cgof.
summary: Capitalizing on the recent advances in image generation models, existing controllable face image synthesis methods are able to generate high-fidelity images with some levels of controllability, e.g., controlling the shapes, expressions, textures, and poses of the generated face images. However, these methods focus on 2D image generative models, which are prone to producing inconsistent face images under large expression and pose changes. In this paper, we propose a new NeRF-based conditional 3D face synthesis framework, which enables 3D controllability over the generated face images by imposing explicit 3D conditions from 3D face priors. At its core is a conditional Generative Occupancy Field (cGOF) that effectively enforces the shape of the generated face to commit to a given 3D Morphable Model (3DMM) mesh. To achieve accurate control over fine-grained 3D face shapes of the synthesized image, we additionally incorporate a 3D landmark loss as well as a volume warping loss into our synthesis algorithm. Experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, which is able to generate high-fidelity face images and shows more precise 3D controllability than state-of-the-art 2D-based controllable face synthesis methods. Find code and demo at https://keqiangsun.github.io/projects/cgof.
abstract_zh: 利用图像生成模型的最新进展，现有的可控人脸图像合成方法能够生成具有一定程度可控性的高保真图像，例如控制生成的人脸图像的形状、表情、纹理和姿势。然而，这些方法专注于二维图像生成模型，在大的表情和姿势变化下容易产生不一致的人脸图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于 NeRF 的条件 3D 人脸合成框架，该框架通过从 3D 人脸先验中施加显式 3D 条件，实现对生成的人脸图像的 3D 可控性。其核心是条件生成占用场 (cGOF)，它有效地强制生成的面的形状以提交给给定的 3D 可变形模型 (3DMM) 网格。为了实现对合成图像的细粒度 3D 面部形状的精确控制，我们另外将 3D 地标损失以及体积扭曲损失纳入我们的合成算法中。实验验证了该方法的有效性，该方法能够生成高保真人脸图像，并且比最先进的基于 2D 的可控人脸合成方法显示出更精确的 3D 可控性。在 https://keqiangsun.github.io/projects/cgof 查找代码和演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于NeRF的条件生成占用场（cGOF）框架，用于实现可控的3D人脸合成。
AI.motivation: 现有基于2D图像生成的方法在处理大表情和姿态变化时容易产生不一致的人脸图像，而3D方法能提供更精确的控制。
AI.method: 通过引入条件生成占用场（cGOF）和3D形态模型（3DMM）约束，结合3D关键点损失和体积变形损失，实现对合成人脸的精细3D形状控制。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成高保真度人脸图像，并在3D可控性上优于现有2D方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过显式3D条件约束提升了人脸合成的精度和一致性，为可控3D生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiaoshuai Hao,Yi Zhu,Srikar Appalaraju,Aston Zhang,Wanqian Zhang,Bo Li,Mu Li
title: MixGen: A New Multi-Modal Data Augmentation
title_zh: MixGen：一种新的多模态数据增强
comment: First three authors contributed equally. Code are available at https://github.com/amazon-research/mix-generation. Oral presentation at WACV 2023 Pretraining Large Vision and Multimodal Models Workshop
comments: First three authors contributed equally. Code are available at https://github.com/amazon-research/mix-generation. Oral presentation at WACV 2023 Pretraining Large Vision and Multimodal Models Workshop
abstract: Data augmentation is a necessity to enhance data efficiency in deep learning. For vision-language pre-training, data is only augmented either for images or for text in previous works. In this paper, we present MixGen: a joint data augmentation for vision-language representation learning to further improve data efficiency. It generates new image-text pairs with semantic relationships preserved by interpolating images and concatenating text. It's simple, and can be plug-and-played into existing pipelines. We evaluate MixGen on four architectures, including CLIP, ViLT, ALBEF and TCL, across five downstream vision-language tasks to show its versatility and effectiveness. For example, adding MixGen in ALBEF pre-training leads to absolute performance improvements on downstream tasks: image-text retrieval (+6.2% on COCO fine-tuned and +5.3% on Flicker30K zero-shot), visual grounding (+0.9% on RefCOCO+), visual reasoning (+$0.9% on NLVR2), visual question answering (+0.3% on VQA2.0), and visual entailment (+0.4% on SNLI-VE).
summary: Data augmentation is a necessity to enhance data efficiency in deep learning. For vision-language pre-training, data is only augmented either for images or for text in previous works. In this paper, we present MixGen: a joint data augmentation for vision-language representation learning to further improve data efficiency. It generates new image-text pairs with semantic relationships preserved by interpolating images and concatenating text. It's simple, and can be plug-and-played into existing pipelines. We evaluate MixGen on four architectures, including CLIP, ViLT, ALBEF and TCL, across five downstream vision-language tasks to show its versatility and effectiveness. For example, adding MixGen in ALBEF pre-training leads to absolute performance improvements on downstream tasks: image-text retrieval (+6.2% on COCO fine-tuned and +5.3% on Flicker30K zero-shot), visual grounding (+0.9% on RefCOCO+), visual reasoning (+$0.9% on NLVR2), visual question answering (+0.3% on VQA2.0), and visual entailment (+0.4% on SNLI-VE).
abstract_zh: 数据增强是提高深度学习数据效率的必要条件。对于视觉语言预训练，在之前的工作中仅对图像或文本的数据进行了增强。在本文中，我们提出了 MixGen：一种用于视觉语言表示学习的联合数据增强，以进一步提高数据效率。它生成新的图像文本对，并通过插入图像和连接文本来保留语义关系。它很简单，并且可以即插即用到现有管道中。我们在四种架构（包括 CLIP、ViLT、ALBEF 和 TCL）上跨五个下游视觉语言任务评估 MixGen，以展示其多功能性和有效性。例如，在 ALBEF 预训练中添加 MixGen 可带来下游任务的绝对性能提升：图像文本检索（COCO 微调上 +6.2%，Flicker30K 零样本上 +5.3%）、视觉基础（RefCOCO+ 上 +0.9%）、视觉推理（NLVR2 上 +0.9%）、视觉问答（VQA2.0 上 +0.3%）和视觉蕴含（SNLI-VE 上+0.4%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MixGen的多模态数据增强方法，用于提升视觉-语言表示学习的数据效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言预训练方法通常仅对图像或文本进行数据增强，未能充分利用多模态信息之间的关系，因此需要一种联合的数据增强方法来提升数据效率。
AI.method: MixGen通过插值图像和拼接文本生成具有语义关系的新图像-文本对，该方法简单且可直接集成到现有流程中。
AI.result: 在CLIP、ViLT、ALBEF和TCL四种架构上，MixGen在五个下游视觉-语言任务中均取得显著性能提升，例如在ALBEF预训练中，COCO微调的图像-文本检索任务提升了6.2%，Flicker30K零样本任务提升了5.3%。
AI.conclusion: MixGen是一种简单且有效的多模态数据增强方法，可以提升多种视觉-语言模型的性能，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Gaurav Parmar,Yijun Li,Jingwan Lu,Richard Zhang,Jun-Yan Zhu,Krishna Kumar Singh
title: Spatially-Adaptive Multilayer Selection for GAN Inversion and Editing
title_zh: 用于 GAN 反演和编辑的空间自适应多层选择
comment: CVPR 2022. Github: https://github.com/adobe-research/sam_inversion Website: https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~SAMInversion
comments: CVPR 2022. Github: https://github.com/adobe-research/sam_inversion Website: https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~SAMInversion
abstract: Existing GAN inversion and editing methods work well for aligned objects with a clean background, such as portraits and animal faces, but often struggle for more difficult categories with complex scene layouts and object occlusions, such as cars, animals, and outdoor images. We propose a new method to invert and edit such complex images in the latent space of GANs, such as StyleGAN2. Our key idea is to explore inversion with a collection of layers, spatially adapting the inversion process to the difficulty of the image. We learn to predict the "invertibility" of different image segments and project each segment into a latent layer. Easier regions can be inverted into an earlier layer in the generator's latent space, while more challenging regions can be inverted into a later feature space. Experiments show that our method obtains better inversion results compared to the recent approaches on complex categories, while maintaining downstream editability. Please refer to our project page at https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~SAMInversion.
summary: Existing GAN inversion and editing methods work well for aligned objects with a clean background, such as portraits and animal faces, but often struggle for more difficult categories with complex scene layouts and object occlusions, such as cars, animals, and outdoor images. We propose a new method to invert and edit such complex images in the latent space of GANs, such as StyleGAN2. Our key idea is to explore inversion with a collection of layers, spatially adapting the inversion process to the difficulty of the image. We learn to predict the "invertibility" of different image segments and project each segment into a latent layer. Easier regions can be inverted into an earlier layer in the generator's latent space, while more challenging regions can be inverted into a later feature space. Experiments show that our method obtains better inversion results compared to the recent approaches on complex categories, while maintaining downstream editability. Please refer to our project page at https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~SAMInversion.
abstract_zh: 现有的 GAN 反转和编辑方法对于具有干净背景的对齐对象（例如肖像和动物脸部）效果很好，但通常难以处理具有复杂场景布局和对象遮挡的更困难的类别，例如汽车、动物和户外图像。我们提出了一种新方法来反转和编辑 GAN 潜在空间中的此类复杂图像，例如 StyleGAN2。我们的主要想法是通过层的集合来探索反演，在空间上使反演过程适应图像的难度。我们学习预测不同图像片段的“可逆性”，并将每个片段投影到一个潜在层中。更容易的区域可以反转到生成器潜在空间中的较早层，而更具挑战性的区域可以反转到后面的特征空间。实验表明，与最近的复杂类别方法相比，我们的方法获得了更好的反演结果，同时保持了下游可编辑性。请参阅我们的项目页面：https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~SAMInversion。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种空间自适应多层选择方法，用于改进GAN（如StyleGAN2）在复杂场景下的图像逆向生成与编辑效果。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN逆向生成方法在处理复杂场景（如汽车、动物、户外图像）时表现不佳，因场景布局复杂和物体遮挡导致难以准确还原潜在空间表示。
AI.method: 通过预测图像不同区域的可逆向性，将简单区域映射到生成器早期潜在层，复杂区域映射到后期特征空间，实现空间自适应的多层选择逆向过程。
AI.result: 在复杂类别图像上取得优于最新方法的逆向生成效果，同时保持下游编辑任务的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 空间自适应多层选择策略能有效提升GAN在复杂场景下的逆向生成与编辑性能，为处理真实复杂图像提供新思路。

search_text: Spatially-Adaptive Multilayer Selection for GAN Inversion and Editing 用于 GAN 反演和编辑的空间自适应多层选择 Existing GAN inversion and editing methods work well for aligned objects with a clean background, such as portraits and animal faces, but often struggle for more difficult categories with complex scene layouts and object occlusions, such as cars, animals, and outdoor images. We propose a new method to invert and edit such complex images in the latent space of GANs, such as StyleGAN2. Our key idea is to explore inversion with a collection of layers, spatially adapting the inversion process to the difficulty of the image. We learn to predict the "invertibility" of different image segments and project each segment into a latent layer. Easier regions can be inverted into an earlier layer in the generator's latent space, while more challenging regions can be inverted into a later feature space. Experiments show that our method obtains better inversion results compared to the recent approaches on complex categories, while maintaining downstream editability. Please refer to our project page at https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~SAMInversion. 现有的 GAN 反转和编辑方法对于具有干净背景的对齐对象（例如肖像和动物脸部）效果很好，但通常难以处理具有复杂场景布局和对象遮挡的更困难的类别，例如汽车、动物和户外图像。我们提出了一种新方法来反转和编辑 GAN 潜在空间中的此类复杂图像，例如 StyleGAN2。我们的主要想法是通过层的集合来探索反演，在空间上使反演过程适应图像的难度。我们学习预测不同图像片段的“可逆性”，并将每个片段投影到一个潜在层中。更容易的区域可以反转到生成器潜在空间中的较早层，而更具挑战性的区域可以反转到后面的特征空间。实验表明，与最近的复杂类别方法相比，我们的方法获得了更好的反演结果，同时保持了下游可编辑性。请参阅我们的项目页面：https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~SAMInversion。 本文提出一种空间自适应多层选择方法，用于改进GAN（如StyleGAN2）在复杂场景下的图像逆向生成与编辑效果。 Gaurav Parmar,Yijun Li,Jingwan Lu,Richard Zhang,Jun-Yan Zhu,Krishna Kumar Singh cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Rohit Girdhar,Alaaeldin El-Nouby,Mannat Singh,Kalyan Vasudev Alwala,Armand Joulin,Ishan Misra
title: OmniMAE: Single Model Masked Pretraining on Images and Videos
title_zh: OmniMAE：图像和视频的单模型屏蔽预训练
comment: CVPR 2023. Code/models: https://github.com/facebookresearch/omnivore
comments: CVPR 2023. Code/models: https://github.com/facebookresearch/omnivore
abstract: Transformer-based architectures have become competitive across a variety of visual domains, most notably images and videos. While prior work studies these modalities in isolation, having a common architecture suggests that one can train a single unified model for multiple visual modalities. Prior attempts at unified modeling typically use architectures tailored for vision tasks, or obtain worse performance compared to single modality models. In this work, we show that masked autoencoding can be used to train a simple Vision Transformer on images and videos, without requiring any labeled data. This single model learns visual representations that are comparable to or better than single-modality representations on both image and video benchmarks, while using a much simpler architecture. Furthermore, this model can be learned by dropping 90% of the image and 95% of the video patches, enabling extremely fast training of huge model architectures. In particular, we show that our single ViT-Huge model can be finetuned to achieve 86.6% on ImageNet and 75.5% on the challenging Something Something-v2 video benchmark, setting a new state-of-the-art.
summary: Transformer-based architectures have become competitive across a variety of visual domains, most notably images and videos. While prior work studies these modalities in isolation, having a common architecture suggests that one can train a single unified model for multiple visual modalities. Prior attempts at unified modeling typically use architectures tailored for vision tasks, or obtain worse performance compared to single modality models. In this work, we show that masked autoencoding can be used to train a simple Vision Transformer on images and videos, without requiring any labeled data. This single model learns visual representations that are comparable to or better than single-modality representations on both image and video benchmarks, while using a much simpler architecture. Furthermore, this model can be learned by dropping 90% of the image and 95% of the video patches, enabling extremely fast training of huge model architectures. In particular, we show that our single ViT-Huge model can be finetuned to achieve 86.6% on ImageNet and 75.5% on the challenging Something Something-v2 video benchmark, setting a new state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的架构已在各种视觉领域（尤其是图像和视频）中变得具有竞争力。虽然之前的工作是孤立地研究这些模式，但拥有一个共同的架构表明可以为多种视觉模式训练一个统一的模型。先前的统一建模尝试通常使用针对视觉任务定制的架构，或者与单一模态模型相比获得更差的性能。在这项工作中，我们展示了屏蔽自动编码可用于在图像和视频上训练简单的视觉转换器，而不需要任何标记数据。这个单一模型学习的视觉表示与图像和视频基准上的单模态表示相当或更好，同时使用更简单的架构。此外，该模型可以通过丢弃 90% 的图像和 95% 的视频块来学习，从而能够极快地训练大型模型架构。特别是，我们展示了我们的单一 ViT-Huge 模型可以经过微调，在 ImageNet 上达到 86.6%，在具有挑战性的 Something Something-v2 视频基准上达到 75.5%，创下了新的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniMAE方法，通过掩码自编码在图像和视频上进行单模型预训练，无需标注数据。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉模型多针对单一模态（图像或视频）独立训练，缺乏统一架构。现有统一模型或结构复杂或性能不足，需探索更高效方案。
AI.method: 采用掩码自编码策略训练简单ViT模型，通过随机丢弃90%图像块和95%视频块实现高效训练，无需标注数据。
AI.result: ViT-Huge模型在ImageNet上达到86.6%准确率，在Something Something-v2视频基准上达75.5%，创同期新纪录。
AI.conclusion: OmniMAE验证了单模型跨模态预训练的可行性，通过简化架构和高效训练策略实现了图像视频任务的性能突破。

authors_text: Ang Cao,Chris Rockwell,Justin Johnson
title: FWD: Real-time Novel View Synthesis with Forward Warping and Depth
title_zh: FWD：具有前向扭曲和深度的实时新颖视图合成
comment: CVPR 2022. Project website https://caoang327.github.io/FWD/
comments: CVPR 2022. Project website https://caoang327.github.io/FWD/
abstract: Novel view synthesis (NVS) is a challenging task requiring systems to generate photorealistic images of scenes from new viewpoints, where both quality and speed are important for applications. Previous image-based rendering (IBR) methods are fast, but have poor quality when input views are sparse. Recent Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and generalizable variants give impressive results but are not real-time. In our paper, we propose a generalizable NVS method with sparse inputs, called FWD, which gives high-quality synthesis in real-time. With explicit depth and differentiable rendering, it achieves competitive results to the SOTA methods with 130-1000x speedup and better perceptual quality. If available, we can seamlessly integrate sensor depth during either training or inference to improve image quality while retaining real-time speed. With the growing prevalence of depths sensors, we hope that methods making use of depth will become increasingly useful.
summary: Novel view synthesis (NVS) is a challenging task requiring systems to generate photorealistic images of scenes from new viewpoints, where both quality and speed are important for applications. Previous image-based rendering (IBR) methods are fast, but have poor quality when input views are sparse. Recent Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and generalizable variants give impressive results but are not real-time. In our paper, we propose a generalizable NVS method with sparse inputs, called FWD, which gives high-quality synthesis in real-time. With explicit depth and differentiable rendering, it achieves competitive results to the SOTA methods with 130-1000x speedup and better perceptual quality. If available, we can seamlessly integrate sensor depth during either training or inference to improve image quality while retaining real-time speed. With the growing prevalence of depths sensors, we hope that methods making use of depth will become increasingly useful.
abstract_zh: 新视图合成（NVS）是一项具有挑战性的任务，要求系统从新的视角生成场景的真实图像，其中质量和速度对于应用程序都很重要。以前的基于图像的渲染（IBR）方法速度很快，但当输入视图稀疏时质量较差。最近的神经辐射场（NeRF）和可推广的变体给出了令人印象深刻的结果，但不是实时的。在我们的论文中，我们提出了一种具有稀疏输入的通用 NVS 方法，称为 FWD，它可以实时提供高质量的合成。凭借显式深度和可微渲染，它实现了与 SOTA 方法竞争的结果，加速速度提高了 130-1000 倍，感知质量更好。如果可用，我们可以在训练或推理过程中无缝集成传感器深度，以提高图像质量，同时保持实时速度。随着深度传感器的日益普及，我们希望利用深度的方法将变得越来越有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FWD的实时新视角合成方法，通过前向映射和深度估计，在稀疏输入下实现高质量的图像生成。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像的渲染（IBR）方法虽快但质量差，而神经辐射场（NeRF）等方法虽质量高但无法实时运行，需在速度与质量间取得平衡。
AI.method: FWD结合显式深度估计与可微渲染技术，利用前向映射策略，并支持在训练或推理阶段无缝集成传感器深度数据以提升效果。
AI.result: FWD在保持实时性的同时，相比现有方法实现130-1000倍加速，且感知质量更优；集成深度数据后图像质量进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 随着深度传感器普及，融合深度信息的方法将更具实用价值，FWD为实时高质量新视角合成提供了有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FWD的实时新视角合成方法，通过前向映射和深度估计，在稀疏输入下实现高质量的图像生成。
motivation: 现有基于图像的渲染（IBR）方法虽快但质量差，而神经辐射场（NeRF）等方法虽质量高但无法实时运行，需在速度与质量间取得平衡。
method: FWD结合显式深度估计与可微渲染技术，利用前向映射策略，并支持在训练或推理阶段无缝集成传感器深度数据以提升效果。
result: FWD在保持实时性的同时，相比现有方法实现130-1000倍加速，且感知质量更优；集成深度数据后图像质量进一步提升。
conclusion: 随着深度传感器普及，融合深度信息的方法将更具实用价值，FWD为实时高质量新视角合成提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: FWD: Real-time Novel View Synthesis with Forward Warping and Depth FWD：具有前向扭曲和深度的实时新颖视图合成 Novel view synthesis (NVS) is a challenging task requiring systems to generate photorealistic images of scenes from new viewpoints, where both quality and speed are important for applications. Previous image-based rendering (IBR) methods are fast, but have poor quality when input views are sparse. Recent Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and generalizable variants give impressive results but are not real-time. In our paper, we propose a generalizable NVS method with sparse inputs, called FWD, which gives high-quality synthesis in real-time. With explicit depth and differentiable rendering, it achieves competitive results to the SOTA methods with 130-1000x speedup and better perceptual quality. If available, we can seamlessly integrate sensor depth during either training or inference to improve image quality while retaining real-time speed. With the growing prevalence of depths sensors, we hope that methods making use of depth will become increasingly useful. 新视图合成（NVS）是一项具有挑战性的任务，要求系统从新的视角生成场景的真实图像，其中质量和速度对于应用程序都很重要。以前的基于图像的渲染（IBR）方法速度很快，但当输入视图稀疏时质量较差。最近的神经辐射场（NeRF）和可推广的变体给出了令人印象深刻的结果，但不是实时的。在我们的论文中，我们提出了一种具有稀疏输入的通用 NVS 方法，称为 FWD，它可以实时提供高质量的合成。凭借显式深度和可微渲染，它实现了与 SOTA 方法竞争的结果，加速速度提高了 130-1000 倍，感知质量更好。如果可用，我们可以在训练或推理过程中无缝集成传感器深度，以提高图像质量，同时保持实时速度。随着深度传感器的日益普及，我们希望利用深度的方法将变得越来越有用。 本文提出了一种名为FWD的实时新视角合成方法，通过前向映射和深度估计，在稀疏输入下实现高质量的图像生成。 Ang Cao,Chris Rockwell,Justin Johnson cs.CV

authors_text: Aaditya K. Singh,David Ding,Andrew Saxe,Felix Hill,Andrew K. Lampinen
title: Know your audience: specializing grounded language models with listener subtraction
title_zh: 了解你的听众：通过听众减法专门化扎根语言模型
comment: 28 pages, 9 figures
comments: 28 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Effective communication requires adapting to the idiosyncrasies of each communicative context--such as the common ground shared with each partner. Humans demonstrate this ability to specialize to their audience in many contexts, such as the popular game Dixit. We take inspiration from Dixit to formulate a multi-agent image reference game where a (trained) speaker model is rewarded for describing a target image such that one (pretrained) listener model can correctly identify it among distractors, but another listener cannot. To adapt, the speaker must exploit differences in the knowledge it shares with the different listeners. We show that finetuning an attention-based adapter between a CLIP vision encoder and a large language model in this contrastive, multi-agent setting gives rise to context-dependent natural language specialization from rewards only, without direct supervision. Through controlled experiments, we show that training a speaker with two listeners that perceive differently, using our method, allows the speaker to adapt to the idiosyncracies of the listeners. Furthermore, we show zero-shot transfer of the specialization to real-world data. Our experiments demonstrate a method for specializing grounded language models without direct supervision and highlight the interesting research challenges posed by complex multi-agent communication.
summary: Effective communication requires adapting to the idiosyncrasies of each communicative context--such as the common ground shared with each partner. Humans demonstrate this ability to specialize to their audience in many contexts, such as the popular game Dixit. We take inspiration from Dixit to formulate a multi-agent image reference game where a (trained) speaker model is rewarded for describing a target image such that one (pretrained) listener model can correctly identify it among distractors, but another listener cannot. To adapt, the speaker must exploit differences in the knowledge it shares with the different listeners. We show that finetuning an attention-based adapter between a CLIP vision encoder and a large language model in this contrastive, multi-agent setting gives rise to context-dependent natural language specialization from rewards only, without direct supervision. Through controlled experiments, we show that training a speaker with two listeners that perceive differently, using our method, allows the speaker to adapt to the idiosyncracies of the listeners. Furthermore, we show zero-shot transfer of the specialization to real-world data. Our experiments demonstrate a method for specializing grounded language models without direct supervision and highlight the interesting research challenges posed by complex multi-agent communication.
abstract_zh: 有效的沟通需要适应每个沟通环境的特质，例如与每个合作伙伴共享的共同点。人类在许多情况下都展示了这种专门针对受众的能力，例如流行的游戏 Dixit。我们从 Dixit 中汲取灵感，制定了一种多智能体图像参考游戏，其中（经过训练的）说话者模型因描述目标图像而获得奖励，这样一个（经过预训练的）听众模型可以在干扰因素中正确识别它，但另一个听众则不能。为了适应，说话者必须利用与不同听众分享的知识的差异。我们表明，在这种对比的多智能体环境中，对 CLIP 视觉编码器和大型语言模型之间基于注意力的适配器进行微调，可以仅通过奖励来实现上下文相关的自然语言专业化，而无需直接监督。通过受控实验，我们表明，使用我们的方法对两名感知不同的听众进行训练，可以使演讲者适应听众的特质。此外，我们展示了专业化到现实世界数据的零样本迁移。我们的实验展示了一种在没有直接监督的情况下专门化扎根语言模型的方法，并强调了复杂的多智能体通信带来的有趣的研究挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需直接监督的 grounded language model 专业化方法，通过对比多智能体设置使说话者模型适应不同听众的知识差异。
AI.motivation: 有效沟通需适应不同听众的背景知识，但现有方法难以在复杂多智能体场景中实现这种适应性，尤其缺乏无需人工标注的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计多智能体图像参考游戏，训练说话者模型通过对比两个不同感知能力的预训练听众模型，利用注意力适配器在CLIP视觉编码器与大语言模型间进行微调。
AI.result: 实验表明说话者能根据听众差异生成针对性描述，且专业化能力可零样本迁移至真实数据，验证了方法在复杂通信场景的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了无需监督的模型专业化，揭示了多智能体通信中知识差异对齐与动态适应的关键挑战。

authors_text: Matthew Gwilliam,Abhinav Shrivastava
title: Beyond Supervised vs. Unsupervised: Representative Benchmarking and Analysis of Image Representation Learning
title_zh: 超越监督与无监督：图像表示学习的代表性基准测试和分析
comment: CVPR 2022, project page: https://mgwillia.github.io/exploring-unsupervised/
comments: CVPR 2022, project page: https://mgwillia.github.io/exploring-unsupervised/
abstract: By leveraging contrastive learning, clustering, and other pretext tasks, unsupervised methods for learning image representations have reached impressive results on standard benchmarks. The result has been a crowded field - many methods with substantially different implementations yield results that seem nearly identical on popular benchmarks, such as linear evaluation on ImageNet. However, a single result does not tell the whole story. In this paper, we compare methods using performance-based benchmarks such as linear evaluation, nearest neighbor classification, and clustering for several different datasets, demonstrating the lack of a clear front-runner within the current state-of-the-art. In contrast to prior work that performs only supervised vs. unsupervised comparison, we compare several different unsupervised methods against each other. To enrich this comparison, we analyze embeddings with measurements such as uniformity, tolerance, and centered kernel alignment (CKA), and propose two new metrics of our own: nearest neighbor graph similarity and linear prediction overlap. We reveal through our analysis that in isolation, single popular methods should not be treated as though they represent the field as a whole, and that future work ought to consider how to leverage the complimentary nature of these methods. We also leverage CKA to provide a framework to robustly quantify augmentation invariance, and provide a reminder that certain types of invariance will be undesirable for downstream tasks.
summary: By leveraging contrastive learning, clustering, and other pretext tasks, unsupervised methods for learning image representations have reached impressive results on standard benchmarks. The result has been a crowded field - many methods with substantially different implementations yield results that seem nearly identical on popular benchmarks, such as linear evaluation on ImageNet. However, a single result does not tell the whole story. In this paper, we compare methods using performance-based benchmarks such as linear evaluation, nearest neighbor classification, and clustering for several different datasets, demonstrating the lack of a clear front-runner within the current state-of-the-art. In contrast to prior work that performs only supervised vs. unsupervised comparison, we compare several different unsupervised methods against each other. To enrich this comparison, we analyze embeddings with measurements such as uniformity, tolerance, and centered kernel alignment (CKA), and propose two new metrics of our own: nearest neighbor graph similarity and linear prediction overlap. We reveal through our analysis that in isolation, single popular methods should not be treated as though they represent the field as a whole, and that future work ought to consider how to leverage the complimentary nature of these methods. We also leverage CKA to provide a framework to robustly quantify augmentation invariance, and provide a reminder that certain types of invariance will be undesirable for downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 通过利用对比学习、聚类和其他借口任务，用于学习图像表示的无监督方法在标准基准上取得了令人印象深刻的结果。结果是一个拥挤的领域——许多实现方式截然不同的方法产生的结果在流行的基准测试上几乎相同，例如 ImageNet 上的线性评估。然而，单一结果并不能说明全部情况。在本文中，我们比较了使用基于性能的基准的方法，例如线性评估、最近邻分类和几个不同数据集的聚类，表明当前最先进的技术中缺乏明显的领先者。与仅进行监督与无监督比较的先前工作相比，我们对几种不同的无监督方法进行了相互比较。为了丰富这种比较，我们通过均匀性、容差和中心核对齐（CKA）等测量来分析嵌入，并提出我们自己的两个新指标：最近邻图相似性和线性预测重叠。我们通过分析揭示，单独的流行方法不应被视为代表整个领域，未来的工作应该考虑如何利用这些方法的互补性。我们还利用 CKA 提供一个框架来稳健地量化增强不变性，并提醒人们某些类型的不变性对于下游任务来说是不受欢迎的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过多维度基准测试和分析，比较了多种无监督图像表示学习方法的性能差异，并提出新的评估指标以揭示方法间的互补性。
AI.motivation: 当前研究过度依赖单一基准（如ImageNet线性评估）导致方法差异被掩盖，需更全面的评估框架以区分不同无监督学习方法的优劣。
AI.method: 采用线性评估、最近邻分类、聚类等基准，结合均匀性、容忍度、CKA等指标，并提出最近邻图相似性与线性预测重叠两个新度量进行方法比较。
AI.result: 发现无监督方法在主流基准上表现接近但存在显著差异，单一方法无法代表领域整体，且某些不变性可能对下游任务产生负面影响。
AI.conclusion: 应避免将单一方法视为领域代表，未来需探索方法互补性，并通过CKA等工具量化评估数据增强不变性的影响。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过多维度基准测试和分析，比较了多种无监督图像表示学习方法的性能差异，并提出新的评估指标以揭示方法间的互补性。
