To enrich this comparison, we analyze embeddings with measurements such as uniformity, tolerance, and centered kernel alignment (CKA), and propose two new metrics of our own: nearest neighbor graph similarity and linear prediction overlap. We reveal through our analysis that in isolation, single popular methods should not be treated as though they represent the field as a whole, and that future work ought to consider how to leverage the complimentary nature of these methods. We also leverage CKA to provide a framework to robustly quantify augmentation invariance, and provide a reminder that certain types of invariance will be undesirable for downstream tasks. 通过利用对比学习、聚类和其他借口任务，用于学习图像表示的无监督方法在标准基准上取得了令人印象深刻的结果。结果是一个拥挤的领域——许多实现方式截然不同的方法产生的结果在流行的基准测试上几乎相同，例如 ImageNet 上的线性评估。然而，单一结果并不能说明全部情况。在本文中，我们比较了使用基于性能的基准的方法，例如线性评估、最近邻分类和几个不同数据集的聚类，表明当前最先进的技术中缺乏明显的领先者。与仅进行监督与无监督比较的先前工作相比，我们对几种不同的无监督方法进行了相互比较。为了丰富这种比较，我们通过均匀性、容差和中心核对齐（CKA）等测量来分析嵌入，并提出我们自己的两个新指标：最近邻图相似性和线性预测重叠。我们通过分析揭示，单独的流行方法不应被视为代表整个领域，未来的工作应该考虑如何利用这些方法的互补性。我们还利用 CKA 提供一个框架来稳健地量化增强不变性，并提醒人们某些类型的不变性对于下游任务来说是不受欢迎的。 本文通过多维度基准测试和分析，比较了多种无监督图像表示学习方法的性能差异，并提出新的评估指标以揭示方法间的互补性。 Matthew Gwilliam,Abhinav Shrivastava cs.CV

authors_text: Mohammad Shahab Uddin
title: Real-World Single Image Super-Resolution Under Rainy Condition
title_zh: 雨天条件下的真实单幅图像超分辨率
abstract: Image super-resolution is an important research area in computer vision that has a wide variety of applications including surveillance, medical imaging etc. Real-world signal image super-resolution has become very popular now-a-days due to its real-time application. There are still a lot of scopes to improve real-world single image super-resolution specially during challenging weather scenarios. In this paper, we have proposed a new algorithm to perform real-world single image super-resolution during rainy condition. Our proposed method can mitigate the influence of rainy conditions during image super-resolution. Our experiment results show that our proposed algorithm can perform image super-resolution decreasing the negative effects of the rain.
summary: Image super-resolution is an important research area in computer vision that has a wide variety of applications including surveillance, medical imaging etc. Real-world signal image super-resolution has become very popular now-a-days due to its real-time application. There are still a lot of scopes to improve real-world single image super-resolution specially during challenging weather scenarios. In this paper, we have proposed a new algorithm to perform real-world single image super-resolution during rainy condition. Our proposed method can mitigate the influence of rainy conditions during image super-resolution. Our experiment results show that our proposed algorithm can perform image super-resolution decreasing the negative effects of the rain.
abstract_zh: 图像超分辨率是计算机视觉中的一个重要研究领域，具有广泛的应用，包括监控、医学成像等。现实世界信号图像超分辨率由于其实时应用而变得非常流行。现实世界的单图像超分辨率仍有很多提升空间，特别是在具有挑战性的天气场景下。在本文中，我们提出了一种新算法来在雨天条件下执行真实世界的单图像超分辨率。我们提出的方法可以减轻图像超分辨率期间下雨条件的影响。我们的实验结果表明，我们提出的算法可以执行图像超分辨率，减少降雨的负面影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在雨天条件下进行真实场景单图像超分辨率的新算法。
AI.motivation: 真实场景下的单图像超分辨率在恶劣天气（如雨天）中仍存在性能提升空间，现有方法难以有效抑制雨滴对超分辨率的干扰。
AI.method: 设计新型算法框架，通过特定模块抑制雨天图像中的雨滴噪声并增强细节信息。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法能有效降低雨天对超分辨率的负面影响，生成更清晰的高分辨率图像。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法为复杂天气条件下的图像超分辨率任务提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Taras Khakhulin,Vanessa Sklyarova,Victor Lempitsky,Egor Zakharov
title: Realistic One-shot Mesh-based Head Avatars
title_zh: 逼真的一次性基于网格的头像
abstract: We present a system for realistic one-shot mesh-based human head avatars creation, ROME for short. Using a single photograph, our model estimates a person-specific head mesh and the associated neural texture, which encodes both local photometric and geometric details. The resulting avatars are rigged and can be rendered using a neural network, which is trained alongside the mesh and texture estimators on a dataset of in-the-wild videos. In the experiments, we observe that our system performs competitively both in terms of head geometry recovery and the quality of renders, especially for the cross-person reenactment. See results https://samsunglabs.github.io/rome/
summary: We present a system for realistic one-shot mesh-based human head avatars creation, ROME for short. Using a single photograph, our model estimates a person-specific head mesh and the associated neural texture, which encodes both local photometric and geometric details. The resulting avatars are rigged and can be rendered using a neural network, which is trained alongside the mesh and texture estimators on a dataset of in-the-wild videos. In the experiments, we observe that our system performs competitively both in terms of head geometry recovery and the quality of renders, especially for the cross-person reenactment. See results https://samsunglabs.github.io/rome/
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于网格的逼真一次性人体头像创建系统，简称 ROME。使用单张照片，我们的模型估计特定于人的头部网格和相关的神经纹理，其编码局部光度和几何细节。生成的头像经过装配，可以使用神经网络进行渲染，神经网络与网格和纹理估计器一起在野外视频数据集上进行训练。在实验中，我们观察到我们的系统在头部几何恢复和渲染质量方面都具有竞争力，尤其是在跨人重演方面。查看结果 https://samsunglabs.github.io/rome/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单张照片生成真实感三维人脸avatar的系统ROME，通过估计个性化的头部网格和神经纹理实现跨人物重演。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常需要多视角图像或复杂设备才能生成高质量3D人脸模型，缺乏对单张照片的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 利用单张照片估计个性化的头部网格与神经纹理，通过神经网络联合训练网格/纹理估计器和渲染器，基于野外视频数据集进行优化。
AI.result: 在头部几何重建和渲染质量上表现优异，尤其在跨人物表情重演任务中达到竞争性水平。
AI.conclusion: ROME系统验证了单张图像生成高保真可驱动人脸avatar的可行性，为虚拟角色创建提供了新范式。

authors_text: Ojas Parekh,Kevin Thompson
title: An Optimal Product-State Approximation for 2-Local Quantum Hamiltonians with Positive Terms
title_zh: 具有正项的2-局域量子哈密顿量的最优乘积态近似
comment: 40 pages; presented at QIP 2022
comments: 40 pages; presented at QIP 2022
abstract: We resolve the approximability of the maximum energy of the Quantum Max Cut (QMC) problem using product states. A classical 0.498-approximation, using a basic semidefinite programming relaxation, is known for QMC, paralleling the celebrated 0.878-approximation for classical Max Cut. For Max Cut, improving the 0.878-approximation is Unique-Games-hard (UG-hard), and one might expect that improving the 0.498-approximation is UG-hard for QMC. In contrast, we give a classical 1/2-approximation for QMC that is unconditionally optimal, since simple examples exhibit a gap of 1/2 between the energies of an optimal product state and general quantum state. Our result relies on a new nonlinear monogamy of entanglement inequality on a triangle that is derived from the second level of the quantum Lasserre hierarchy. This inequality also applies to the quantum Heisenberg model, and our results generalize to instances of Max 2-Local Hamiltonian where each term is positive and has no 1-local parts. Finally, we give further evidence that product states are essential for approximations of 2-Local Hamiltonian.
summary: We resolve the approximability of the maximum energy of the Quantum Max Cut (QMC) problem using product states. A classical 0.498-approximation, using a basic semidefinite programming relaxation, is known for QMC, paralleling the celebrated 0.878-approximation for classical Max Cut. For Max Cut, improving the 0.878-approximation is Unique-Games-hard (UG-hard), and one might expect that improving the 0.498-approximation is UG-hard for QMC. In contrast, we give a classical 1/2-approximation for QMC that is unconditionally optimal, since simple examples exhibit a gap of 1/2 between the energies of an optimal product state and general quantum state. Our result relies on a new nonlinear monogamy of entanglement inequality on a triangle that is derived from the second level of the quantum Lasserre hierarchy. This inequality also applies to the quantum Heisenberg model, and our results generalize to instances of Max 2-Local Hamiltonian where each term is positive and has no 1-local parts. Finally, we give further evidence that product states are essential for approximations of 2-Local Hamiltonian.
abstract_zh: 我们使用乘积态解决了量子最大割（QMC）问题的最大能量的近似性。使用基本半定规划松弛的经典 0.498 近似值因 QMC 而闻名，与经典 Max Cut 的著名 0.878 近似值类似。对于 Max Cut，改进 0.878 近似值是 Unique-Games-hard (UG-hard)，人们可能会认为改进 0.498 近似值对于 QMC 来说是 UG-hard。相比之下，我们给出了无条件最优的 QMC 经典 1/2 近似，因为简单的例子显示最优产物态和一般量子态的能量之间有 1/2 的差距。我们的结果依赖于三角形上纠缠不等式的新非线性一夫一妻制，该三角形源自量子拉塞尔层次结构的第二级。这种不等式也适用于量子海森堡模型，我们的结果可以推广到 Max 2-Local 哈密顿量的实例，其中每一项都是正数并且没有 1-局部部分。最后，我们进一步证明乘积态对于 2-局部哈密顿量的近似至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用乘积态近似求解2-局部量子哈密顿量最大能量的问题，特别是量子最大割（QMC）问题的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 经典最大割问题有0.878近似比且难以改进，而QMC的0.498近似比是否最优尚不明确。本文旨在确定乘积态在量子2-局部哈密顿量近似中的最优性。
AI.method: 通过构建量子Lasserre层次的二阶非线性纠缠单边性不等式，结合三角形结构的分析，证明乘积态的1/2近似比的最优性。
AI.result: 提出了一种无条件最优的1/2近似算法，且证明存在乘积态与一般量子态能量差达1/2的实例，同时结果推广到正定无1-局部项的2-局部哈密顿量。
AI.conclusion: 乘积态是近似求解2-局部正定哈密顿量的关键，且其1/2近似比在量子最大割问题中无法被超越。

method: 通过构建量子Lasserre层次的二阶非线性纠缠单边性不等式，结合三角形结构的分析，证明乘积态的1/2近似比的最优性。
result: 提出了一种无条件最优的1/2近似算法，且证明存在乘积态与一般量子态能量差达1/2的实例，同时结果推广到正定无1-局部项的2-局部哈密顿量。
conclusion: 乘积态是近似求解2-局部正定哈密顿量的关键，且其1/2近似比在量子最大割问题中无法被超越。
search_text: An Optimal Product-State Approximation for 2-Local Quantum Hamiltonians with Positive Terms 具有正项的2-局域量子哈密顿量的最优乘积态近似 We resolve the approximability of the maximum energy of the Quantum Max Cut (QMC) problem using product states. A classical 0.498-approximation, using a basic semidefinite programming relaxation, is known for QMC, paralleling the celebrated 0.878-approximation for classical Max Cut. For Max Cut, improving the 0.878-approximation is Unique-Games-hard (UG-hard), and one might expect that improving the 0.498-approximation is UG-hard for QMC. In contrast, we give a classical 1/2-approximation for QMC that is unconditionally optimal, since simple examples exhibit a gap of 1/2 between the energies of an optimal product state and general quantum state. Our result relies on a new nonlinear monogamy of entanglement inequality on a triangle that is derived from the second level of the quantum Lasserre hierarchy. This inequality also applies to the quantum Heisenberg model, and our results generalize to instances of Max 2-Local Hamiltonian where each term is positive and has no 1-local parts. Finally, we give further evidence that product states are essential for approximations of 2-Local Hamiltonian. 我们使用乘积态解决了量子最大割（QMC）问题的最大能量的近似性。使用基本半定规划松弛的经典 0.498 近似值因 QMC 而闻名，与经典 Max Cut 的著名 0.878 近似值类似。对于 Max Cut，改进 0.878 近似值是 Unique-Games-hard (UG-hard)，人们可能会认为改进 0.498 近似值对于 QMC 来说是 UG-hard。相比之下，我们给出了无条件最优的 QMC 经典 1/2 近似，因为简单的例子显示最优产物态和一般量子态的能量之间有 1/2 的差距。我们的结果依赖于三角形上纠缠不等式的新非线性一夫一妻制，该三角形源自量子拉塞尔层次结构的第二级。这种不等式也适用于量子海森堡模型，我们的结果可以推广到 Max 2-Local 哈密顿量的实例，其中每一项都是正数并且没有 1-局部部分。最后，我们进一步证明乘积态对于 2-局部哈密顿量的近似至关重要。 本文研究了使用乘积态近似求解2-局部量子哈密顿量最大能量的问题，特别是量子最大割（QMC）问题的近似算法。 Ojas Parekh,Kevin Thompson quant-ph,cs.DS

authors_text: Fatemeh Saleh,Fuwen Tan,Adrian Bulat,Georgios Tzimiropoulos,Brais Martinez
title: iBoot: Image-bootstrapped Self-Supervised Video Representation Learning
title_zh: iBoot：图像引导的自监督视频表示学习
abstract: Learning visual representations through self-supervision is an extremely challenging task as the network needs to sieve relevant patterns from spurious distractors without the active guidance provided by supervision. This is achieved through heavy data augmentation, large-scale datasets and prohibitive amounts of compute. Video self-supervised learning (SSL) suffers from added challenges: video datasets are typically not as large as image datasets, compute is an order of magnitude larger, and the amount of spurious patterns the optimizer has to sieve through is multiplied several fold. Thus, directly learning self-supervised representations from video data might result in sub-optimal performance. To address this, we propose to utilize a strong image-based model, pre-trained with self- or language supervision, in a video representation learning framework, enabling the model to learn strong spatial and temporal information without relying on the video labeled data. To this end, we modify the typical video-based SSL design and objective to encourage the video encoder to \textit{subsume} the semantic content of an image-based model trained on a general domain. The proposed algorithm is shown to learn much more efficiently (i.e. in less epochs and with a smaller batch) and results in a new state-of-the-art performance on standard downstream tasks among single-modality SSL methods.
summary: Learning visual representations through self-supervision is an extremely challenging task as the network needs to sieve relevant patterns from spurious distractors without the active guidance provided by supervision. This is achieved through heavy data augmentation, large-scale datasets and prohibitive amounts of compute. Video self-supervised learning (SSL) suffers from added challenges: video datasets are typically not as large as image datasets, compute is an order of magnitude larger, and the amount of spurious patterns the optimizer has to sieve through is multiplied several fold. Thus, directly learning self-supervised representations from video data might result in sub-optimal performance. To address this, we propose to utilize a strong image-based model, pre-trained with self- or language supervision, in a video representation learning framework, enabling the model to learn strong spatial and temporal information without relying on the video labeled data. To this end, we modify the typical video-based SSL design and objective to encourage the video encoder to \textit{subsume} the semantic content of an image-based model trained on a general domain. The proposed algorithm is shown to learn much more efficiently (i.e. in less epochs and with a smaller batch) and results in a new state-of-the-art performance on standard downstream tasks among single-modality SSL methods.
abstract_zh: 通过自我监督学习视觉表示是一项极具挑战性的任务，因为网络需要在没有监督提供的主动指导的情况下从虚假干扰因素中筛选出相关模式。这是通过大量数据增强、大规模数据集和大量计算来实现的。视频自监督学习 (SSL) 面临着更多挑战：视频数据集通常不如图像数据集大，计算量大一个数量级，并且优化器必须筛选的虚假模式数量要成倍增加。因此，直接从视频数据中学习自监督表示可能会导致性能次优。为了解决这个问题，我们建议在视频表示学习框架中利用强大的基于图像的模型，通过自我或语言监督进行预训练，使模型能够在不依赖视频标记数据的情况下学习强大的空间和时间信息。为此，我们修改了典型的基于视频的 SSL 设计和目标，以鼓励视频编码器 \textit{subsume} 在通用域上训练的基于图像的模型的语义内容。所提出的算法被证明可以更有效地学习（即在更少的时期和更小的批次中），并在单模态 SSL 方法中的标准下游任务上产生新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iBoot方法，通过利用预训练的图像模型来提升视频自监督表示学习的效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 视频自监督学习面临数据集规模小、计算成本高及冗余模式多等挑战，直接学习视频表征可能导致次优结果。
AI.method: 修改传统视频自监督学习框架，使视频编码器融合预训练图像模型的语义信息，减少对视频标注数据的依赖。
AI.result: 在标准下游任务中达到单模态自监督方法的最先进性能，且训练效率更高（更少训练周期和更小批量）。
AI.conclusion: 借助图像模型初始化可显著提升视频自监督学习的效率与效果，为视频表征学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Weifu Wang,Ping Li
title: Planning through Workspace Constraint Satisfaction and Optimization
title_zh: 通过工作空间约束满足和优化进行规划
abstract: In this work, we present a workspace-based planning framework, which though using redundant workspace key-points to represent robot states, can take advantage of the interpretable geometric information to derive good quality collision-free paths for even complex robots. Using workspace geometries, we first find collision-free piece-wise linear paths for each key point so that at the endpoints of each segment, the distance constraints are satisfied among the key points. Using these piece-wise linear paths as initial conditions, we can perform optimization steps to quickly find paths that satisfy various constraints and piece together all segments to obtain a valid path. We show that these adjusted paths are unlikely to create a collision, and the proposed approach is fast and can produce good quality results.
summary: In this work, we present a workspace-based planning framework, which though using redundant workspace key-points to represent robot states, can take advantage of the interpretable geometric information to derive good quality collision-free paths for even complex robots. Using workspace geometries, we first find collision-free piece-wise linear paths for each key point so that at the endpoints of each segment, the distance constraints are satisfied among the key points. Using these piece-wise linear paths as initial conditions, we can perform optimization steps to quickly find paths that satisfy various constraints and piece together all segments to obtain a valid path. We show that these adjusted paths are unlikely to create a collision, and the proposed approach is fast and can produce good quality results.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于工作空间的规划框架，虽然使用冗余的工作空间关键点来表示机器人状态，但可以利用可解释的几何信息为复杂的机器人导出高质量的无碰撞路径。使用工作空间几何形状，我们首先为每个关键点找到无碰撞的分段线性路径，以便在每个线段的端点处，满足关键点之间的距离约束。使用这些分段线性路径作为初始条件，我们可以执行优化步骤来快速找到满足各种约束的路径，并将所有分段拼凑在一起以获得有效路径。我们表明，这些调整后的路径不太可能产生碰撞，并且所提出的方法速度快并且可以产生良好的质量结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于工作空间约束满足与优化的机器人路径规划框架，通过几何信息生成高质量无碰撞路径。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法难以高效处理复杂机器人运动约束，需结合可解释几何信息提升规划质量与效率。
AI.method: 利用工作空间几何特性，通过冗余关键点构建分段线性路径，并基于距离约束进行优化拼接。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能快速生成无碰撞路径，满足多约束条件且路径质量优异。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过几何约束与优化结合，在复杂机器人路径规划中展现出高效性与可靠性。

authors_text: Zhaohan Daniel Guo,Shantanu Thakoor,Miruna Pîslar,Bernardo Avila Pires,Florent Altché,Corentin Tallec,Alaa Saade,Daniele Calandriello,Jean-Bastien Grill,Yunhao Tang,Michal Valko,Rémi Munos,Mohammad Gheshlaghi Azar,Bilal Piot
title: BYOL-Explore: Exploration by Bootstrapped Prediction
title_zh: BYOL-Explore：通过 Bootstrapped 预测进行探索
abstract: We present BYOL-Explore, a conceptually simple yet general approach for curiosity-driven exploration in visually-complex environments. BYOL-Explore learns a world representation, the world dynamics, and an exploration policy all-together by optimizing a single prediction loss in the latent space with no additional auxiliary objective. We show that BYOL-Explore is effective in DM-HARD-8, a challenging partially-observable continuous-action hard-exploration benchmark with visually-rich 3-D environments. On this benchmark, we solve the majority of the tasks purely through augmenting the extrinsic reward with BYOL-Explore s intrinsic reward, whereas prior work could only get off the ground with human demonstrations. As further evidence of the generality of BYOL-Explore, we show that it achieves superhuman performance on the ten hardest exploration games in Atari while having a much simpler design than other competitive agents.
summary: We present BYOL-Explore, a conceptually simple yet general approach for curiosity-driven exploration in visually-complex environments. BYOL-Explore learns a world representation, the world dynamics, and an exploration policy all-together by optimizing a single prediction loss in the latent space with no additional auxiliary objective. We show that BYOL-Explore is effective in DM-HARD-8, a challenging partially-observable continuous-action hard-exploration benchmark with visually-rich 3-D environments. On this benchmark, we solve the majority of the tasks purely through augmenting the extrinsic reward with BYOL-Explore s intrinsic reward, whereas prior work could only get off the ground with human demonstrations. As further evidence of the generality of BYOL-Explore, we show that it achieves superhuman performance on the ten hardest exploration games in Atari while having a much simpler design than other competitive agents.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 BYOL-Explore，这是一种概念上简单但通用的方法，用于在视觉复杂的环境中进行好奇心驱动的探索。 BYOL-Explore 通过优化潜在空间中的单个预测损失来学习世界表示、世界动态和探索策略，无需额外的辅助目标。我们证明了 BYOL-Explore 在 DM-HARD-8 中是有效的，DM-HARD-8 是具有视觉丰富的 3D 环境的具有挑战性的部分可观察连续动作硬探索基准。在此基准上，我们纯粹通过利用 BYOL-Explore 的内在奖励来增强外在奖励来解决大部分任务，而之前的工作只能通过人类演示才能取得进展。作为 BYOL-Explore 通用性的进一步证据，我们表明它在 Atari 十个最难的探索游戏中实现了超人的性能，同时比其他竞争代理具有更简单的设计。

AI.motivation: 现有探索方法在部分可观测环境中依赖人类演示，难以实现通用性与高效性，需设计更简洁有效的内在奖励机制。
AI.method: 基于BYOL框架，在潜在空间中联合优化世界表示、动态模型和探索策略，通过引导预测损失实现端到端学习。
AI.result: 在DM-HARD-8基准中无需人类演示即解决多数任务，在Atari最难十款游戏中超越人类表现，且设计复杂度显著低于竞品。
AI.conclusion: BYOL-Explore验证了引导预测在探索任务中的通用性，其简洁设计为复杂环境下的自主探索提供了新范式。

search_text: BYOL-Explore: Exploration by Bootstrapped Prediction BYOL-Explore：通过 Bootstrapped 预测进行探索 We present BYOL-Explore, a conceptually simple yet general approach for curiosity-driven exploration in visually-complex environments. BYOL-Explore learns a world representation, the world dynamics, and an exploration policy all-together by optimizing a single prediction loss in the latent space with no additional auxiliary objective. We show that BYOL-Explore is effective in DM-HARD-8, a challenging partially-observable continuous-action hard-exploration benchmark with visually-rich 3-D environments. On this benchmark, we solve the majority of the tasks purely through augmenting the extrinsic reward with BYOL-Explore s intrinsic reward, whereas prior work could only get off the ground with human demonstrations. As further evidence of the generality of BYOL-Explore, we show that it achieves superhuman performance on the ten hardest exploration games in Atari while having a much simpler design than other competitive agents. 我们提出了 BYOL-Explore，这是一种概念上简单但通用的方法，用于在视觉复杂的环境中进行好奇心驱动的探索。 BYOL-Explore 通过优化潜在空间中的单个预测损失来学习世界表示、世界动态和探索策略，无需额外的辅助目标。我们证明了 BYOL-Explore 在 DM-HARD-8 中是有效的，DM-HARD-8 是具有视觉丰富的 3D 环境的具有挑战性的部分可观察连续动作硬探索基准。在此基准上，我们纯粹通过利用 BYOL-Explore 的内在奖励来增强外在奖励来解决大部分任务，而之前的工作只能通过人类演示才能取得进展。作为 BYOL-Explore 通用性的进一步证据，我们表明它在 Atari 十个最难的探索游戏中实现了超人的性能，同时比其他竞争代理具有更简单的设计。 本文提出BYOL-Explore方法，在视觉复杂环境中通过单一预测损失实现好奇心驱动的探索，无需额外辅助目标。 Zhaohan Daniel Guo,Shantanu Thakoor,Miruna Pîslar,Bernardo Avila Pires,Florent Altché,Corentin Tallec,Alaa Saade,Daniele Calandriello,Jean-Bastien Grill,Yunhao Tang,Michal Valko,Rémi Munos,Mohammad Gheshlaghi Azar,Bilal Piot cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Maribeth Rauh,John Mellor,Jonathan Uesato,Po-Sen Huang,Johannes Welbl,Laura Weidinger,Sumanth Dathathri,Amelia Glaese,Geoffrey Irving,Iason Gabriel,William Isaac,Lisa Anne Hendricks
title: Characteristics of Harmful Text: Towards Rigorous Benchmarking of Language Models
title_zh: 有害文本的特征：走向严格的语言模型基准测试
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks Track; 10 pages plus appendix
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks Track; 10 pages plus appendix
abstract: Large language models produce human-like text that drive a growing number of applications. However, recent literature and, increasingly, real world observations, have demonstrated that these models can generate language that is toxic, biased, untruthful or otherwise harmful. Though work to evaluate language model harms is under way, translating foresight about which harms may arise into rigorous benchmarks is not straightforward. To facilitate this translation, we outline six ways of characterizing harmful text which merit explicit consideration when designing new benchmarks. We then use these characteristics as a lens to identify trends and gaps in existing benchmarks. Finally, we apply them in a case study of the Perspective API, a toxicity classifier that is widely used in harm benchmarks. Our characteristics provide one piece of the bridge that translates between foresight and effective evaluation.
summary: Large language models produce human-like text that drive a growing number of applications. However, recent literature and, increasingly, real world observations, have demonstrated that these models can generate language that is toxic, biased, untruthful or otherwise harmful. Though work to evaluate language model harms is under way, translating foresight about which harms may arise into rigorous benchmarks is not straightforward. To facilitate this translation, we outline six ways of characterizing harmful text which merit explicit consideration when designing new benchmarks. We then use these characteristics as a lens to identify trends and gaps in existing benchmarks. Finally, we apply them in a case study of the Perspective API, a toxicity classifier that is widely used in harm benchmarks. Our characteristics provide one piece of the bridge that translates between foresight and effective evaluation.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型可生成类似人类的文本，从而驱动越来越多的应用程序。然而，最近的文献以及越来越多的现实世界观察表明，这些模型可能会生成有毒的、有偏见的、不真实的或其他有害的语言。尽管评估语言模型危害的工作正在进行中，但将可能出现哪些危害的预见转化为严格的基准并不简单。为了促进这种翻译，我们概述了表征有害文本的六种方法，在设计新基准时值得明确考虑。然后，我们使用这些特征作为镜头来识别现有基准的趋势和差距。最后，我们将它们应用到 Perspective API 的案例研究中，Perspective API 是一种广泛用于危害基准的毒性分类器。我们的特点提供了连接远见和有效评估的桥梁之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出六个有害文本特征，旨在为语言模型基准测试设计提供系统性框架。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型基准测试难以有效评估生成文本的潜在危害，缺乏系统性特征指导。
AI.method: 通过归纳有害文本的六个核心特征，分析现有基准测试的不足，并以Perspective API为案例验证特征有效性。
AI.result: 识别出当前基准测试在危害类型覆盖和动态适应性方面的不足，验证了特征分析方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的文本特征框架可作为连接危害预见与评估实践的桥梁，推动更严谨的模型评估体系构建。

authors_text: Hyunwoo Ryu,Hong-in Lee,Jeong-Hoon Lee,Jongeun Choi
title: Equivariant Descriptor Fields: SE(3)-Equivariant Energy-Based Models for End-to-End Visual Robotic Manipulation Learning
title_zh: 等变描述符字段：用于端到端视觉机器人操作学习的 SE(3)-基于等变能量的模型
comment: 32 pages, 14 figures, To appear in the Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2023
comments: 32 pages, 14 figures, To appear in the Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2023
abstract: End-to-end learning for visual robotic manipulation is known to suffer from sample inefficiency, requiring large numbers of demonstrations. The spatial roto-translation equivariance, or the SE(3)-equivariance can be exploited to improve the sample efficiency for learning robotic manipulation. In this paper, we present SE(3)-equivariant models for visual robotic manipulation from point clouds that can be trained fully end-to-end. By utilizing the representation theory of the Lie group, we construct novel SE(3)-equivariant energy-based models that allow highly sample efficient end-to-end learning. We show that our models can learn from scratch without prior knowledge and yet are highly sample efficient (5~10 demonstrations are enough). Furthermore, we show that our models can generalize to tasks with (i) previously unseen target object poses, (ii) previously unseen target object instances of the category, and (iii) previously unseen visual distractors. We experiment with 6-DoF robotic manipulation tasks to validate our models' sample efficiency and generalizability. Codes are available at: https://github.com/tomato1mule/edf
summary: End-to-end learning for visual robotic manipulation is known to suffer from sample inefficiency, requiring large numbers of demonstrations. The spatial roto-translation equivariance, or the SE(3)-equivariance can be exploited to improve the sample efficiency for learning robotic manipulation. In this paper, we present SE(3)-equivariant models for visual robotic manipulation from point clouds that can be trained fully end-to-end. By utilizing the representation theory of the Lie group, we construct novel SE(3)-equivariant energy-based models that allow highly sample efficient end-to-end learning. We show that our models can learn from scratch without prior knowledge and yet are highly sample efficient (5~10 demonstrations are enough). Furthermore, we show that our models can generalize to tasks with (i) previously unseen target object poses, (ii) previously unseen target object instances of the category, and (iii) previously unseen visual distractors. We experiment with 6-DoF robotic manipulation tasks to validate our models' sample efficiency and generalizability. Codes are available at: https://github.com/tomato1mule/edf
abstract_zh: 众所周知，视觉机器人操作的端到端学习存在样本效率低下的问题，需要大量的演示。可以利用空间旋转平移等方差或 SE(3) 等方差来提高学习机器人操作的样本效率。在本文中，我们提出了用于点云视觉机器人操作的 SE(3) 等变模型，该模型可以完全端到端地训练。通过利用李群的表示理论，我们构建了新颖的基于 SE(3) 等变能量的模型，该模型允许高样本效率的端到端学习。我们证明，我们的模型可以在没有先验知识的情况下从头开始学习，并且样本效率很高（5~10 次演示就足够了）。此外，我们表明，我们的模型可以泛化到以下任务：（i）以前未见过的目标对象姿势，（ii）以前未见过的该类别的目标对象实例，以及（iii）以前未见过的视觉干扰物。我们对 6-DoF 机器人操作任务进行实验，以验证我们模型的样本效率和通用性。代码可访问：https://github.com/tomato1mule/edf

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于SE(3)-等变能量模型的端到端视觉机械臂操作学习方法。
AI.motivation: 端到端学习在视觉机械臂操作中存在样本效率低的问题，需要大量演示数据。利用SE(3)等变性可以提高样本效率。
AI.method: 利用李群表示理论构建SE(3)-等变能量模型，实现从点云数据中进行端到端学习。
AI.result: 模型可以从零开始学习，样本效率高（5~10个演示即可），并能泛化到新目标姿态、新目标实例和新视觉干扰物。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的SE(3)-等变模型在样本效率和泛化能力方面表现出色，适用于6自由度机械臂操作任务。

By utilizing the representation theory of the Lie group, we construct novel SE(3)-equivariant energy-based models that allow highly sample efficient end-to-end learning. We show that our models can learn from scratch without prior knowledge and yet are highly sample efficient (5~10 demonstrations are enough). Furthermore, we show that our models can generalize to tasks with (i) previously unseen target object poses, (ii) previously unseen target object instances of the category, and (iii) previously unseen visual distractors. We experiment with 6-DoF robotic manipulation tasks to validate our models' sample efficiency and generalizability. Codes are available at: https://github.com/tomato1mule/edf 众所周知，视觉机器人操作的端到端学习存在样本效率低下的问题，需要大量的演示。可以利用空间旋转平移等方差或 SE(3) 等方差来提高学习机器人操作的样本效率。在本文中，我们提出了用于点云视觉机器人操作的 SE(3) 等变模型，该模型可以完全端到端地训练。通过利用李群的表示理论，我们构建了新颖的基于 SE(3) 等变能量的模型，该模型允许高样本效率的端到端学习。我们证明，我们的模型可以在没有先验知识的情况下从头开始学习，并且样本效率很高（5~10 次演示就足够了）。此外，我们表明，我们的模型可以泛化到以下任务：（i）以前未见过的目标对象姿势，（ii）以前未见过的该类别的目标对象实例，以及（iii）以前未见过的视觉干扰物。我们对 6-DoF 机器人操作任务进行实验，以验证我们模型的样本效率和通用性。代码可访问：https://github.com/tomato1mule/edf 本文提出了一种基于SE(3)-等变能量模型的端到端视觉机械臂操作学习方法。 Hyunwoo Ryu,Hong-in Lee,Jeong-Hoon Lee,Jongeun Choi cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Weifu Wang,Ping Li
title: Planning and Formulations in Pursuit-Evasion: Keep-away Games and Their Strategies
title_zh: 追逃中的规划和制定：躲避游戏及其策略
abstract: We study a pursuit-evasion problem which can be viewed as an extension of the keep-away game. In the game, pursuer(s) will attempt to intersect or catch the evader, while the evader can visit a fixed set of locations, which we denote as the anchors. These anchors may or may not be stationary. When the velocity of the pursuers is limited and considered low compared to the evaders, we are interested in whether a winning strategy exists for the pursuers or the evaders, or the game will draw. When the anchors are stationary, we show an algorithm that can help answer the above question. The primary motivation for this study is to explore the boundaries between kinematic and dynamic constraints. In particular, whether the solution of the kinematic problem can be used to speed up the search for the problems with dynamic constraints and how to discretize the problem to utilize such relations best. In this work, we show that a geometric branch-and-bound type of approach can be used to solve the stationary anchor problem, and the approach and the solution can be extended to solve the dynamic problem where the pursuers have dynamic constraints, including velocity and acceleration bounds.
summary: We study a pursuit-evasion problem which can be viewed as an extension of the keep-away game. In the game, pursuer(s) will attempt to intersect or catch the evader, while the evader can visit a fixed set of locations, which we denote as the anchors. These anchors may or may not be stationary. When the velocity of the pursuers is limited and considered low compared to the evaders, we are interested in whether a winning strategy exists for the pursuers or the evaders, or the game will draw. When the anchors are stationary, we show an algorithm that can help answer the above question. The primary motivation for this study is to explore the boundaries between kinematic and dynamic constraints. In particular, whether the solution of the kinematic problem can be used to speed up the search for the problems with dynamic constraints and how to discretize the problem to utilize such relations best. In this work, we show that a geometric branch-and-bound type of approach can be used to solve the stationary anchor problem, and the approach and the solution can be extended to solve the dynamic problem where the pursuers have dynamic constraints, including velocity and acceleration bounds.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一个追击-逃避问题，它可以被视为回避游戏的延伸。在游戏中，追捕者将尝试相交或抓住逃避者，而逃避者可以访问一组固定的位置，我们将其表示为锚点。这些锚点可能是固定的，也可能不是固定的。当追赶者的速度有限并且与逃避者相比较低时，我们感兴趣的是追赶者或逃避者是否存在获胜策略，或者游戏是否会平局。当锚点静止时，我们展示了一种可以帮助回答上述问题的算法。这项研究的主要动机是探索运动学和动态约束之间的界限。特别是，运动学问题的解是否可以用来加速对动态约束问题的搜索，以及如何离散化问题以最好地利用这种关系。在这项工作中，我们证明了几何分支定界类型的方法可用于解决固定锚问题，并且该方法和解决方案可以扩展以解决追赶者具有动态约束（包括速度和加速度边界）的动态问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究追捕-逃避问题的策略，特别是在追捕者速度受限的情况下，探讨追捕者与逃避者是否存在必胜策略或游戏平局的条件。
AI.motivation: 探索运动学约束与动力学约束的边界，研究运动学问题的解是否可加速动力学约束问题的求解，并优化离散化方法以利用这种关系。
AI.method: 提出基于几何分支定界法的算法，用于解决静态锚点场景，并将其扩展至包含速度和加速度约束的动力学问题。
AI.result: 开发了针对静态锚点的算法，证明了该方法可扩展至动力学约束场景，并展示了运动学解与动力学问题的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 几何分支定界方法有效解决静态锚点问题，且可通过离散化策略扩展至动力学约束场景，为两类问题的求解提供了桥梁。

authors_text: Zhifu Gao,Shiliang Zhang,Ian McLoughlin,Zhijie Yan
title: Paraformer: Fast and Accurate Parallel Transformer for Non-autoregressive End-to-End Speech Recognition
title_zh: Paraformer：用于非自回归端到端语音识别的快速准确的并行变压器
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, accepted by INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, accepted by INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: Transformers have recently dominated the ASR field. Although able to yield good performance, they involve an autoregressive (AR) decoder to generate tokens one by one, which is computationally inefficient. To speed up inference, non-autoregressive (NAR) methods, e.g. single-step NAR, were designed, to enable parallel generation. However, due to an independence assumption within the output tokens, performance of single-step NAR is inferior to that of AR models, especially with a large-scale corpus. There are two challenges to improving single-step NAR: Firstly to accurately predict the number of output tokens and extract hidden variables; secondly, to enhance modeling of interdependence between output tokens. To tackle both challenges, we propose a fast and accurate parallel transformer, termed Paraformer. This utilizes a continuous integrate-and-fire based predictor to predict the number of tokens and generate hidden variables. A glancing language model (GLM) sampler then generates semantic embeddings to enhance the NAR decoder's ability to model context interdependence. Finally, we design a strategy to generate negative samples for minimum word error rate training to further improve performance. Experiments using the public AISHELL-1, AISHELL-2 benchmark, and an industrial-level 20,000 hour task demonstrate that the proposed Paraformer can attain comparable performance to the state-of-the-art AR transformer, with more than 10x speedup.
summary: Transformers have recently dominated the ASR field. Although able to yield good performance, they involve an autoregressive (AR) decoder to generate tokens one by one, which is computationally inefficient. To speed up inference, non-autoregressive (NAR) methods, e.g. single-step NAR, were designed, to enable parallel generation. However, due to an independence assumption within the output tokens, performance of single-step NAR is inferior to that of AR models, especially with a large-scale corpus. There are two challenges to improving single-step NAR: Firstly to accurately predict the number of output tokens and extract hidden variables; secondly, to enhance modeling of interdependence between output tokens. To tackle both challenges, we propose a fast and accurate parallel transformer, termed Paraformer. This utilizes a continuous integrate-and-fire based predictor to predict the number of tokens and generate hidden variables. A glancing language model (GLM) sampler then generates semantic embeddings to enhance the NAR decoder's ability to model context interdependence. Finally, we design a strategy to generate negative samples for minimum word error rate training to further improve performance. Experiments using the public AISHELL-1, AISHELL-2 benchmark, and an industrial-level 20,000 hour task demonstrate that the proposed Paraformer can attain comparable performance to the state-of-the-art AR transformer, with more than 10x speedup.
abstract_zh: 变形金刚最近在 ASR 领域占据主导地位。虽然能够产生良好的性能，但它们涉及自回归（AR）解码器来一一生成令牌，这在计算上效率低下。为了加快推理速度，可以使用非自回归 (NAR) 方法，例如单步 NAR 的设计是为了实现并行生成。然而，由于输出标记内的独立性假设，单步 NAR 的性能不如 AR 模型，尤其是在大规模语料库的情况下。改进单步 NAR 面临两个挑战：首先是准确预测输出 token 的数量并提取隐藏变量；其次，加强输出令牌之间相互依赖关系的建模。为了应对这两个挑战，我们提出了一种快速且准确的并行变压器，称为 Paraformer。这利用基于连续积分和激发的预测器来预测令牌的数量并生成隐藏变量。然后，扫视语言模型 (GLM) 采样器生成语义嵌入，以增强 NAR 解码器对上下文相互依赖进行建模的能力。最后，我们设计了一种策略来生成负样本以进行最小错误率训练，以进一步提高性能。使用公共 AISHELL-1、AISHELL-2 基准测试和工业级 20,000 小时任务的实验表明，所提出的 Paraformer 可以达到与最先进的 AR 变压器相当的性能，并且加速超过 10 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Paraformer，一种快速且准确的并行Transformer模型，用于非自回归端到端语音识别。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在语音识别领域表现优异，但其自回归解码器生成token的方式计算效率低；非自回归方法虽能并行生成，但因输出token独立性假设导致性能不足，尤其在大规模语料中表现较差。
AI.method: Paraformer采用基于连续积分-触发器的预测器预测输出token数量并生成隐变量，结合窥视语言模型（GLM）采样器生成语义嵌入以增强上下文依赖建模，并设计负样本生成策略优化最小词错误率训练。
AI.result: 在AISHELL-1、AISHELL-2基准测试及20,000小时工业级任务中，Paraformer性能与最先进的自回归Transformer相当，推理速度提升超10倍。
AI.conclusion: Paraformer有效解决了非自回归模型的两大挑战，在保持高性能的同时显著提升了推理效率，为端到端语音识别提供了新方向。

search_text: Paraformer: Fast and Accurate Parallel Transformer for Non-autoregressive End-to-End Speech Recognition Paraformer：用于非自回归端到端语音识别的快速准确的并行变压器 Transformers have recently dominated the ASR field. Although able to yield good performance, they involve an autoregressive (AR) decoder to generate tokens one by one, which is computationally inefficient. This utilizes a continuous integrate-and-fire based predictor to predict the number of tokens and generate hidden variables. A glancing language model (GLM) sampler then generates semantic embeddings to enhance the NAR decoder's ability to model context interdependence. Finally, we design a strategy to generate negative samples for minimum word error rate training to further improve performance. Experiments using the public AISHELL-1, AISHELL-2 benchmark, and an industrial-level 20,000 hour task demonstrate that the proposed Paraformer can attain comparable performance to the state-of-the-art AR transformer, with more than 10x speedup. 变形金刚最近在 ASR 领域占据主导地位。虽然能够产生良好的性能，但它们涉及自回归（AR）解码器来一一生成令牌，这在计算上效率低下。为了加快推理速度，可以使用非自回归 (NAR) 方法，例如单步 NAR 的设计是为了实现并行生成。然而，由于输出标记内的独立性假设，单步 NAR 的性能不如 AR 模型，尤其是在大规模语料库的情况下。改进单步 NAR 面临两个挑战：首先是准确预测输出 token 的数量并提取隐藏变量；其次，加强输出令牌之间相互依赖关系的建模。为了应对这两个挑战，我们提出了一种快速且准确的并行变压器，称为 Paraformer。这利用基于连续积分和激发的预测器来预测令牌的数量并生成隐藏变量。然后，扫视语言模型 (GLM) 采样器生成语义嵌入，以增强 NAR 解码器对上下文相互依赖进行建模的能力。最后，我们设计了一种策略来生成负样本以进行最小错误率训练，以进一步提高性能。使用公共 AISHELL-1、AISHELL-2 基准测试和工业级 20,000 小时任务的实验表明，所提出的 Paraformer 可以达到与最先进的 AR 变压器相当的性能，并且加速超过 10 倍。 本文提出Paraformer，一种快速且准确的并行Transformer模型，用于非自回归端到端语音识别。 Zhifu Gao,Shiliang Zhang,Ian McLoughlin,Zhijie Yan cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Dingcheng Yang,Zihao Xiao,Wenjian Yu
title: Boosting the Adversarial Transferability of Surrogate Models with Dark Knowledge
title_zh: 利用暗知识增强替代模型的对抗性可迁移性
comment: Accepted at 2023 International Conference on Tools with Artificial Intelligence (ICTAI)
comments: Accepted at 2023 International Conference on Tools with Artificial Intelligence (ICTAI)
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial examples. And, the adversarial examples have transferability, which means that an adversarial example for a DNN model can fool another model with a non-trivial probability. This gave birth to the transfer-based attack where the adversarial examples generated by a surrogate model are used to conduct black-box attacks. There are some work on generating the adversarial examples from a given surrogate model with better transferability. However, training a special surrogate model to generate adversarial examples with better transferability is relatively under-explored. This paper proposes a method for training a surrogate model with dark knowledge to boost the transferability of the adversarial examples generated by the surrogate model. This trained surrogate model is named dark surrogate model (DSM). The proposed method for training a DSM consists of two key components: a teacher model extracting dark knowledge, and the mixing augmentation skill enhancing dark knowledge of training data. We conducted extensive experiments to show that the proposed method can substantially improve the adversarial transferability of surrogate models across different architectures of surrogate models and optimizers for generating adversarial examples, and it can be applied to other scenarios of transfer-based attack that contain dark knowledge, like face verification. Our code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/ydc123/Dark_Surrogate_Model}.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to adversarial examples. And, the adversarial examples have transferability, which means that an adversarial example for a DNN model can fool another model with a non-trivial probability. This gave birth to the transfer-based attack where the adversarial examples generated by a surrogate model are used to conduct black-box attacks. There are some work on generating the adversarial examples from a given surrogate model with better transferability. However, training a special surrogate model to generate adversarial examples with better transferability is relatively under-explored. This paper proposes a method for training a surrogate model with dark knowledge to boost the transferability of the adversarial examples generated by the surrogate model. This trained surrogate model is named dark surrogate model (DSM). The proposed method for training a DSM consists of two key components: a teacher model extracting dark knowledge, and the mixing augmentation skill enhancing dark knowledge of training data. We conducted extensive experiments to show that the proposed method can substantially improve the adversarial transferability of surrogate models across different architectures of surrogate models and optimizers for generating adversarial examples, and it can be applied to other scenarios of transfer-based attack that contain dark knowledge, like face verification. Our code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/ydc123/Dark_Surrogate_Model}.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 很容易受到对抗性示例的影响。而且，对抗性示例具有可转移性，这意味着 DNN 模型的对抗性示例可以以不平凡的概率欺骗另一个模型。这就催生了基于转移的攻击，其中代理模型生成的对抗性示例被用来进行黑盒攻击。有一些工作致力于从给定的代理模型生成具有更好可转移性的对抗性示例。然而，训练特殊的代理模型来生成具有更好可迁移性的对抗性示例的探索相对较少。本文提出了一种用暗知识训练代理模型的方法，以提高代理模型生成的对抗性示例的可迁移性。这种经过训练的代理模型被称为暗代理模型（DSM）。所提出的训练 DSM 的方法由两个关键部分组成：提取暗知识的教师模型，以及增强训练数据暗知识的混合增强技能。我们进行了大量的实验，表明所提出的方法可以显着提高代理模型在不同架构的代理模型和生成对抗性示例的优化器之间的对抗性可迁移性，并且可以应用于其他包含暗知识的基于迁移的攻击场景，例如人脸验证。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/ydc123/Dark_Surrogate_Model} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过暗知识训练代理模型以提升对抗样本迁移性的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注生成高迁移性对抗样本的技术，但专门训练具有更好迁移性的代理模型的研究较少，需探索利用暗知识提升代理模型迁移性的新方法。
AI.method: 设计包含教师模型提取暗知识和混合增强技术的训练框架，构建名为DSM的暗代理模型，通过知识蒸馏和数据增强提升迁移性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在不同架构和优化器下显著提升迁移性，且可扩展至人脸识别等其他迁移攻击场景，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 暗代理模型通过有效利用暗知识和数据增强技术，能系统性提升对抗样本迁移性，为黑盒攻击提供新思路。

authors_text: Changan Chen,Carl Schissler,Sanchit Garg,Philip Kobernik,Alexander Clegg,Paul Calamia,Dhruv Batra,Philip W Robinson,Kristen Grauman
title: SoundSpaces 2.0: A Simulation Platform for Visual-Acoustic Learning
title_zh: SoundSpaces 2.0：视声学习模拟平台
comment: Camera-ready version. Website: https://soundspaces.org. Project page: https://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/soundspaces2
comments: Camera-ready version. Website: https://soundspaces.org. Project page: https://vision.cs.utexas.edu/projects/soundspaces2
abstract: We introduce SoundSpaces 2.0, a platform for on-the-fly geometry-based audio rendering for 3D environments. Given a 3D mesh of a real-world environment, SoundSpaces can generate highly realistic acoustics for arbitrary sounds captured from arbitrary microphone locations. Together with existing 3D visual assets, it supports an array of audio-visual research tasks, such as audio-visual navigation, mapping, source localization and separation, and acoustic matching. Compared to existing resources, SoundSpaces 2.0 has the advantages of allowing continuous spatial sampling, generalization to novel environments, and configurable microphone and material properties. To our knowledge, this is the first geometry-based acoustic simulation that offers high fidelity and realism while also being fast enough to use for embodied learning. We showcase the simulator's properties and benchmark its performance against real-world audio measurements. In addition, we demonstrate two downstream tasks -- embodied navigation and far-field automatic speech recognition -- and highlight sim2real performance for the latter. SoundSpaces 2.0 is publicly available to facilitate wider research for perceptual systems that can both see and hear.
summary: We introduce SoundSpaces 2.0, a platform for on-the-fly geometry-based audio rendering for 3D environments. Given a 3D mesh of a real-world environment, SoundSpaces can generate highly realistic acoustics for arbitrary sounds captured from arbitrary microphone locations. Together with existing 3D visual assets, it supports an array of audio-visual research tasks, such as audio-visual navigation, mapping, source localization and separation, and acoustic matching. Compared to existing resources, SoundSpaces 2.0 has the advantages of allowing continuous spatial sampling, generalization to novel environments, and configurable microphone and material properties. To our knowledge, this is the first geometry-based acoustic simulation that offers high fidelity and realism while also being fast enough to use for embodied learning. We showcase the simulator's properties and benchmark its performance against real-world audio measurements. In addition, we demonstrate two downstream tasks -- embodied navigation and far-field automatic speech recognition -- and highlight sim2real performance for the latter. SoundSpaces 2.0 is publicly available to facilitate wider research for perceptual systems that can both see and hear.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 SoundSpaces 2.0，这是一个针对 3D 环境进行基于几何图形的动态音频渲染的平台。给定现实世界环境的 3D 网格，SoundSpaces 可以为从任意麦克风位置捕获的任意声音生成高度逼真的声学效果。与现有的 3D 视觉资产一起，它支持一系列视听研究任务，例如视听导航、映射、源定位和分离以及声学匹配。与现有资源相比，SoundSpaces 2.0 具有允许连续空间采样、泛化到新环境以及可配置麦克风和材料属性的优点。据我们所知，这是第一个基于几何的声学模拟，它提供了高保真度和真实感，同时也足够快，可用于实体学习。我们展示模拟器的属性，并根据真实世界的音频测量对其性能进行基准测试。此外，我们还演示了两个下游任务——实体导航和远场自动语音识别——并重点介绍了后者的 sim2real 性能。 SoundSpaces 2.0 已公开发布，以促进对既能看又能听的感知系统进行更广泛的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SoundSpaces 2.0平台，用于实时生成3D环境中基于几何的高保真声学效果，支持音频视觉研究任务。
AI.motivation: 现有资源在空间采样连续性、环境泛化能力和参数可配置性方面存在不足，需开发更高效且逼真的声学模拟工具。
AI.method: 基于3D网格实时渲染声学效果，结合任意麦克风位置和声音输入，支持与视觉资产协同的音频视觉任务。
AI.result: 平台性能经真实环境音频测量验证，并展示了具身导航和远场语音识别的Sim2Real效果。
AI.conclusion: SoundSpaces 2.0是首个兼顾高保真度与实时性的几何声学模拟器，可推动视听感知系统的联合研究。

authors_text: Kianoush Falahkheirkhah,Saumya Tiwari,Kevin Yeh,Sounak Gupta,Loren Herrera-Hernandez,Michael R. McCarthy,Rafael E. Jimenez,John C. Cheville,Rohit Bhargava
title: Deepfake histological images for enhancing digital pathology
title_zh: 用于增强数字病理学的 Deepfake 组织学图像
abstract: An optical microscopic examination of thinly cut stained tissue on glass slides prepared from a FFPE tissue blocks is the gold standard for tissue diagnostics. In addition, the diagnostic abilities and expertise of any pathologist is dependent on their direct experience with common as well as rarer variant morphologies. Recently, deep learning approaches have been used to successfully show a high level of accuracy for such tasks. However, obtaining expert-level annotated images is an expensive and time-consuming task and artificially synthesized histological images can prove greatly beneficial. Here, we present an approach to not only generate histological images that reproduce the diagnostic morphologic features of common disease but also provide a user ability to generate new and rare morphologies. Our approach involves developing a generative adversarial network model that synthesizes pathology images constrained by class labels. We investigated the ability of this framework in synthesizing realistic prostate and colon tissue images and assessed the utility of these images in augmenting diagnostic ability of machine learning methods as well as their usability by a panel of experienced anatomic pathologists. Synthetic data generated by our framework performed similar to real data in training a deep learning model for diagnosis. Pathologists were not able to distinguish between real and synthetic images and showed a similar level of inter-observer agreement for prostate cancer grading. We extended the approach to significantly more complex images from colon biopsies and showed that the complex microenvironment in such tissues can also be reproduced. Finally, we present the ability for a user to generate deepfake histological images via a simple markup of sematic labels.
summary: An optical microscopic examination of thinly cut stained tissue on glass slides prepared from a FFPE tissue blocks is the gold standard for tissue diagnostics. In addition, the diagnostic abilities and expertise of any pathologist is dependent on their direct experience with common as well as rarer variant morphologies. Recently, deep learning approaches have been used to successfully show a high level of accuracy for such tasks. However, obtaining expert-level annotated images is an expensive and time-consuming task and artificially synthesized histological images can prove greatly beneficial. Here, we present an approach to not only generate histological images that reproduce the diagnostic morphologic features of common disease but also provide a user ability to generate new and rare morphologies. Our approach involves developing a generative adversarial network model that synthesizes pathology images constrained by class labels. We investigated the ability of this framework in synthesizing realistic prostate and colon tissue images and assessed the utility of these images in augmenting diagnostic ability of machine learning methods as well as their usability by a panel of experienced anatomic pathologists. Synthetic data generated by our framework performed similar to real data in training a deep learning model for diagnosis. Pathologists were not able to distinguish between real and synthetic images and showed a similar level of inter-observer agreement for prostate cancer grading. We extended the approach to significantly more complex images from colon biopsies and showed that the complex microenvironment in such tissues can also be reproduced. Finally, we present the ability for a user to generate deepfake histological images via a simple markup of sematic labels.
abstract_zh: 对由 FFPE 组织块制备的载玻片上的薄切染色组织进行光学显微镜检查是组织诊断的金标准。此外，任何病理学家的诊断能力和专业知识都取决于他们对常见和罕见变异形态的直接经验。最近，深度学习方法已被用来成功地展示此类任务的高准确性。然而，获得专家级注释图像是一项昂贵且耗时的任务，而人工合成的组织学图像可以证明非常有益。在这里，我们提出了一种方法，不仅可以生成再现常见疾病的诊断形态学特征的组织学图像，而且还为用户提供生成新的和罕见的形态学的能力。我们的方法涉及开发一个生成对抗网络模型，该模型合成受类别标签约束的病理图像。我们研究了该框架合成真实前列腺和结肠组织图像的能力，并评估了这些图像在增强机器学习方法的诊断能力方面的效用以及一组经验丰富的解剖病理学家的可用性。我们的框架生成的合成数据在训练诊断深度学习模型时与真实数据类似。病理学家无法区分真实图像和合成图像，并且在前列腺癌分级方面显示出相似水平的观察者间一致性。我们将该方法扩展到来自结肠活检的更加复杂的图像，并表明这些组织中复杂的微环境也可以重现。最后，我们为用户提供了通过简单的语义标签标记生成深度伪造组织学图像的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成对抗网络模型，用于生成具有诊断特征的合成组织学图像以增强数字病理学。
AI.motivation: 专家标注的病理图像获取成本高且耗时，合成图像可补充数据不足并模拟罕见病变形态。
AI.method: 开发基于类别标签约束的生成对抗网络，生成前列腺和结肠组织图像，并通过病理学家评估和机器学习模型训练验证效果。
AI.result: 合成图像在深度学习模型训练中表现与真实数据相当，病理学家无法区分真实与合成图像且分级一致性相似。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效生成高质量合成病理图像，为数字病理学提供数据增强和罕见病变模拟的新途径。

authors_text: Abhijith Sharma,Yijun Bian,Phil Munz,Apurva Narayan
title: Adversarial Patch Attacks and Defences in Vision-Based Tasks: A Survey
title_zh: 基于视觉的任务中的对抗性补丁攻击和防御：调查
comment: A. Sharma and Y. Bian share equal contribution
comments: A. Sharma and Y. Bian share equal contribution
abstract: Adversarial attacks in deep learning models, especially for safety-critical systems, are gaining more and more attention in recent years, due to the lack of trust in the security and robustness of AI models. Yet the more primitive adversarial attacks might be physically infeasible or require some resources that are hard to access like the training data, which motivated the emergence of patch attacks. In this survey, we provide a comprehensive overview to cover existing techniques of adversarial patch attacks, aiming to help interested researchers quickly catch up with the progress in this field. We also discuss existing techniques for developing detection and defences against adversarial patches, aiming to help the community better understand this field and its applications in the real world.
summary: Adversarial attacks in deep learning models, especially for safety-critical systems, are gaining more and more attention in recent years, due to the lack of trust in the security and robustness of AI models. Yet the more primitive adversarial attacks might be physically infeasible or require some resources that are hard to access like the training data, which motivated the emergence of patch attacks. In this survey, we provide a comprehensive overview to cover existing techniques of adversarial patch attacks, aiming to help interested researchers quickly catch up with the progress in this field. We also discuss existing techniques for developing detection and defences against adversarial patches, aiming to help the community better understand this field and its applications in the real world.
abstract_zh: 由于人们对人工智能模型的安全性和鲁棒性缺乏信任，深度学习模型中的对抗性攻击，尤其是安全关键系统中的对抗性攻击，近年来越来越受到关注。然而，更原始的对抗性攻击可能在物理上不可行，或者需要一些难以访问的资源（例如训练数据），这促使了补丁攻击的出现。在本次调查中，我们对现有的对抗性补丁攻击技术进行了全面的概述，旨在帮助感兴趣的研究人员快速赶上该领域的进展。我们还讨论了开发对抗性补丁检测和防御的现有技术，旨在帮助社区更好地了解该领域及其在现实世界中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了视觉任务中的对抗性补丁攻击与防御技术，旨在全面总结现有方法并促进该领域研究。
AI.motivation: 由于传统对抗攻击存在物理不可行性或依赖难以获取的资源，补丁攻击作为更实用的攻击方式受到关注，亟需系统性总结其方法与防御策略。
AI.method: 通过分类和比较现有对抗性补丁攻击与防御技术，系统分析其攻击机制、应用场景及防御方法的有效性。
AI.result: 总结了当前对抗性补丁攻击的主要技术路线及防御手段，识别了现有方法的优缺点，并探讨了实际应用中的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性补丁攻击与防御是提升视觉系统安全性的关键，未来需关注更鲁棒的防御机制及跨领域应用。

authors_text: Abhishek Srivastava,Nikhil Kumar Tomar,Ulas Bagci,Debesh Jha
title: Video Capsule Endoscopy Classification using Focal Modulation Guided Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 使用聚焦调制引导卷积神经网络进行视频胶囊内窥镜分类
comment: ef:CBMS 2022
comments: ef:CBMS 2022
abstract: Video capsule endoscopy is a hot topic in computer vision and medicine. Deep learning can have a positive impact on the future of video capsule endoscopy technology. It can improve the anomaly detection rate, reduce physicians' time for screening, and aid in real-world clinical analysis. CADx classification system for video capsule endoscopy has shown a great promise for further improvement. For example, detection of cancerous polyp and bleeding can lead to swift medical response and improve the survival rate of the patients. To this end, an automated CADx system must have high throughput and decent accuracy. In this paper, we propose FocalConvNet, a focal modulation network integrated with lightweight convolutional layers for the classification of small bowel anatomical landmarks and luminal findings. FocalConvNet leverages focal modulation to attain global context and allows global-local spatial interactions throughout the forward pass. Moreover, the convolutional block with its intrinsic inductive/learning bias and capacity to extract hierarchical features allows our FocalConvNet to achieve favourable results with high throughput. We compare our FocalConvNet with other SOTA on Kvasir-Capsule, a large-scale VCE dataset with 44,228 frames with 13 classes of different anomalies. Our proposed method achieves the weighted F1-score, recall and MCC} of 0.6734, 0.6373 and 0.2974, respectively outperforming other SOTA methodologies. Furthermore, we report the highest throughput of 148.02 images/second rate to establish the potential of FocalConvNet in a real-time clinical environment. The code of the proposed FocalConvNet is available at https://github.com/NoviceMAn-prog/FocalConvNet.
summary: Video capsule endoscopy is a hot topic in computer vision and medicine. Deep learning can have a positive impact on the future of video capsule endoscopy technology. It can improve the anomaly detection rate, reduce physicians' time for screening, and aid in real-world clinical analysis. CADx classification system for video capsule endoscopy has shown a great promise for further improvement. For example, detection of cancerous polyp and bleeding can lead to swift medical response and improve the survival rate of the patients. To this end, an automated CADx system must have high throughput and decent accuracy. In this paper, we propose FocalConvNet, a focal modulation network integrated with lightweight convolutional layers for the classification of small bowel anatomical landmarks and luminal findings. FocalConvNet leverages focal modulation to attain global context and allows global-local spatial interactions throughout the forward pass. Moreover, the convolutional block with its intrinsic inductive/learning bias and capacity to extract hierarchical features allows our FocalConvNet to achieve favourable results with high throughput. We compare our FocalConvNet with other SOTA on Kvasir-Capsule, a large-scale VCE dataset with 44,228 frames with 13 classes of different anomalies. Our proposed method achieves the weighted F1-score, recall and MCC} of 0.6734, 0.6373 and 0.2974, respectively outperforming other SOTA methodologies. Furthermore, we report the highest throughput of 148.02 images/second rate to establish the potential of FocalConvNet in a real-time clinical environment. The code of the proposed FocalConvNet is available at https://github.com/NoviceMAn-prog/FocalConvNet.
abstract_zh: 视频胶囊内窥镜检查是计算机视觉和医学领域的热门话题。深度学习可以对视频胶囊内窥镜技术的未来产生积极影响。它可以提高异常检测率，减少医生的筛查时间，并有助于现实世界的临床分析。用于视频胶囊内窥镜的 CADx 分类系统显示出进一步改进的巨大前景。例如，检测癌性息肉和出血可以导致快速的医疗反应并提高患者的生存率。为此，自动化 CADx 系统必须具有高吞吐量和良好的精度。在本文中，我们提出了 FocalConvNet，这是一种与轻量级卷积层集成的焦点调制网络，用于对小肠解剖标志和管腔发现进行分类。 FocalConvNet 利用焦点调制来获取全局上下文，并允许在整个前向传递过程中进行全局-局部空间交互。此外，卷积块具有固有的归纳/学习偏差和提取分层特征的能力，使我们的 FocalConvNet 能够以高吞吐量获得良好的结果。我们将 FocalConvNet 与 Kvasir-Capsule 上的其他 SOTA 进行比较，Kvasir-Capsule 是一个大型 VCE 数据集，包含 44,228 帧，包含 13 类不同异常。我们提出的方法实现了 0.6734、0.6373 和 0.2974 的加权 F1 分数、召回率和 MCC}，分别优于其他 SOTA 方法。此外，我们报告了每秒 148.02 张图像的最高吞吐量，以确定 FocalConvNet 在实时临床环境中的潜力。所提议的 FocalConvNet 的代码可在 https://github.com/NoviceMAn-prog/FocalConvNet 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于焦点调制引导的卷积神经网络（FocalConvNet），用于视频胶囊内镜的分类任务，旨在提高小肠解剖标志和腔内病变的检测效率与准确性。
AI.motivation: 视频胶囊内镜技术需要高效的计算机辅助诊断系统（CADx），以提升异常检测率、减少医生筛查时间，并在临床环境中实现实时处理。现有方法在准确率与吞吐量之间存在平衡难题。
AI.method: 设计FocalConvNet网络，结合焦点调制机制实现全局-局部空间交互，并采用轻量级卷积层提取层次化特征。通过全局上下文建模与高效特征提取模块提升分类性能。
AI.result: 在包含44,228帧的Kvasir-Capsule数据集上，FocalConvNet取得加权F1分数0.6734、召回率0.6373、MCC 0.2974，同时实现148.02帧/秒的吞吐量，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: FocalConvNet在保持高吞吐量的同时提升了分类性能，验证了其在实时临床场景中的应用潜力，且代码已开源。

search_text: Video Capsule Endoscopy Classification using Focal Modulation Guided Convolutional Neural Network 使用聚焦调制引导卷积神经网络进行视频胶囊内窥镜分类 Video capsule endoscopy is a hot topic in computer vision and medicine. Deep learning can have a positive impact on the future of video capsule endoscopy technology. It can improve the anomaly detection rate, reduce physicians' time for screening, and aid in real-world clinical analysis. CADx classification system for video capsule endoscopy has shown a great promise for further improvement. For example, detection of cancerous polyp and bleeding can lead to swift medical response and improve the survival rate of the patients. To this end, an automated CADx system must have high throughput and decent accuracy. In this paper, we propose FocalConvNet, a focal modulation network integrated with lightweight convolutional layers for the classification of small bowel anatomical landmarks and luminal findings. FocalConvNet leverages focal modulation to attain global context and allows global-local spatial interactions throughout the forward pass. Moreover, the convolutional block with its intrinsic inductive/learning bias and capacity to extract hierarchical features allows our FocalConvNet to achieve favourable results with high throughput. We compare our FocalConvNet with other SOTA on Kvasir-Capsule, a large-scale VCE dataset with 44,228 frames with 13 classes of different anomalies. Our proposed method achieves the weighted F1-score, recall and MCC} of 0.6734, 0.6373 and 0.2974, respectively outperforming other SOTA methodologies. Furthermore, we report the highest throughput of 148.02 images/second rate to establish the potential of FocalConvNet in a real-time clinical environment. The code of the proposed FocalConvNet is available at https://github.com/NoviceMAn-prog/FocalConvNet. 视频胶囊内窥镜检查是计算机视觉和医学领域的热门话题。深度学习可以对视频胶囊内窥镜技术的未来产生积极影响。它可以提高异常检测率，减少医生的筛查时间，并有助于现实世界的临床分析。用于视频胶囊内窥镜的 CADx 分类系统显示出进一步改进的巨大前景。例如，检测癌性息肉和出血可以导致快速的医疗反应并提高患者的生存率。为此，自动化 CADx 系统必须具有高吞吐量和良好的精度。在本文中，我们提出了 FocalConvNet，这是一种与轻量级卷积层集成的焦点调制网络，用于对小肠解剖标志和管腔发现进行分类。 FocalConvNet 利用焦点调制来获取全局上下文，并允许在整个前向传递过程中进行全局-局部空间交互。此外，卷积块具有固有的归纳/学习偏差和提取分层特征的能力，使我们的 FocalConvNet 能够以高吞吐量获得良好的结果。我们将 FocalConvNet 与 Kvasir-Capsule 上的其他 SOTA 进行比较，Kvasir-Capsule 是一个大型 VCE 数据集，包含 44,228 帧，包含 13 类不同异常。我们提出的方法实现了 0.6734、0.6373 和 0.2974 的加权 F1 分数、召回率和 MCC}，分别优于其他 SOTA 方法。此外，我们报告了每秒 148.02 张图像的最高吞吐量，以确定 FocalConvNet 在实时临床环境中的潜力。所提议的 FocalConvNet 的代码可在 https://github.com/NoviceMAn-prog/FocalConvNet 上找到。 本文提出一种基于焦点调制引导的卷积神经网络（FocalConvNet），用于视频胶囊内镜的分类任务，旨在提高小肠解剖标志和腔内病变的检测效率与准确性。 Abhishek Srivastava,Nikhil Kumar Tomar,Ulas Bagci,Debesh Jha eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Prateek Verma
title: A Language Model With Million Context Length For Raw Audio
title_zh: 具有百万上下文长度的原始音频语言模型
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure. Technical Report at Stanford University
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure. Technical Report at Stanford University
abstract: Modeling long-term dependencies for audio signals is a particularly challenging problem, as even small-time scales yield on the order of a hundred thousand samples. With the recent advent of Transformers, neural architectures became good at modeling dependencies over longer time scales, but they suffered from quadratic constraints to scale them. We propose a generative auto-regressive architecture that can model audio waveforms over quite a large context, greater than 500,000 samples. Our work is adapted to learn time dependencies by learning a latent representation by a CNN front-end, and then learning dependencies over these representations using Transformer encoders, fully trained end-to-end: thereby allowing to learn representations as it deems fit for the next sample. Unlike previous works that compared different time scales to show improvement, we use a standard dataset, with the same number of parameters/context to show improvements. We achieve a state-of-the-art performance as compared to other approaches such as Wavenet, SaSHMI, and Sample-RNN on a standard dataset for modeling long-term structure. This work gives very exciting direction for the field, given improvements in context modeling that can be scaled with more data, as well as potentially better results by using billions/trillions of parameters.
summary: Modeling long-term dependencies for audio signals is a particularly challenging problem, as even small-time scales yield on the order of a hundred thousand samples. With the recent advent of Transformers, neural architectures became good at modeling dependencies over longer time scales, but they suffered from quadratic constraints to scale them. We propose a generative auto-regressive architecture that can model audio waveforms over quite a large context, greater than 500,000 samples. Our work is adapted to learn time dependencies by learning a latent representation by a CNN front-end, and then learning dependencies over these representations using Transformer encoders, fully trained end-to-end: thereby allowing to learn representations as it deems fit for the next sample. Unlike previous works that compared different time scales to show improvement, we use a standard dataset, with the same number of parameters/context to show improvements. We achieve a state-of-the-art performance as compared to other approaches such as Wavenet, SaSHMI, and Sample-RNN on a standard dataset for modeling long-term structure. This work gives very exciting direction for the field, given improvements in context modeling that can be scaled with more data, as well as potentially better results by using billions/trillions of parameters.
abstract_zh: 对音频信号的长期依赖性进行建模是一个特别具有挑战性的问题，因为即使是小时间尺度也会产生大约十万个样本。随着 Transformers 最近的出现，神经架构变得擅长对较长时间尺度的依赖关系进行建模，但它们在扩展它们时受到二次约束。我们提出了一种生成式自回归架构，可以在相当大的上下文（超过 500,000 个样本）上对音频波形进行建模。我们的工作适合通过 CNN 前端学习潜在表示来学习时间依赖性，然后使用 Transformer 编码器学习这些表示的依赖性，经过完全训练的端到端：从而允许学习它认为适合下一个样本的表示。与之前比较不同时间尺度以显示改进的工作不同，我们使用标准数据集，具有相同数量的参数/上下文来显示改进。与 Wavenet、SaSHMI 和 Sample-RNN 等其他方法相比，我们在用于建模长期结构的标准数据集上实现了最先进的性能。这项工作为该领域提供了非常令人兴奋的方向，因为上下文建模得到了改进，可以使用更多数据进行扩展，并且通过使用数十亿/数万亿个参数可能会获得更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种能够处理超过50万样本上下文长度的音频生成模型，通过结合CNN和Transformer架构解决音频长期依赖建模难题。
AI.motivation: 传统音频模型在处理长时序依赖时面临样本量大、计算复杂度高（如Transformer的二次约束）等挑战，需开发更高效且能扩展的长上下文建模方法。
AI.method: 设计端到端的生成式自回归架构，使用CNN提取音频潜在表示，再通过Transformer编码器学习长期依赖关系，并在标准数据集上保持参数量一致进行公平对比。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上达到优于WaveNet、SaSHMI和Sample-RNN等现有方法的最先进性能，验证了模型在长上下文建模中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为音频长时序建模提供了可扩展方向，未来可通过增加数据量和参数规模（如百亿/万亿级）进一步提升性能。

authors_text: Caio Mucchiani,Zhichao Liu,Ipsita Sahin,Jared Dube,Linh Vu,Elena Kokkoni,Konstantinos Karydis
title: Closed-loop Position Control of a Pediatric Soft Robotic Wearable Device for Upper Extremity Assistance
title_zh: 用于上肢辅助的儿科软机器人可穿戴设备的闭环位置控制
comment: 6 pages
comments: 6 pages
abstract: This work focuses on closed-loop control based on proprioceptive feedback for a pneumatically-actuated soft wearable device aimed at future support of infant reaching tasks. The device comprises two soft pneumatic actuators (one textile-based and one silicone-casted) actively controlling two degrees-of-freedom per arm (shoulder adduction/abduction and elbow flexion/extension, respectively). Inertial measurement units (IMUs) attached to the wearable device provide real-time joint angle feedback. Device kinematics analysis is informed by anthropometric data from infants (arm lengths) reported in the literature. Range of motion and muscle co-activation patterns in infant reaching are considered to derive desired trajectories for the device's end-effector. Then, a proportional-derivative controller is developed to regulate the pressure inside the actuators and in turn move the arm along desired setpoints within the reachable workspace. Experimental results on tracking desired arm trajectories using an engineered mannequin are presented, demonstrating that the proposed controller can help guide the mannequin's wrist to the desired setpoints.
summary: This work focuses on closed-loop control based on proprioceptive feedback for a pneumatically-actuated soft wearable device aimed at future support of infant reaching tasks. The device comprises two soft pneumatic actuators (one textile-based and one silicone-casted) actively controlling two degrees-of-freedom per arm (shoulder adduction/abduction and elbow flexion/extension, respectively). Inertial measurement units (IMUs) attached to the wearable device provide real-time joint angle feedback. Device kinematics analysis is informed by anthropometric data from infants (arm lengths) reported in the literature. Range of motion and muscle co-activation patterns in infant reaching are considered to derive desired trajectories for the device's end-effector. Then, a proportional-derivative controller is developed to regulate the pressure inside the actuators and in turn move the arm along desired setpoints within the reachable workspace. Experimental results on tracking desired arm trajectories using an engineered mannequin are presented, demonstrating that the proposed controller can help guide the mannequin's wrist to the desired setpoints.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的重点是基于气动软可穿戴设备的本体感觉反馈的闭环控制，旨在未来支持婴儿的伸手任务。该设备包括两个软气动执行器（一个基于织物，一个基于硅树脂铸造），可主动控制每个手臂的两个自由度（分别是肩部内收/外展和肘部弯曲/伸展）。连接到可穿戴设备的惯性测量单元 (IMU) 提供实时关节角度反馈。设备运动学分析是根据文献中报告的婴儿（臂长）的人体测量数据进行的。婴儿伸手时的运动范围和肌肉协同激活模式被认为可以得出设备末端执行器的所需轨迹。然后，开发了比例微分控制器来调节执行器内部的压力，进而在可到达的工作空间内沿着所需的设定点移动手臂。提出了使用工程人体模型跟踪所需手臂轨迹的实验结果，表明所提出的控制器可以帮助引导人体模型的手腕达到所需的设定点。

AI.tldr: 开发基于本体感觉反馈的闭环控制方法，用于气动软机器人可穿戴设备，辅助婴儿上肢运动。
AI.motivation: 婴儿上肢运动发育需要精准辅助设备支持，传统刚性机械结构难以适应婴幼儿柔韧特性，需开发柔性闭环控制方案以促进自然运动模式。
AI.method: 采用IMU实时获取关节角度反馈，结合婴儿肢体尺寸数据建立运动学模型，设计PD控制器调节气动执行器压力，通过轨迹跟踪实验验证控制效果。
AI.result: 实验表明控制器可使模拟假人手腕准确跟踪预设轨迹，验证了软体设备在婴儿上肢辅助中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该闭环控制方法为儿科软体外骨骼提供了有效解决方案，为后续临床应用奠定了技术基础。

search_text: Closed-loop Position Control of a Pediatric Soft Robotic Wearable Device for Upper Extremity Assistance 用于上肢辅助的儿科软机器人可穿戴设备的闭环位置控制 This work focuses on closed-loop control based on proprioceptive feedback for a pneumatically-actuated soft wearable device aimed at future support of infant reaching tasks. The device comprises two soft pneumatic actuators (one textile-based and one silicone-casted) actively controlling two degrees-of-freedom per arm (shoulder adduction/abduction and elbow flexion/extension, respectively). Inertial measurement units (IMUs) attached to the wearable device provide real-time joint angle feedback. Device kinematics analysis is informed by anthropometric data from infants (arm lengths) reported in the literature. Range of motion and muscle co-activation patterns in infant reaching are considered to derive desired trajectories for the device's end-effector. Then, a proportional-derivative controller is developed to regulate the pressure inside the actuators and in turn move the arm along desired setpoints within the reachable workspace. Experimental results on tracking desired arm trajectories using an engineered mannequin are presented, demonstrating that the proposed controller can help guide the mannequin's wrist to the desired setpoints. 这项工作的重点是基于气动软可穿戴设备的本体感觉反馈的闭环控制，旨在未来支持婴儿的伸手任务。该设备包括两个软气动执行器（一个基于织物，一个基于硅树脂铸造），可主动控制每个手臂的两个自由度（分别是肩部内收/外展和肘部弯曲/伸展）。连接到可穿戴设备的惯性测量单元 (IMU) 提供实时关节角度反馈。设备运动学分析是根据文献中报告的婴儿（臂长）的人体测量数据进行的。婴儿伸手时的运动范围和肌肉协同激活模式被认为可以得出设备末端执行器的所需轨迹。然后，开发了比例微分控制器来调节执行器内部的压力，进而在可到达的工作空间内沿着所需的设定点移动手臂。提出了使用工程人体模型跟踪所需手臂轨迹的实验结果，表明所提出的控制器可以帮助引导人体模型的手腕达到所需的设定点。 开发基于本体感觉反馈的闭环控制方法，用于气动软机器人可穿戴设备，辅助婴儿上肢运动。 Caio Mucchiani,Zhichao Liu,Ipsita Sahin,Jared Dube,Linh Vu,Elena Kokkoni,Konstantinos Karydis cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Shengsen Wu,Yan Bai,Yihang Lou,Xiongkun Linghu,Jianzhong He,Ling-Yu Duan
title: Switchable Representation Learning Framework with Self-compatibility
title_zh: 具有自兼容性的可切换表示学习框架
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023
abstract: Real-world visual search systems involve deployments on multiple platforms with different computing and storage resources. Deploying a unified model that suits the minimal-constrain platforms leads to limited accuracy. It is expected to deploy models with different capacities adapting to the resource constraints, which requires features extracted by these models to be aligned in the metric space. The method to achieve feature alignments is called ``compatible learning''. Existing research mainly focuses on the one-to-one compatible paradigm, which is limited in learning compatibility among multiple models. We propose a Switchable representation learning Framework with Self-Compatibility (SFSC). SFSC generates a series of compatible sub-models with different capacities through one training process. The optimization of sub-models faces gradients conflict, and we mitigate this problem from the perspective of the magnitude and direction. We adjust the priorities of sub-models dynamically through uncertainty estimation to co-optimize sub-models properly. Besides, the gradients with conflicting directions are projected to avoid mutual interference. SFSC achieves state-of-the-art performance on the evaluated datasets.
summary: Real-world visual search systems involve deployments on multiple platforms with different computing and storage resources. Deploying a unified model that suits the minimal-constrain platforms leads to limited accuracy. It is expected to deploy models with different capacities adapting to the resource constraints, which requires features extracted by these models to be aligned in the metric space. The method to achieve feature alignments is called ``compatible learning''. Existing research mainly focuses on the one-to-one compatible paradigm, which is limited in learning compatibility among multiple models. We propose a Switchable representation learning Framework with Self-Compatibility (SFSC). SFSC generates a series of compatible sub-models with different capacities through one training process. The optimization of sub-models faces gradients conflict, and we mitigate this problem from the perspective of the magnitude and direction. We adjust the priorities of sub-models dynamically through uncertainty estimation to co-optimize sub-models properly. Besides, the gradients with conflicting directions are projected to avoid mutual interference. SFSC achieves state-of-the-art performance on the evaluated datasets.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的视觉搜索系统涉及在具有不同计算和存储资源的多个平台上的部署。部署适合最小约束平台的统一模型会导致准确性有限。期望部署具有不同容量的模型来适应资源限制，这需要这些模型提取的特征在度量空间中对齐。实现特征对齐的方法称为“兼容学习”。现有研究主要集中在一对一兼容范式，其在多个模型之间的学习兼容性方面受到限制。我们提出了一种具有自我兼容性的可切换表示学习框架（SFSC）。 SFSC通过一个训练过程生成一系列具有不同容量的兼容子模型。子模型的优化面临梯度冲突，我们从幅度和方向的角度缓解这个问题。我们通过不确定性估计动态调整子模型的优先级，以适当地共同优化子模型。此外，对方向冲突的梯度进行投影以避免相互干扰。 SFSC 在评估的数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可切换的自兼容表示学习框架（SFSC），用于解决多平台视觉搜索系统中不同容量模型间的特征对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有统一模型在资源受限平台精度不足，且一对一兼容学习难以处理多模型间的兼容性需求。
AI.method: 通过单次训练生成多容量子模型，动态调整子模型优先级并投影冲突梯度以解决训练中的梯度冲突问题。
AI.result: 在评估数据集上达到最先进的性能表现，验证了SFSC框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SFSC框架有效实现了多模型间的自兼容学习，为异构平台部署提供了灵活解决方案。

authors_text: Denis Newman-Griffis,Jessica Sage Rauchberg,Rahaf Alharbi,Louise Hickman,Harry Hochheiser
title: Definition drives design: Disability models and mechanisms of bias in AI technologies
title_zh: 定义驱动设计：人工智能技术中的残疾模型和偏见机制
comment: 38 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Keywords: artificial intelligence; critical disability studies; information and communication technologies; data analytics; data science; fairness, accountability, transparency, and ethics
comments: 38 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Keywords: artificial intelligence; critical disability studies; information and communication technologies; data analytics; data science; fairness, accountability, transparency, and ethics
abstract: The increasing deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) tools to inform decision making across diverse areas including healthcare, employment, social benefits, and government policy, presents a serious risk for disabled people, who have been shown to face bias in AI implementations. While there has been significant work on analysing and mitigating algorithmic bias, the broader mechanisms of how bias emerges in AI applications are not well understood, hampering efforts to address bias where it begins. In this article, we illustrate how bias in AI-assisted decision making can arise from a range of specific design decisions, each of which may seem self-contained and non-biasing when considered separately. These design decisions include basic problem formulation, the data chosen for analysis, the use the AI technology is put to, and operational design elements in addition to the core algorithmic design. We draw on three historical models of disability common to different decision-making settings to demonstrate how differences in the definition of disability can lead to highly distinct decisions on each of these aspects of design, leading in turn to AI technologies with a variety of biases and downstream effects. We further show that the potential harms arising from inappropriate definitions of disability in fundamental design stages are further amplified by a lack of transparency and disabled participation throughout the AI design process. Our analysis provides a framework for critically examining AI technologies in decision-making contexts and guiding the development of a design praxis for disability-related AI analytics. We put forth this article to provide key questions to facilitate disability-led design and participatory development to produce more fair and equitable AI technologies in disability-related contexts.
summary: The increasing deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) tools to inform decision making across diverse areas including healthcare, employment, social benefits, and government policy, presents a serious risk for disabled people, who have been shown to face bias in AI implementations. While there has been significant work on analysing and mitigating algorithmic bias, the broader mechanisms of how bias emerges in AI applications are not well understood, hampering efforts to address bias where it begins. In this article, we illustrate how bias in AI-assisted decision making can arise from a range of specific design decisions, each of which may seem self-contained and non-biasing when considered separately. These design decisions include basic problem formulation, the data chosen for analysis, the use the AI technology is put to, and operational design elements in addition to the core algorithmic design. We draw on three historical models of disability common to different decision-making settings to demonstrate how differences in the definition of disability can lead to highly distinct decisions on each of these aspects of design, leading in turn to AI technologies with a variety of biases and downstream effects. We further show that the potential harms arising from inappropriate definitions of disability in fundamental design stages are further amplified by a lack of transparency and disabled participation throughout the AI design process. Our analysis provides a framework for critically examining AI technologies in decision-making contexts and guiding the development of a design praxis for disability-related AI analytics. We put forth this article to provide key questions to facilitate disability-led design and participatory development to produce more fair and equitable AI technologies in disability-related contexts.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 工具的不断部署为医疗保健、就业、社会福利和政府政策等不同领域的决策提供信息，这给残疾人带来了严重的风险，事实证明，他们在人工智能实施中面临着偏见。尽管在分析和减轻算法偏差方面已经开展了大量工作，但人工智能应用中出现偏差的更广泛机制尚不清楚，这阻碍了从根源上解决偏差的努力。在本文中，我们说明了人工智能辅助决策中的偏差是如何由一系列具体的设计决策产生的，当单独考虑时，每一个设计决策似乎都是独立且无偏见的。这些设计决策包括基本问题的表述、选择用于分析的数据、人工智能技术的使用以及除核心算法设计之外的操作设计元素。我们利用不同决策环境中常见的三种残疾历史模型来展示残疾定义的差异如何导致在设计的每个方面产生高度不同的决策，从而导致人工智能技术具有各种偏见和下游影响。我们进一步表明，由于整个人工智能设计过程中缺乏透明度和残疾人参与，基础设计阶段对残疾的不恰当定义所产生的潜在危害会进一步放大。我们的分析提供了一个框架，用于在决策环境中批判性地检查人工智能技术，并指导残疾相关人工智能分析设计实践的开发。我们提出这篇文章是为了提供关键问题，以促进以残疾为主导的设计和参与式开发，从而在与残疾相关的环境中产生更公平和公正的人工智能技术。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了人工智能（AI）技术中与残疾相关的偏见机制，分析了不同残疾模型如何通过设计决策影响AI系统的公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有算法偏见研究未能解决AI应用中偏见的根本机制，而残疾人群在AI决策中面临系统性风险，需从设计源头进行干预。
AI.method: 通过三种历史残疾模型，分析问题定义、数据选择、应用场景等设计环节如何因残疾定义差异导致偏见，并结合透明度与参与度缺失的影响。
AI.result: 提出了一种批判性分析AI技术的框架，揭示了设计阶段定义偏差的放大效应，并为公平AI开发提供了关键问题指引。
AI.conclusion: 需通过残疾主导的设计实践和参与式开发，结合透明性原则，才能实现更公平的AI技术，减少残疾相关决策中的系统性偏见。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨了人工智能（AI）技术中与残疾相关的偏见机制，分析了不同残疾模型如何通过设计决策影响AI系统的公平性。
