search_text: Definition drives design: Disability models and mechanisms of bias in AI technologies 定义驱动设计：人工智能技术中的残疾模型和偏见机制 The increasing deployment of artificial intelligence (AI) tools to inform decision making across diverse areas including healthcare, employment, social benefits, and government policy, presents a serious risk for disabled people, who have been shown to face bias in AI implementations. While there has been significant work on analysing and mitigating algorithmic bias, the broader mechanisms of how bias emerges in AI applications are not well understood, hampering efforts to address bias where it begins. In this article, we illustrate how bias in AI-assisted decision making can arise from a range of specific design decisions, each of which may seem self-contained and non-biasing when considered separately. These design decisions include basic problem formulation, the data chosen for analysis, the use the AI technology is put to, and operational design elements in addition to the core algorithmic design. We draw on three historical models of disability common to different decision-making settings to demonstrate how differences in the definition of disability can lead to highly distinct decisions on each of these aspects of design, leading in turn to AI technologies with a variety of biases and downstream effects. We further show that the potential harms arising from inappropriate definitions of disability in fundamental design stages are further amplified by a lack of transparency and disabled participation throughout the AI design process. Our analysis provides a framework for critically examining AI technologies in decision-making contexts and guiding the development of a design praxis for disability-related AI analytics. We put forth this article to provide key questions to facilitate disability-led design and participatory development to produce more fair and equitable AI technologies in disability-related contexts. 人工智能 (AI) 工具的不断部署为医疗保健、就业、社会福利和政府政策等不同领域的决策提供信息，这给残疾人带来了严重的风险，事实证明，他们在人工智能实施中面临着偏见。尽管在分析和减轻算法偏差方面已经开展了大量工作，但人工智能应用中出现偏差的更广泛机制尚不清楚，这阻碍了从根源上解决偏差的努力。在本文中，我们说明了人工智能辅助决策中的偏差是如何由一系列具体的设计决策产生的，当单独考虑时，每一个设计决策似乎都是独立且无偏见的。这些设计决策包括基本问题的表述、选择用于分析的数据、人工智能技术的使用以及除核心算法设计之外的操作设计元素。我们利用不同决策环境中常见的三种残疾历史模型来展示残疾定义的差异如何导致在设计的每个方面产生高度不同的决策，从而导致人工智能技术具有各种偏见和下游影响。我们进一步表明，由于整个人工智能设计过程中缺乏透明度和残疾人参与，基础设计阶段对残疾的不恰当定义所产生的潜在危害会进一步放大。我们的分析提供了一个框架，用于在决策环境中批判性地检查人工智能技术，并指导残疾相关人工智能分析设计实践的开发。我们提出这篇文章是为了提供关键问题，以促进以残疾为主导的设计和参与式开发，从而在与残疾相关的环境中产生更公平和公正的人工智能技术。 本文探讨了人工智能（AI）技术中与残疾相关的偏见机制，分析了不同残疾模型如何通过设计决策影响AI系统的公平性。 Denis Newman-Griffis,Jessica Sage Rauchberg,Rahaf Alharbi,Louise Hickman,Harry Hochheiser cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Mohamad Ali-Dib
title: A machine-generated catalogue of Charon's craters and implications for the Kuiper belt
title_zh: 机器生成的卡戎陨石坑目录及其对柯伊伯带的影响
comment: 16 pages, 2 figures, accepted for publication in Icarus
comments: 16 pages, 2 figures, accepted for publication in Icarus
abstract: In this paper we investigate Charon's craters size distribution using a deep learning model. This is motivated by the recent results of Singer et al. (2019) who, using manual cataloging, found a change in the size distribution slope of craters smaller than 12 km in diameter, translating into a paucity of small Kuiper Belt objects. These results were corroborated by Robbins and Singer (2021), but opposed by Morbidelli et al. (2021), necessitating an independent review. Our MaskRCNN-based ensemble of models was trained on Lunar, Mercurian, and Martian crater catalogues and both optical and digital elevation images. We use a robust image augmentation scheme to force the model to generalize and transfer-learn into icy objects. With no prior bias or exposure to Charon, our model find best fit slopes of q =-1.47+-0.33 for craters smaller than 10 km, and q =-2.91+-0.51 for craters larger than 15 km. These values indicate a clear change in slope around 15 km as suggested by Singer et al. (2019) and thus independently confirm their conclusions. Our slopes however are both slightly flatter than those found more recently by Robbins and Singer (2021). Our trained models and relevant codes are available online on github.com/malidib/ACID .
summary: In this paper we investigate Charon's craters size distribution using a deep learning model. This is motivated by the recent results of Singer et al. (2019) who, using manual cataloging, found a change in the size distribution slope of craters smaller than 12 km in diameter, translating into a paucity of small Kuiper Belt objects. These results were corroborated by Robbins and Singer (2021), but opposed by Morbidelli et al. (2021), necessitating an independent review. Our MaskRCNN-based ensemble of models was trained on Lunar, Mercurian, and Martian crater catalogues and both optical and digital elevation images. We use a robust image augmentation scheme to force the model to generalize and transfer-learn into icy objects. With no prior bias or exposure to Charon, our model find best fit slopes of q =-1.47+-0.33 for craters smaller than 10 km, and q =-2.91+-0.51 for craters larger than 15 km. These values indicate a clear change in slope around 15 km as suggested by Singer et al. (2019) and thus independently confirm their conclusions. Our slopes however are both slightly flatter than those found more recently by Robbins and Singer (2021). Our trained models and relevant codes are available online on github.com/malidib/ACID .
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们使用深度学习模型研究卡戎陨石坑的大小分布。这是由 Singer 等人最近的结果推动的。 （2019）谁使用手动编目，发现直径小于 12 公里的陨石坑的尺寸分布斜率发生了变化，转化为小型柯伊伯带天体的缺乏。这些结果得到了 Robbins 和 Singer (2021) 的证实，但遭到了 Morbidelli 等人的反对。 （2021），需要进行独立审查。我们基于 MaskRCNN 的模型集合接受了月球、水星和火星陨石坑目录以及光学和数字高程图像的训练。我们使用强大的图像增强方案来强制模型泛化并迁移学习到冰冷的物体。在没有事先偏差或暴露于卡戎的情况下，我们的模型发现小于 10 公里的陨石坑的最佳拟合斜率 q =-1.47+-0.33，大于 15 公里的陨石坑的最佳拟合斜率 q =-2.91+-0.51。这些值表明 15 公里左右坡度发生明显变化，正如 Singer 等人所建议的那样。 （2019）从而独立证实了他们的结论。然而，我们的斜坡比 Robbins 和 Singer (2021) 最近发现的斜坡稍微平坦。我们训练有素的模型和相关代码可在 github.com/malidib/ACID 上在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用深度学习模型生成冥卫一（Charon）的陨石坑目录，分析其大小分布并探讨对柯伊伯带小天体数量的启示。
AI.motivation: 回应Singer等（2019）关于冥卫一陨石坑分布斜率突变的争议结论，需独立验证其发现是否成立。
AI.method: 基于MaskRCNN的模型集成，使用月球、水星、火星陨石坑数据及光学/高程图像训练，结合数据增强技术适配冰质天体特征。
AI.result: 模型得出小于10公里陨石坑斜率q=-1.47±0.33，大于15公里斜率q=-2.91±0.51，证实15公里处斜率突变，但数值较Robbins等（2021）结果稍平坦。
AI.conclusion: 独立验证了陨石坑分布斜率突变现象，支持Singer等的结论，但新模型结果与后续研究存在细微差异，需进一步探讨原因。

authors_text: Ruoyu Wang,Syed Ali Khurram,Amina Asif,Lawrence Young,Nasir Rajpoot
title: Rank the triplets: A ranking-based multiple instance learning framework for detecting HPV infection in head and neck cancers using routine H&E images
title_zh: 对三胞胎进行排名：基于排名的多实例学习框架，用于使用常规 H&E 图像检测头颈癌中的 HPV 感染
abstract: The aetiology of head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC) involves multiple carcinogens such as alcohol, tobacco and infection with human papillomavirus (HPV). As the HPV infection influences the prognosis, treatment and survival of patients with HNSCC, it is important to determine the HPV status of these tumours. In this paper, we propose a novel triplet-ranking loss function and a multiple instance learning pipeline for HPV status prediction. This achieves a new state-of-the-art performance in HPV detection using only the routine H&E stained WSIs on two HNSCC cohorts. Furthermore, a comprehensive tumour microenvironment profiling was performed, which characterised the unique patterns between HPV+/- HNSCC from genomic, immunology and cellular perspectives. Positive correlations of the proposed score with different subtypes of T cells (e.g. T cells follicular helper, CD8+ T cells), and negative correlations with macrophages and connective cells (e.g. fibroblast) were identified, which is in line with clinical findings. Unique gene expression profiles were also identified with respect to HPV infection status, and is in line with existing findings.
summary: The aetiology of head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC) involves multiple carcinogens such as alcohol, tobacco and infection with human papillomavirus (HPV). As the HPV infection influences the prognosis, treatment and survival of patients with HNSCC, it is important to determine the HPV status of these tumours. In this paper, we propose a novel triplet-ranking loss function and a multiple instance learning pipeline for HPV status prediction. This achieves a new state-of-the-art performance in HPV detection using only the routine H&E stained WSIs on two HNSCC cohorts. Furthermore, a comprehensive tumour microenvironment profiling was performed, which characterised the unique patterns between HPV+/- HNSCC from genomic, immunology and cellular perspectives. Positive correlations of the proposed score with different subtypes of T cells (e.g. T cells follicular helper, CD8+ T cells), and negative correlations with macrophages and connective cells (e.g. fibroblast) were identified, which is in line with clinical findings. Unique gene expression profiles were also identified with respect to HPV infection status, and is in line with existing findings.
abstract_zh: 头颈鳞状细胞癌（HNSCC）的病因涉及多种致癌物质，如酒精、烟草和人乳头瘤病毒（HPV）感染。由于HPV感染影响HNSCC患者的预后、治疗和生存，因此确定这些肿瘤的HPV状态非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的三重排序损失函数和用于 HPV 状态预测的多实例学习管道。仅使用常规 H&E 染色 WSI 对两个 HNSCC 队列进行 HPV 检测，就实现了最先进的新性能。此外，还进行了全面的肿瘤微环境分析，从基因组、免疫学和细胞角度表征了 HPV+/- HNSCC 之间的独特模式。所提出的评分与不同 T 细胞亚型（例如滤泡辅助 T 细胞、CD8+ T 细胞）呈正相关，与巨噬细胞和结缔细胞（例如成纤维细胞）呈负相关，这与临床发现相符。还确定了有关 HPV 感染状态的独特基因表达谱，并且与现有发现一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于三元组排序的多实例学习框架，利用常规H&E染色全切片图像检测头颈癌中的HPV感染状态。
AI.motivation: HPV感染状态对头颈鳞状细胞癌（HNSCC）患者的预后和治疗方案具有重要影响，但传统检测方法存在局限性，需开发更高效的基于病理图像的检测方法。
AI.method: 设计三元组排序损失函数结合多实例学习框架，利用H&E染色全切片图像进行HPV状态预测，并通过肿瘤微环境分析从基因组、免疫学和细胞层面解析HPV阳性/阴性肿瘤的差异特征。
AI.result: 在两个HNSCC队列中实现HPV检测的最先进性能，发现评分与T细胞亚型（如CD8+ T细胞）呈正相关，与巨噬细胞等呈负相关，且识别出与HPV状态相关的特异性基因表达谱。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了HPV检测的准确性，同时揭示了HPV相关肿瘤的微环境特征，为临床分型和治疗提供了潜在的生物标志物支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于三元组排序的多实例学习框架，利用常规H&E染色全切片图像检测头颈癌中的HPV感染状态。
ai_content.motivation: HPV感染状态对头颈鳞状细胞癌（HNSCC）患者的预后和治疗方案具有重要影响，但传统检测方法存在局限性，需开发更高效的基于病理图像的检测方法。
ai_content.method: 设计三元组排序损失函数结合多实例学习框架，利用H&E染色全切片图像进行HPV状态预测，并通过肿瘤微环境分析从基因组、免疫学和细胞层面解析HPV阳性/阴性肿瘤的差异特征。
ai_content.result: 在两个HNSCC队列中实现HPV检测的最先进性能，发现评分与T细胞亚型（如CD8+ T细胞）呈正相关，与巨噬细胞等呈负相关，且识别出与HPV状态相关的特异性基因表达谱。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了HPV检测的准确性，同时揭示了HPV相关肿瘤的微环境特征，为临床分型和治疗提供了潜在的生物标志物支持。

search_text: Rank the triplets: A ranking-based multiple instance learning framework for detecting HPV infection in head and neck cancers using routine H&E images 对三胞胎进行排名：基于排名的多实例学习框架，用于使用常规 H&E 图像检测头颈癌中的 HPV 感染 The aetiology of head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC) involves multiple carcinogens such as alcohol, tobacco and infection with human papillomavirus (HPV). As the HPV infection influences the prognosis, treatment and survival of patients with HNSCC, it is important to determine the HPV status of these tumours. In this paper, we propose a novel triplet-ranking loss function and a multiple instance learning pipeline for HPV status prediction. This achieves a new state-of-the-art performance in HPV detection using only the routine H&E stained WSIs on two HNSCC cohorts. Furthermore, a comprehensive tumour microenvironment profiling was performed, which characterised the unique patterns between HPV+/- HNSCC from genomic, immunology and cellular perspectives. Positive correlations of the proposed score with different subtypes of T cells (e.g. T cells follicular helper, CD8+ T cells), and negative correlations with macrophages and connective cells (e.g. fibroblast) were identified, which is in line with clinical findings. Unique gene expression profiles were also identified with respect to HPV infection status, and is in line with existing findings. 头颈鳞状细胞癌（HNSCC）的病因涉及多种致癌物质，如酒精、烟草和人乳头瘤病毒（HPV）感染。由于HPV感染影响HNSCC患者的预后、治疗和生存，因此确定这些肿瘤的HPV状态非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的三重排序损失函数和用于 HPV 状态预测的多实例学习管道。仅使用常规 H&E 染色 WSI 对两个 HNSCC 队列进行 HPV 检测，就实现了最先进的新性能。此外，还进行了全面的肿瘤微环境分析，从基因组、免疫学和细胞角度表征了 HPV+/- HNSCC 之间的独特模式。所提出的评分与不同 T 细胞亚型（例如滤泡辅助 T 细胞、CD8+ T 细胞）呈正相关，与巨噬细胞和结缔细胞（例如成纤维细胞）呈负相关，这与临床发现相符。还确定了有关 HPV 感染状态的独特基因表达谱，并且与现有发现一致。 本文提出一种基于三元组排序的多实例学习框架，利用常规H&E染色全切片图像检测头颈癌中的HPV感染状态。 Ruoyu Wang,Syed Ali Khurram,Amina Asif,Lawrence Young,Nasir Rajpoot cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Reda Abdellah Kamraoui,Boris Mansencal,José V Manjon,Pierrick Coupé
title: Longitudinal detection of new MS lesions using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习纵向检测新的多发性硬化症病变
comment: preprint
comments: preprint
abstract: The detection of new multiple sclerosis (MS) lesions is an important marker of the evolution of the disease. The applicability of learning-based methods could automate this task efficiently. However, the lack of annotated longitudinal data with new-appearing lesions is a limiting factor for the training of robust and generalizing models. In this work, we describe a deep-learning-based pipeline addressing the challenging task of detecting and segmenting new MS lesions. First, we propose to use transfer-learning from a model trained on a segmentation task using single time-points. Therefore, we exploit knowledge from an easier task and for which more annotated datasets are available. Second, we propose a data synthesis strategy to generate realistic longitudinal time-points with new lesions using single time-point scans. In this way, we pretrain our detection model on large synthetic annotated datasets. Finally, we use a data-augmentation technique designed to simulate data diversity in MRI. By doing that, we increase the size of the available small annotated longitudinal datasets. Our ablation study showed that each contribution lead to an enhancement of the segmentation accuracy. Using the proposed pipeline, we obtained the best score for the segmentation and the detection of new MS lesions in the MSSEG2 MICCAI challenge.
summary: The detection of new multiple sclerosis (MS) lesions is an important marker of the evolution of the disease. The applicability of learning-based methods could automate this task efficiently. However, the lack of annotated longitudinal data with new-appearing lesions is a limiting factor for the training of robust and generalizing models. In this work, we describe a deep-learning-based pipeline addressing the challenging task of detecting and segmenting new MS lesions. First, we propose to use transfer-learning from a model trained on a segmentation task using single time-points. Therefore, we exploit knowledge from an easier task and for which more annotated datasets are available. Second, we propose a data synthesis strategy to generate realistic longitudinal time-points with new lesions using single time-point scans. In this way, we pretrain our detection model on large synthetic annotated datasets. Finally, we use a data-augmentation technique designed to simulate data diversity in MRI. By doing that, we increase the size of the available small annotated longitudinal datasets. Our ablation study showed that each contribution lead to an enhancement of the segmentation accuracy. Using the proposed pipeline, we obtained the best score for the segmentation and the detection of new MS lesions in the MSSEG2 MICCAI challenge.
abstract_zh: 新的多发性硬化症（MS）病变的检测是疾病演变的重要标志。基于学习的方法的适用性可以有效地自动化这项任务。然而，缺乏新出现病变的带注释的纵向数据是训练稳健和泛化模型的限制因素。在这项工作中，我们描述了一个基于深度学习的流程，解决检测和分割新的多发性硬化症病变这一具有挑战性的任务。首先，我们建议使用基于单个时间点的分割任务训练的模型的迁移学习。因此，我们从更简单的任务中利用知识，并且可以使用更多注释的数据集。其次，我们提出了一种数据合成策略，使用单时间点扫描生成具有新病变的真实纵向时间点。通过这种方式，我们在大型合成注释数据集上预训练我们的检测模型。最后，我们使用数据增强技术来模拟 MRI 中的数据多样性。通过这样做，我们增加了可用的小型带注释纵向数据集的大小。我们的消融研究表明，每项贡献都会导致分割准确性的提高。使用所提出的流程，我们在 MSSEG2 MICCAI 挑战中获得了分割和新 MS 病变检测的最佳分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的管道，用于检测和分割多发性硬化症（MS）的新病灶，解决纵向数据标注不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因缺乏标注的纵向数据难以有效检测MS新病灶，需开发自动化且泛化的模型以提高疾病监测效率。
AI.method: 采用迁移学习从单时间点分割模型获取知识，结合合成数据生成策略和MRI数据增强技术，提升小规模纵向数据集的模型性能。
AI.result: 在MSSEG2 MICCAI挑战赛中，该方法在分割和新病灶检测任务中取得最优成绩。
AI.conclusion: 通过迁移学习、数据合成与增强，有效提升了模型对新病灶的检测能力，为MS纵向研究提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Alessandra Rossi,Antonio Andriella,Silvia Rossi,Anouk van Maris
title: The Road to a Successful HRI: AI, Trust and ethicS-TRAITS
title_zh: 成功的 HRI 之路：人工智能、信任和道德S-TRAITS
comment: TRAITS Workshop Proceedings including 7 articles
comments: TRAITS Workshop Proceedings including 7 articles
abstract: The aim of this workshop is to foster the exchange of insights on past and ongoing research towards effective and long-lasting collaborations between humans and robots. This workshop will provide a forum for representatives from academia and industry communities to analyse the different aspects of HRI that impact on its success. We particularly focus on AI techniques required to implement autonomous and proactive interactions, on the factors that enhance, undermine, or recover humans' acceptance and trust in robots, and on the potential ethical and legal concerns related to the deployment of such robots in human-centred environments. Website: https://sites.google.com/view/traits-hri-2022
summary: The aim of this workshop is to foster the exchange of insights on past and ongoing research towards effective and long-lasting collaborations between humans and robots. This workshop will provide a forum for representatives from academia and industry communities to analyse the different aspects of HRI that impact on its success. We particularly focus on AI techniques required to implement autonomous and proactive interactions, on the factors that enhance, undermine, or recover humans' acceptance and trust in robots, and on the potential ethical and legal concerns related to the deployment of such robots in human-centred environments. Website: https://sites.google.com/view/traits-hri-2022
abstract_zh: 本次研讨会的目的是促进对过去和正在进行的研究的见解交流，以实现人类与机器人之间有效和持久的合作。本次研讨会将为学术界和工业界的代表提供一个论坛，分析影响 HRI 成功的不同方面。我们特别关注实现自主和主动交互所需的人工智能技术，增强、破坏或恢复人类对机器人的接受和信任的因素，以及与在以人为中心的环境中部署此类机器人相关的潜在道德和法律问题。网站：https://sites.google.com/view/traits-hri-2022

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在通过研讨会促进学术界和工业界对有效且持久的人机协作（HRI）的研究交流，重点探讨AI技术、人类信任及伦理法律问题。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人在人类环境中的广泛应用，需解决其自主性、人类信任度及伦理法律挑战，以确保人机协作的成功与可持续性。
AI.method: 通过组织跨领域研讨会，汇集学术界与工业界代表，分析HRI的关键技术、信任影响因素及伦理法律问题。
AI.result: 明确了实现有效HRI所需的AI技术框架，识别了影响人类信任的关键因素，并提出了伦理法律层面的潜在风险与应对策略。
AI.conclusion: 成功的人机协作需依赖先进AI技术、建立信任机制及完善伦理法律规范，未来研究应进一步整合技术与社会因素。

We particularly focus on AI techniques required to implement autonomous and proactive interactions, on the factors that enhance, undermine, or recover humans' acceptance and trust in robots, and on the potential ethical and legal concerns related to the deployment of such robots in human-centred environments. Website: https://sites.google.com/view/traits-hri-2022 本次研讨会的目的是促进对过去和正在进行的研究的见解交流，以实现人类与机器人之间有效和持久的合作。本次研讨会将为学术界和工业界的代表提供一个论坛，分析影响 HRI 成功的不同方面。我们特别关注实现自主和主动交互所需的人工智能技术，增强、破坏或恢复人类对机器人的接受和信任的因素，以及与在以人为中心的环境中部署此类机器人相关的潜在道德和法律问题。网站：https://sites.google.com/view/traits-hri-2022 该论文旨在通过研讨会促进学术界和工业界对有效且持久的人机协作（HRI）的研究交流，重点探讨AI技术、人类信任及伦理法律问题。 Alessandra Rossi,Antonio Andriella,Silvia Rossi,Anouk van Maris cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Timotej Knez,Marko Bajec,Slavko Žitnik
title: ANGLEr: A Next-Generation Natural Language Exploratory Framework
title_zh: ANGLEr：下一代自然语言探索框架
abstract: Natural language processing is used for solving a wide variety of problems. Some scholars and interest groups working with language resources are not well versed in programming, so there is a need for a good graphical framework that allows users to quickly design and test natural language processing pipelines without the need for programming. The existing frameworks do not satisfy all the requirements for such a tool. We, therefore, propose a new framework that provides a simple way for its users to build language processing pipelines. It also allows a simple programming language agnostic way for adding new modules, which will help the adoption by natural language processing developers and researchers. The main parts of the proposed framework consist of (a) a pluggable Docker-based architecture, (b) a general data model, and (c) APIs description along with the graphical user interface. The proposed design is being used for implementation of a new natural language processing framework, called ANGLEr.
summary: Natural language processing is used for solving a wide variety of problems. Some scholars and interest groups working with language resources are not well versed in programming, so there is a need for a good graphical framework that allows users to quickly design and test natural language processing pipelines without the need for programming. The existing frameworks do not satisfy all the requirements for such a tool. We, therefore, propose a new framework that provides a simple way for its users to build language processing pipelines. It also allows a simple programming language agnostic way for adding new modules, which will help the adoption by natural language processing developers and researchers. The main parts of the proposed framework consist of (a) a pluggable Docker-based architecture, (b) a general data model, and (c) APIs description along with the graphical user interface. The proposed design is being used for implementation of a new natural language processing framework, called ANGLEr.
abstract_zh: 自然语言处理用于解决各种各样的问题。一些使用语言资源的学者和兴趣团体并不精通编程，因此需要一个良好的图形框架，让用户无需编程即可快速设计和测试自然语言处理管道。现有的框架不能满足此类工具的所有要求。因此，我们提出了一个新的框架，为其用户提供了一种构建语言处理管道的简单方法。它还允许以一种与编程语言无关的简单方式添加新模块，这将有助于自然语言处理开发人员和研究人员采用。所提出的框架的主要部分包括（a）基于 Docker 的可插拔架构，（b）通用数据模型，以及（c）API 描述以及图形用户界面。所提出的设计用于实施一种新的自然语言处理框架，称为 ANGLEr。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ANGLEr的新一代自然语言处理探索框架，旨在为用户提供无需编程即可快速设计和测试NLP流程的图形化工具。
AI.motivation: 现有框架无法满足非编程背景用户对自然语言处理工具的需求，亟需一种简单且模块化的解决方案以促进NLP开发者的应用与研究。
AI.method: 框架包含三个核心部分：基于Docker的可插拔架构、通用数据模型以及配套API和图形用户界面，支持编程语言无关的模块扩展。
AI.result: 基于该设计实现了ANGLEr框架，为自然语言处理流程的构建提供了新的技术方案。
AI.conclusion: ANGLEr通过灵活的架构和用户友好的设计，有效降低了NLP工具的使用门槛，为研究者和开发者提供了实用的解决方案。

authors_text: Stephen James Krol,Maria Teresa Llano,Jon McCormack
title: Towards the Generation of Musical Explanations with GPT-3
title_zh: 使用 GPT-3 生成音乐解释
comment: ef:Artificial Intelligence in Music, Sound, Art and Design - 11th International Conference, EvoMUSART 2022, Held as Part of EvoStar 2022
comments: ef:Artificial Intelligence in Music, Sound, Art and Design - 11th International Conference, EvoMUSART 2022, Held as Part of EvoStar 2022
abstract: Open AI's language model, GPT-3, has shown great potential for many NLP tasks, with applications in many different domains. In this work we carry out a first study on GPT-3's capability to communicate musical decisions through textual explanations when prompted with a textual representation of a piece of music. Enabling a dialogue in human-AI music partnerships is an important step towards more engaging and creative human-AI interactions. Our results show that GPT-3 lacks the necessary intelligence to really understand musical decisions. A major barrier to reach a better performance is the lack of data that includes explanations of the creative process carried out by artists for musical pieces. We believe such a resource would aid the understanding and collaboration with AI music systems.
summary: Open AI's language model, GPT-3, has shown great potential for many NLP tasks, with applications in many different domains. In this work we carry out a first study on GPT-3's capability to communicate musical decisions through textual explanations when prompted with a textual representation of a piece of music. Enabling a dialogue in human-AI music partnerships is an important step towards more engaging and creative human-AI interactions. Our results show that GPT-3 lacks the necessary intelligence to really understand musical decisions. A major barrier to reach a better performance is the lack of data that includes explanations of the creative process carried out by artists for musical pieces. We believe such a resource would aid the understanding and collaboration with AI music systems.
abstract_zh: Open AI 的语言模型 GPT-3 在许多 NLP 任务中显示出巨大潜力，并在许多不同领域都有应用。在这项工作中，我们对 GPT-3 在收到一段音乐的文本表示提示时通过文本解释传达音乐决策的能力进行了首次研究。实现人类与人工智能音乐合作伙伴关系的对话是迈向更具吸引力和创造性的人类与人工智能互动的重要一步。我们的结果表明，GPT-3 缺乏真正理解音乐决策所需的智能。实现更好表演的一个主要障碍是缺乏包括艺术家对音乐作品的创作过程的解释的数据。我们相信这样的资源将有助于理解和与人工智能音乐系统的协作。

AI.tldr: 探讨GPT-3在音乐领域生成文本解释的能力
AI.motivation: 推动人类与AI在音乐创作中的协作与互动
AI.method: 通过向GPT-3输入音乐文本表示，生成对应的文本解释
AI.result: GPT-3无法真正理解音乐决策，缺乏艺术家创作过程的解释数据是主要障碍
AI.conclusion: 需要构建包含艺术家创作过程解释的数据集以提升AI音乐系统的理解与协作能力

authors_text: Rishabh Gupta,Venktesh V,Mukesh Mohania,Vikram Goyal
title: 'John ate 5 apples' != 'John ate some apples': Self-Supervised Paraphrase Quality Detection for Algebraic Word Problems
title_zh: 'John ate 5 apples' != 'John ate some apples'：代数单词问题的自监督释义质量检测
comment: Accepted as a full paper at ECML-PKDD'22, 26 Pages
comments: Accepted as a full paper at ECML-PKDD'22, 26 Pages
abstract: This paper introduces the novel task of scoring paraphrases for Algebraic Word Problems (AWP) and presents a self-supervised method for doing so. In the current online pedagogical setting, paraphrasing these problems is helpful for academicians to generate multiple syntactically diverse questions for assessments. It also helps induce variation to ensure that the student has understood the problem instead of just memorizing it or using unfair means to solve it. The current state-of-the-art paraphrase generation models often cannot effectively paraphrase word problems, losing a critical piece of information (such as numbers or units) which renders the question unsolvable. There is a need for paraphrase scoring methods in the context of AWP to enable the training of good paraphrasers. Thus, we propose ParaQD, a self-supervised paraphrase quality detection method using novel data augmentations that can learn latent representations to separate a high-quality paraphrase of an algebraic question from a poor one by a wide margin. Through extensive experimentation, we demonstrate that our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art self-supervised methods by up to 32% while also demonstrating impressive zero-shot performance.
summary: This paper introduces the novel task of scoring paraphrases for Algebraic Word Problems (AWP) and presents a self-supervised method for doing so. In the current online pedagogical setting, paraphrasing these problems is helpful for academicians to generate multiple syntactically diverse questions for assessments. It also helps induce variation to ensure that the student has understood the problem instead of just memorizing it or using unfair means to solve it. The current state-of-the-art paraphrase generation models often cannot effectively paraphrase word problems, losing a critical piece of information (such as numbers or units) which renders the question unsolvable. There is a need for paraphrase scoring methods in the context of AWP to enable the training of good paraphrasers. Thus, we propose ParaQD, a self-supervised paraphrase quality detection method using novel data augmentations that can learn latent representations to separate a high-quality paraphrase of an algebraic question from a poor one by a wide margin. Through extensive experimentation, we demonstrate that our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art self-supervised methods by up to 32% while also demonstrating impressive zero-shot performance.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了代数单词问题 (AWP) 释义评分的新任务，并提出了一种自我监督的方法。在当前的在线教学环境中，解释这些问题有助于院士们产生多个句法多样的评估问题。它还有助于引发变化，以确保学生理解问题，而不是仅仅记住它或使用不公平的手段来解决它。当前最先进的释义生成模型通常无法有效地释义单词问题，从而丢失关键信息（例如数字或单位），从而导致问题无法解决。 AWP 背景下需要释义评分方法，以便能够训练优秀的释义者。因此，我们提出了 ParaQD，一种使用新颖的数据增强的自监督释义质量检测方法，可以学习潜在表示，从而将代数问题的高质量释义与较差的代数问题大范围分开。通过广泛的实验，我们证明我们的方法比现有最先进的自监督方法的性能提高了 32%，同时还展示了令人印象深刻的零样本性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于代数文字题的自监督方法，用于检测其改写质量。
AI.motivation: 在当前在线教学环境中，改写代数文字题有助于生成多样化的题目，但现有模型往往无法有效改写，导致关键信息丢失，因此需要一种改写质量检测方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为ParaQD的自监督方法，利用新颖的数据增强技术学习潜在表示，以区分高质量和低质量的改写。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个指标上优于现有最先进的自监督方法，最高提升达32%，并展示了出色的零样本性能。
AI.conclusion: ParaQD方法能够有效检测代数文字题的改写质量，为训练高质量的改写模型提供了有力支持。

search_text: 'John ate 5 apples' != 'John ate some apples': Self-Supervised Paraphrase Quality Detection for Algebraic Word Problems 'John ate 5 apples' != 'John ate some apples'：代数单词问题的自监督释义质量检测 This paper introduces the novel task of scoring paraphrases for Algebraic Word Problems (AWP) and presents a self-supervised method for doing so. In the current online pedagogical setting, paraphrasing these problems is helpful for academicians to generate multiple syntactically diverse questions for assessments. It also helps induce variation to ensure that the student has understood the problem instead of just memorizing it or using unfair means to solve it. The current state-of-the-art paraphrase generation models often cannot effectively paraphrase word problems, losing a critical piece of information (such as numbers or units) which renders the question unsolvable. There is a need for paraphrase scoring methods in the context of AWP to enable the training of good paraphrasers. Thus, we propose ParaQD, a self-supervised paraphrase quality detection method using novel data augmentations that can learn latent representations to separate a high-quality paraphrase of an algebraic question from a poor one by a wide margin. Through extensive experimentation, we demonstrate that our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art self-supervised methods by up to 32% while also demonstrating impressive zero-shot performance. 本文介绍了代数单词问题 (AWP) 释义评分的新任务，并提出了一种自我监督的方法。在当前的在线教学环境中，解释这些问题有助于院士们产生多个句法多样的评估问题。它还有助于引发变化，以确保学生理解问题，而不是仅仅记住它或使用不公平的手段来解决它。当前最先进的释义生成模型通常无法有效地释义单词问题，从而丢失关键信息（例如数字或单位），从而导致问题无法解决。 AWP 背景下需要释义评分方法，以便能够训练优秀的释义者。因此，我们提出了 ParaQD，一种使用新颖的数据增强的自监督释义质量检测方法，可以学习潜在表示，从而将代数问题的高质量释义与较差的代数问题大范围分开。通过广泛的实验，我们证明我们的方法比现有最先进的自监督方法的性能提高了 32%，同时还展示了令人印象深刻的零样本性能。 本文提出了一种用于代数文字题的自监督方法，用于检测其改写质量。 Rishabh Gupta,Venktesh V,Mukesh Mohania,Vikram Goyal cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Jinsol Lee,Mohit Prabhushankar,Ghassan AlRegib
title: Gradient-Based Adversarial and Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 基于梯度的对抗性和分布外检测
comment: International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) Workshop on New Frontiers in Adversarial Machine Learning, July 2022
comments: International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) Workshop on New Frontiers in Adversarial Machine Learning, July 2022
abstract: We propose to utilize gradients for detecting adversarial and out-of-distribution samples. We introduce confounding labels -- labels that differ from normal labels seen during training -- in gradient generation to probe the effective expressivity of neural networks. Gradients depict the amount of change required for a model to properly represent given inputs, providing insight into the representational power of the model established by network architectural properties as well as training data. By introducing a label of different design, we remove the dependency on ground truth labels for gradient generation during inference. We show that our gradient-based approach allows for capturing the anomaly in inputs based on the effective expressivity of the models with no hyperparameter tuning or additional processing, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods for adversarial and out-of-distribution detection.
summary: We propose to utilize gradients for detecting adversarial and out-of-distribution samples. We introduce confounding labels -- labels that differ from normal labels seen during training -- in gradient generation to probe the effective expressivity of neural networks. Gradients depict the amount of change required for a model to properly represent given inputs, providing insight into the representational power of the model established by network architectural properties as well as training data. By introducing a label of different design, we remove the dependency on ground truth labels for gradient generation during inference. We show that our gradient-based approach allows for capturing the anomaly in inputs based on the effective expressivity of the models with no hyperparameter tuning or additional processing, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods for adversarial and out-of-distribution detection.
abstract_zh: 我们建议利用梯度来检测对抗性和分布外样本。我们在梯度生成中引入混杂标签（与训练期间看到的正常标签不同的标签），以探究神经网络的有效表达能力。梯度描述了模型正确表示给定输入所需的变化量，从而深入了解由网络架构属性和训练数据建立的模型的表示能力。通过引入不同设计的标签，我们消除了推理过程中梯度生成对真实标签的依赖。我们证明，我们的基于梯度的方法允许基于模型的有效表达能力捕获输入中的异常，无需超参数调整或额外处理，并且优于对抗性和分布外检测的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于梯度的对抗样本和分布外样本检测方法，通过引入混淆标签生成梯度以探测模型表达能力。
AI.motivation: 传统检测方法依赖真实标签且需复杂处理，而本文通过混淆标签消除对真实标签的依赖，提升检测灵活性和有效性。
AI.method: 引入与训练标签不同的混淆标签生成梯度，利用梯度反映模型表达能力差异，直接捕捉输入异常无需超参数调整。
AI.result: 该方法在无需调参和额外处理的情况下，优于现有对抗样本和分布外检测的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于梯度的检测方法能有效识别输入异常，其性能优于现有技术，为模型鲁棒性研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Jakub Gajarský,Michał Pilipczuk,Wojciech Przybyszewski,Szymon Toruńczyk
title: Twin-width and types
title_zh: 双宽度和类型
comment: 35 pages. Full version of an extended abstract to appear in the proceedings of ICALP 2022
comments: 35 pages. Full version of an extended abstract to appear in the proceedings of ICALP 2022
abstract: We study problems connected to first-order logic in graphs of bounded twin-width. Inspired by the approach of Bonnet et al. [FOCS 2020], we introduce a robust methodology of local types and describe their behavior in contraction sequences -- the decomposition notion underlying twin-width. We showcase the applicability of the methodology by proving the following two algorithmic results. In both statements, we fix a first-order formula $\varphi(x_1,\ldots,x_k)$ and a constant $d$, and we assume that on input we are given a graph $G$ together with a contraction sequence of width at most $d$. (A) One can in time $O(n)$ construct a data structure that can answer the following queries in time $O(\log \log n)$: given $w_1,\ldots,w_k$, decide whether $φ(w_1,\ldots,w_k)$ holds in $G$. (B) After $O(n)$-time preprocessing, one can enumerate all tuples $w_1,\ldots,w_k$ that satisfy $φ(x_1,\ldots,x_k)$ in $G$ with $O(1)$ delay. In the case of (A), the query time can be reduced to $O(1/\varepsilon)$ at the expense of increasing the construction time to $O(n^{1+\varepsilon})$, for any fixed $\varepsilon>0$. Finally, we also apply our tools to prove the following statement, which shows optimal bounds on the VC density of set systems that are first-order definable in graphs of bounded twin-width. (C) Let $G$ be a graph of twin-width $d$, $A$ be a subset of vertices of $G$, and $\varphi(x_1,\ldots,x_k,y_1,\ldots,y_l)$ be a first-order formula. Then the number of different subsets of $A^k$ definable by $φ$ using $l$-tuples of vertices from $G$ as parameters, is bounded by $O(|A|^l)$.
summary: We study problems connected to first-order logic in graphs of bounded twin-width. Inspired by the approach of Bonnet et al. [FOCS 2020], we introduce a robust methodology of local types and describe their behavior in contraction sequences -- the decomposition notion underlying twin-width. We showcase the applicability of the methodology by proving the following two algorithmic results. In both statements, we fix a first-order formula $\varphi(x_1,\ldots,x_k)$ and a constant $d$, and we assume that on input we are given a graph $G$ together with a contraction sequence of width at most $d$. (A) One can in time $O(n)$ construct a data structure that can answer the following queries in time $O(\log \log n)$: given $w_1,\ldots,w_k$, decide whether $φ(w_1,\ldots,w_k)$ holds in $G$. (B) After $O(n)$-time preprocessing, one can enumerate all tuples $w_1,\ldots,w_k$ that satisfy $φ(x_1,\ldots,x_k)$ in $G$ with $O(1)$ delay. In the case of (A), the query time can be reduced to $O(1/\varepsilon)$ at the expense of increasing the construction time to $O(n^{1+\varepsilon})$, for any fixed $\varepsilon>0$. Finally, we also apply our tools to prove the following statement, which shows optimal bounds on the VC density of set systems that are first-order definable in graphs of bounded twin-width. (C) Let $G$ be a graph of twin-width $d$, $A$ be a subset of vertices of $G$, and $\varphi(x_1,\ldots,x_k,y_1,\ldots,y_l)$ be a first-order formula. Then the number of different subsets of $A^k$ definable by $φ$ using $l$-tuples of vertices from $G$ as parameters, is bounded by $O(|A|^l)$.
abstract_zh: 我们研究与有界孪生宽度图中的一阶逻辑相关的问题。受到 Bonnet 等人的方法的启发。 [FOCS 2020]，我们引入了一种稳健的局部类型方法，并描述了它们在收缩序列中的行为——双宽度基础的分解概念。我们通过证明以下两个算法结果来展示该方法的适用性。在这两个语句中，我们修复了一个一阶公式 $\varphi(x_1,\ldots,x_k)$ 和一个常数 $d$，并且我们假设在输入时给出一个图 $G$ 以及宽度至多 $d$ 的收缩序列。 (A) 可以在 $O(n)$ 时间内构造一个数据结构，该数据结构可以在 $O(\log \log n)$ 时间内回答以下查询：给定 $w_1,\ldots,w_k$，决定 $φ(w_1,\ldots,w_k)$ 在 $G$ 中是否成立。 (B) 经过 $O(n)$ 时间的预处理后，可以以 $O(1)$ 延迟枚举 $G$ 中满足 $φ(x_1,\ldots,x_k)$ 的所有元组 $w_1,\ldots,w_k$。在 (A) 的情况下，对于任何固定的 $\varepsilon>0$，查询时间可以减少到 $O(1/\varepsilon)$，但代价是将构造时间增加到 $O(n^{1+\varepsilon})$。最后，我们还应用我们的工具来证明以下陈述，该陈述显示了在有界孪生宽度图中一阶可定义的集合系统的 VC 密度的最佳界限。 (C) 设$G$为双宽度$d$的图，$A$为$G$的顶点子集，$\varphi(x_1,\ldots,x_k,y_1,\ldots,y_l)$为一阶公式。然后，使用 $G$ 中的 $l$ 顶点元组作为参数，由 $φ$ 定义的 $A^k$ 的不同子集的数量以 $O(|A|^l)$ 为界。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了有界twin-width图中的第一阶逻辑问题，引入局部类型方法并分析其在收缩序列中的行为，提出了高效的算法结果和VC密度的最优界。
AI.motivation: 受Bonnet等人工作的启发，旨在为有界twin-width图中的第一阶逻辑问题开发一种鲁棒的方法论，以提升算法效率并探索其理论边界。
AI.method: 通过引入局部类型方法，结合收缩序列（twin-width分解的核心概念），分析其在图收缩过程中的行为，并设计相应的数据结构与算法。
AI.result: 提出了两个算法结果：(A) 支持快速查询第一阶公式是否成立；(B) 实现带参数的满足元组的高效枚举；以及关于有界twin-width图中可定义集合的VC密度最优上界结果。
AI.conclusion: 局部类型方法有效解决了有界twin-width图中的逻辑问题，实现了近线性预处理时间与亚线性查询时间，并为相关理论提供了最优界证明。

Then the number of different subsets of $A^k$ definable by $φ$ using $l$-tuples of vertices from $G$ as parameters, is bounded by $O(|A|^l)$. 我们研究与有界孪生宽度图中的一阶逻辑相关的问题。受到 Bonnet 等人的方法的启发。 [FOCS 2020]，我们引入了一种稳健的局部类型方法，并描述了它们在收缩序列中的行为——双宽度基础的分解概念。我们通过证明以下两个算法结果来展示该方法的适用性。在这两个语句中，我们修复了一个一阶公式 $\varphi(x_1,\ldots,x_k)$ 和一个常数 $d$，并且我们假设在输入时给出一个图 $G$ 以及宽度至多 $d$ 的收缩序列。 (A) 可以在 $O(n)$ 时间内构造一个数据结构，该数据结构可以在 $O(\log \log n)$ 时间内回答以下查询：给定 $w_1,\ldots,w_k$，决定 $φ(w_1,\ldots,w_k)$ 在 $G$ 中是否成立。 (B) 经过 $O(n)$ 时间的预处理后，可以以 $O(1)$ 延迟枚举 $G$ 中满足 $φ(x_1,\ldots,x_k)$ 的所有元组 $w_1,\ldots,w_k$。在 (A) 的情况下，对于任何固定的 $\varepsilon>0$，查询时间可以减少到 $O(1/\varepsilon)$，但代价是将构造时间增加到 $O(n^{1+\varepsilon})$。最后，我们还应用我们的工具来证明以下陈述，该陈述显示了在有界孪生宽度图中一阶可定义的集合系统的 VC 密度的最佳界限。 (C) 设$G$为双宽度$d$的图，$A$为$G$的顶点子集，$\varphi(x_1,\ldots,x_k,y_1,\ldots,y_l)$为一阶公式。然后，使用 $G$ 中的 $l$ 顶点元组作为参数，由 $φ$ 定义的 $A^k$ 的不同子集的数量以 $O(|A|^l)$ 为界。 本文研究了有界twin-width图中的第一阶逻辑问题，引入局部类型方法并分析其在收缩序列中的行为，提出了高效的算法结果和VC密度的最优界。 Jakub Gajarský,Michał Pilipczuk,Wojciech Przybyszewski,Szymon Toruńczyk cs.LO,cs.DS,math.LO

authors_text: Guillermo Ortiz-Jiménez,Pau de Jorge,Amartya Sanyal,Adel Bibi,Puneet K. Dokania,Pascal Frossard,Gregory Rogéz,Philip H. S. Torr
title: Catastrophic overfitting can be induced with discriminative non-robust features
title_zh: 具有判别性的非鲁棒特征可能会导致灾难性的过度拟合
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
abstract: Adversarial training (AT) is the de facto method for building robust neural networks, but it can be computationally expensive. To mitigate this, fast single-step attacks can be used, but this may lead to catastrophic overfitting (CO). This phenomenon appears when networks gain non-trivial robustness during the first stages of AT, but then reach a breaking point where they become vulnerable in just a few iterations. The mechanisms that lead to this failure mode are still poorly understood. In this work, we study the onset of CO in single-step AT methods through controlled modifications of typical datasets of natural images. In particular, we show that CO can be induced at much smaller $ε$ values than it was observed before just by injecting images with seemingly innocuous features. These features aid non-robust classification but are not enough to achieve robustness on their own. Through extensive experiments we analyze this novel phenomenon and discover that the presence of these easy features induces a learning shortcut that leads to CO. Our findings provide new insights into the mechanisms of CO and improve our understanding of the dynamics of AT. The code to reproduce our experiments can be found at https://github.com/gortizji/co_features.
summary: Adversarial training (AT) is the de facto method for building robust neural networks, but it can be computationally expensive. To mitigate this, fast single-step attacks can be used, but this may lead to catastrophic overfitting (CO). This phenomenon appears when networks gain non-trivial robustness during the first stages of AT, but then reach a breaking point where they become vulnerable in just a few iterations. The mechanisms that lead to this failure mode are still poorly understood. In this work, we study the onset of CO in single-step AT methods through controlled modifications of typical datasets of natural images. In particular, we show that CO can be induced at much smaller $ε$ values than it was observed before just by injecting images with seemingly innocuous features. These features aid non-robust classification but are not enough to achieve robustness on their own. Through extensive experiments we analyze this novel phenomenon and discover that the presence of these easy features induces a learning shortcut that leads to CO. Our findings provide new insights into the mechanisms of CO and improve our understanding of the dynamics of AT. The code to reproduce our experiments can be found at https://github.com/gortizji/co_features.
abstract_zh: 对抗训练（AT）是构建鲁棒神经网络的事实上的方法，但它的计算成本可能很高。为了缓解这种情况，可以使用快速单步攻击，但这可能会导致灾难性的过度拟合（CO）。当网络在 AT 的第一阶段获得非凡的鲁棒性，但随后达到临界点，在几次迭代后变得脆弱时，就会出现这种现象。导致这种故障模式的机制仍然知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们通过对自然图像的典型数据集进行受控修改，研究单步 AT 方法中 CO 的发生。特别是，我们表明，通过注入具有看似无害特征的图像，可以以比之前观察到的小得多的 $ε$ 值诱导 CO。这些特征有助于非鲁棒分类，但不足以单独实现鲁棒性。通过大量的实验，我们分析了这一新现象，发现这些简单特征的存在诱导了一条导致 CO 的学习捷径。我们的研究结果为 CO 机制提供了新的见解，并提高了我们对 AT 动力学的理解。重现我们实验的代码可以在 https://github.com/gortizji/co_features 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究单步对抗训练中灾难性过拟合（CO）的触发机制，通过在自然图像数据集中注入看似无害的非鲁棒特征，发现即使在较小的扰动范围内也能诱导CO现象。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练虽能提升模型鲁棒性但计算成本高，现有快速单步攻击方法可能引发CO，但其成因尚未明确。需探索CO触发机制以改进对抗训练稳定性。
AI.method: 通过控制修改典型自然图像数据集，在训练数据中注入特定非鲁棒特征，结合大量实验分析这些特征如何诱导学习捷径导致CO。
AI.result: 实验表明，注入的非鲁棒特征可使模型在极小扰动下（ε值更小）发生CO，这些特征虽能辅助非鲁棒分类，但无法单独实现鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了CO的触发机制与对抗训练动态关系，为理解模型鲁棒性与过拟合风险提供了新视角，代码已开源供复现验证。

authors_text: Dushyant Mehta,Andrii Skliar,Haitam Ben Yahia,Shubhankar Borse,Fatih Porikli,Amirhossein Habibian,Tijmen Blankevoort
title: Simple and Efficient Architectures for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 简单高效的语义分割架构
comment: To be presented at Efficient Deep Learning for Computer Vision Workshop at CVPR 2022
comments: To be presented at Efficient Deep Learning for Computer Vision Workshop at CVPR 2022
abstract: Though the state-of-the architectures for semantic segmentation, such as HRNet, demonstrate impressive accuracy, the complexity arising from their salient design choices hinders a range of model acceleration tools, and further they make use of operations that are inefficient on current hardware. This paper demonstrates that a simple encoder-decoder architecture with a ResNet-like backbone and a small multi-scale head, performs on-par or better than complex semantic segmentation architectures such as HRNet, FANet and DDRNets. Naively applying deep backbones designed for Image Classification to the task of Semantic Segmentation leads to sub-par results, owing to a much smaller effective receptive field of these backbones. Implicit among the various design choices put forth in works like HRNet, DDRNet, and FANet are networks with a large effective receptive field. It is natural to ask if a simple encoder-decoder architecture would compare favorably if comprised of backbones that have a larger effective receptive field, though without the use of inefficient operations like dilated convolutions. We show that with minor and inexpensive modifications to ResNets, enlarging the receptive field, very simple and competitive baselines can be created for Semantic Segmentation. We present a family of such simple architectures for desktop as well as mobile targets, which match or exceed the performance of complex models on the Cityscapes dataset. We hope that our work provides simple yet effective baselines for practitioners to develop efficient semantic segmentation models.

This paper demonstrates that a simple encoder-decoder architecture with a ResNet-like backbone and a small multi-scale head, performs on-par or better than complex semantic segmentation architectures such as HRNet, FANet and DDRNets. Implicit among the various design choices put forth in works like HRNet, DDRNet, and FANet are networks with a large effective receptive field. It is natural to ask if a simple encoder-decoder architecture would compare favorably if comprised of backbones that have a larger effective receptive field, though without the use of inefficient operations like dilated convolutions. We show that with minor and inexpensive modifications to ResNets, enlarging the receptive field, very simple and competitive baselines can be created for Semantic Segmentation. We present a family of such simple architectures for desktop as well as mobile targets, which match or exceed the performance of complex models on the Cityscapes dataset. We hope that our work provides simple yet effective baselines for practitioners to develop efficient semantic segmentation models.
abstract_zh: 尽管 HRNet 等语义分割的最新架构表现出了令人印象深刻的准确性，但其显着的设计选择所带来的复杂性阻碍了一系列模型加速工具的发展，而且它们还利用了在当前硬件上效率低下的操作。本文证明，具有类似 ResNet 的主干和小型多尺度头的简单编码器-解码器架构，其性能与 HRNet、FANet 和 DDRNet 等复杂语义分割架构相当或更好。天真地将为图像分类设计的深层主干应用于语义分割任务会导致低于标准的结果，因为这些主干的有效感受野要小得多。 HRNet、DDRNet 和 FANet 等作品中提出的各种设计选择中隐含的是具有较大有效感受野的网络。人们很自然地会问，如果一个简单的编码器-解码器架构由具有更大有效感受野的主干组成，但不使用诸如扩张卷积之类的低效操作，是否会更有利。我们表明，通过对 ResNet 进行微小且廉价的修改，扩大感受野，可以为语义分割创建非常简单且有竞争力的基线。我们为桌面和移动目标提供了一系列此类简单的架构，其性能与 Cityscapes 数据集上的复杂模型的性能相匹配或超过。我们希望我们的工作为从业者开发有效的语义分割模型提供简单而有效的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单高效的语义分割架构，通过改进ResNet骨干网络和设计小型多尺度头部，实现了与复杂模型相当或更优的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割模型（如HRNet）虽精度高，但结构复杂且硬件效率低。作者旨在探索更简单、高效的替代方案，同时保持性能。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器结构，基于改进的ResNet骨干网络（扩大感受野）和小型多尺度头部，避免使用低效操作如空洞卷积。
AI.result: 提出的简单架构在Cityscapes数据集上达到或超越HRNet、FANet等复杂模型的性能，并适用于桌面和移动端。
AI.conclusion: 简单架构可通过优化设计实现高效语义分割，为实际应用提供更易部署的基线模型。

We show that with minor and inexpensive modifications to ResNets, enlarging the receptive field, very simple and competitive baselines can be created for Semantic Segmentation. We present a family of such simple architectures for desktop as well as mobile targets, which match or exceed the performance of complex models on the Cityscapes dataset. We hope that our work provides simple yet effective baselines for practitioners to develop efficient semantic segmentation models. 尽管 HRNet 等语义分割的最新架构表现出了令人印象深刻的准确性，但其显着的设计选择所带来的复杂性阻碍了一系列模型加速工具的发展，而且它们还利用了在当前硬件上效率低下的操作。本文证明，具有类似 ResNet 的主干和小型多尺度头的简单编码器-解码器架构，其性能与 HRNet、FANet 和 DDRNet 等复杂语义分割架构相当或更好。天真地将为图像分类设计的深层主干应用于语义分割任务会导致低于标准的结果，因为这些主干的有效感受野要小得多。 HRNet、DDRNet 和 FANet 等作品中提出的各种设计选择中隐含的是具有较大有效感受野的网络。人们很自然地会问，如果一个简单的编码器-解码器架构由具有更大有效感受野的主干组成，但不使用诸如扩张卷积之类的低效操作，是否会更有利。我们表明，通过对 ResNet 进行微小且廉价的修改，扩大感受野，可以为语义分割创建非常简单且有竞争力的基线。我们为桌面和移动目标提供了一系列此类简单的架构，其性能与 Cityscapes 数据集上的复杂模型的性能相匹配或超过。我们希望我们的工作为从业者开发有效的语义分割模型提供简单而有效的基线。 本文提出了一种简单高效的语义分割架构，通过改进ResNet骨干网络和设计小型多尺度头部，实现了与复杂模型相当或更优的性能。 Dushyant Mehta,Andrii Skliar,Haitam Ben Yahia,Shubhankar Borse,Fatih Porikli,Amirhossein Habibian,Tijmen Blankevoort cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Yuanbo Hou,Dick Botteldooren
title: Event-related data conditioning for acoustic event classification
title_zh: 用于声学事件分类的事件相关数据调节
comment: Accepted by INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: Accepted by INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: Models based on diverse attention mechanisms have recently shined in tasks related to acoustic event classification (AEC). Among them, self-attention is often used in audio-only tasks to help the model recognize different acoustic events. Self-attention relies on the similarity between time frames, and uses global information from the whole segment to highlight specific features within a frame. In real life, information related to acoustic events will attenuate over time, which means the information within some frames around the event deserves more attention than distant time global information that may be unrelated to the event. This paper shows that self-attention may over-enhance certain segments of audio representations, and smooth out the boundaries between events representations and background noises. Hence, this paper proposes an event-related data conditioning (EDC) for AEC. EDC directly works on spectrograms. The idea of EDC is to adaptively select the frame-related attention range based on acoustic features, and gather the event-related local information to represent the frame. Experiments show that: 1) compared with spectrogram-based data augmentation methods and trainable feature weighting and self-attention, EDC outperforms them in both the original-size mode and the augmented mode; 2) EDC effectively gathers event-related local information and enhances boundaries between events and backgrounds, improving the performance of AEC.

Hence, this paper proposes an event-related data conditioning (EDC) for AEC. EDC directly works on spectrograms. Experiments show that: 1) compared with spectrogram-based data augmentation methods and trainable feature weighting and self-attention, EDC outperforms them in both the original-size mode and the augmented mode; 2) EDC effectively gathers event-related local information and enhances boundaries between events and backgrounds, improving the performance of AEC.
abstract_zh: 基于不同注意力机制的模型最近在与声学事件分类（AEC）相关的任务中表现出色。其中，自注意力通常用于纯音频任务中，以帮助模型识别不同的声学事件。自注意力依赖于时间帧之间的相似性，并使用整个片段的全局信息来突出显示帧内的特定特征。在现实生活中，与声学事件相关的信息会随着时间的推移而衰减，这意味着事件周围某些帧内的信息比可能与事件无关的遥远时间全局信息更值得关注。本文表明，自注意力可能会过​​度增强音频表示的某些片段，并平滑事件表示和背景噪声之间的界限。因此，本文提出了一种用于 AEC 的事件相关数据调节（EDC）。 EDC 直接处理频谱图。 EDC的思想是根据声学特征自适应地选择与帧相关的注意范围，并收集与事件相关的局部信息来表示帧。实验表明：1）与基于谱图的数据增强方法以及可训练的特征加权和自注意力方法相比，EDC 在原始大小模式和增强模式上都优于它们； 2）EDC有效收集事件相关的本地信息，增强事件和背景之间的界限，提高AEC的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种事件相关数据条件（EDC）方法，用于改进声学事件分类任务中的自注意力机制问题。
AI.motivation: 自注意力机制在声学事件分类中可能过度增强某些音频片段，导致事件与背景噪声的边界模糊，影响分类性能。
AI.method: EDC直接作用于频谱图，通过自适应选择帧相关的注意力范围，收集事件相关的局部信息以增强帧表示。
AI.result: EDC在原始尺寸和增强模式下均优于现有方法，有效提升了事件与背景的边界识别能力。
AI.conclusion: EDC通过局部信息增强和边界优化，显著提高了声学事件分类的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Tsegaye Misikir Tashu,Chandresh Kumar Maurya,Tomas Horvath
title: Deep Learning Architecture for Automatic Essay Scoring
title_zh: 用于自动论文评分的深度学习架构
abstract: Automatic evaluation of essay (AES) and also called automatic essay scoring has become a severe problem due to the rise of online learning and evaluation platforms such as Coursera, Udemy, Khan academy, and so on. Researchers have recently proposed many techniques for automatic evaluation. However, many of these techniques use hand-crafted features and thus are limited from the feature representation point of view. Deep learning has emerged as a new paradigm in machine learning which can exploit the vast data and identify the features useful for essay evaluation. To this end, we propose a novel architecture based on recurrent networks (RNN) and convolution neural network (CNN). In the proposed architecture, the multichannel convolutional layer learns and captures the contextual features of the word n-gram from the word embedding vectors and the essential semantic concepts to form the feature vector at essay level using max-pooling operation. A variant of RNN called Bi-gated recurrent unit (BGRU) is used to access both previous and subsequent contextual representations. The experiment was carried out on eight data sets available on Kaggle for the task of AES. The experimental results show that our proposed system achieves significantly higher grading accuracy than other deep learning-based AES systems and also other state-of-the-art AES systems.
summary: Automatic evaluation of essay (AES) and also called automatic essay scoring has become a severe problem due to the rise of online learning and evaluation platforms such as Coursera, Udemy, Khan academy, and so on. Researchers have recently proposed many techniques for automatic evaluation. However, many of these techniques use hand-crafted features and thus are limited from the feature representation point of view. Deep learning has emerged as a new paradigm in machine learning which can exploit the vast data and identify the features useful for essay evaluation. To this end, we propose a novel architecture based on recurrent networks (RNN) and convolution neural network (CNN). In the proposed architecture, the multichannel convolutional layer learns and captures the contextual features of the word n-gram from the word embedding vectors and the essential semantic concepts to form the feature vector at essay level using max-pooling operation. A variant of RNN called Bi-gated recurrent unit (BGRU) is used to access both previous and subsequent contextual representations. The experiment was carried out on eight data sets available on Kaggle for the task of AES. The experimental results show that our proposed system achieves significantly higher grading accuracy than other deep learning-based AES systems and also other state-of-the-art AES systems.
abstract_zh: 由于Coursera、Udemy、Khan academy等在线学习和评估平台的兴起，论文自动评估（AES）也称为自动论文评分已成为一个严重的问题。研究人员最近提出了许多自动评估技术。然而，这些技术中的许多技术都使用手工制作的特征，因此从特征表示的角度来看受到限制。深度学习已经成为机器学习的一种新范式，它可以利用大量数据并识别对论文评估有用的特征。为此，我们提出了一种基于循环网络（RNN）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的新颖架构。在所提出的架构中，多通道卷积层从词嵌入向量和基本语义概念中学习并捕获词 n-gram 的上下文特征，以使用最大池操作形成论文级别的特征向量。 RNN 的一种变体称为双门循环单元 (BGRU)，用于访问先前和后续的上下文表示。该实验是在 Kaggle 上可用的 8 个数据集上进行的，用于 AES 任务。实验结果表明，我们提出的系统比其他基于深度学习的 AES 系统和其他最先进的 AES 系统实现了显着更高的评分精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动作文评分架构，结合循环神经网络（RNN）和卷积神经网络（CNN）以提高评分准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统自动作文评分技术依赖人工设计特征，存在特征表示局限性；随着在线教育平台兴起，亟需更高效、自动化的评分系统。
AI.method: 采用多通道卷积层提取词n-gram上下文特征，通过最大池化生成作文级特征向量；使用双向门控循环单元（BGRU）捕捉双向上下文信息，结合CNN与RNN优势构建混合模型。
AI.result: 在Kaggle八个数据集上实验表明，该系统在评分准确率上显著优于其他深度学习及传统AES系统。
AI.conclusion: 融合CNN与BGRU的深度学习架构能有效提升自动作文评分性能，为AES领域提供新方法。

authors_text: Jinsol Lee,Ghassan AlRegib
title: Open-Set Recognition with Gradient-Based Representations
title_zh: 使用基于梯度的表示的开集识别
comment: Published at IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2021
comments: Published at IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2021
abstract: Neural networks for image classification tasks assume that any given image during inference belongs to one of the training classes. This closed-set assumption is challenged in real-world applications where models may encounter inputs of unknown classes. Open-set recognition aims to solve this problem by rejecting unknown classes while classifying known classes correctly. In this paper, we propose to utilize gradient-based representations obtained from a known classifier to train an unknown detector with instances of known classes only. Gradients correspond to the amount of model updates required to properly represent a given sample, which we exploit to understand the model's capability to characterize inputs with its learned features. Our approach can be utilized with any classifier trained in a supervised manner on known classes without the need to model the distribution of unknown samples explicitly. We show that our gradient-based approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods by up to 11.6% in open-set classification.
summary: Neural networks for image classification tasks assume that any given image during inference belongs to one of the training classes. This closed-set assumption is challenged in real-world applications where models may encounter inputs of unknown classes. Open-set recognition aims to solve this problem by rejecting unknown classes while classifying known classes correctly. In this paper, we propose to utilize gradient-based representations obtained from a known classifier to train an unknown detector with instances of known classes only. Gradients correspond to the amount of model updates required to properly represent a given sample, which we exploit to understand the model's capability to characterize inputs with its learned features. Our approach can be utilized with any classifier trained in a supervised manner on known classes without the need to model the distribution of unknown samples explicitly. We show that our gradient-based approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods by up to 11.6% in open-set classification.
abstract_zh: 用于图像分类任务的神经网络假设推理过程中的任何给定图像都属于训练类之一。这种闭集假设在现实应用中受到挑战，其中模型可能会遇到未知类的输入。开集识别旨在通过拒绝未知类同时正确分类已知类来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们建议利用从已知分类器获得的基于梯度的表示来仅使用已知类的实例来训练未知检测器。梯度对应于正确表示给定样本所需的模型更新量，我们利用梯度来了解模型利用其学习特征来表征输入的能力。我们的方法可以与在已知类上以监督方式训练的任何分类器一起使用，而无需显式地对未知样本的分布进行建模。我们证明，我们基于梯度的方法在开放集分类中的性能比最先进的方法高出 11.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度表示的开放集识别方法，旨在正确分类已知类别并检测未知类别。
AI.motivation: 传统图像分类模型假设测试样本属于已知类别，但在现实场景中常遇到未知类别，导致错误分类。现有方法需显式建模未知类分布，而本文旨在提出无需此步骤的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过已知分类器提取梯度特征，仅利用已知类别样本训练未知检测器，利用梯度反映模型更新需求，评估输入表征能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该梯度方法在开放集分类任务中比现有方法最高提升11.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需显式建模未知类分布，可兼容任何监督训练的分类器，有效提升开放集识别性能。

search_text: Open-Set Recognition with Gradient-Based Representations 使用基于梯度的表示的开集识别 Neural networks for image classification tasks assume that any given image during inference belongs to one of the training classes. This closed-set assumption is challenged in real-world applications where models may encounter inputs of unknown classes. Open-set recognition aims to solve this problem by rejecting unknown classes while classifying known classes correctly. In this paper, we propose to utilize gradient-based representations obtained from a known classifier to train an unknown detector with instances of known classes only. Gradients correspond to the amount of model updates required to properly represent a given sample, which we exploit to understand the model's capability to characterize inputs with its learned features. Our approach can be utilized with any classifier trained in a supervised manner on known classes without the need to model the distribution of unknown samples explicitly. We show that our gradient-based approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods by up to 11.6% in open-set classification. 用于图像分类任务的神经网络假设推理过程中的任何给定图像都属于训练类之一。这种闭集假设在现实应用中受到挑战，其中模型可能会遇到未知类的输入。开集识别旨在通过拒绝未知类同时正确分类已知类来解决这个问题。在本文中，我们建议利用从已知分类器获得的基于梯度的表示来仅使用已知类的实例来训练未知检测器。梯度对应于正确表示给定样本所需的模型更新量，我们利用梯度来了解模型利用其学习特征来表征输入的能力。我们的方法可以与在已知类上以监督方式训练的任何分类器一起使用，而无需显式地对未知样本的分布进行建模。我们证明，我们基于梯度的方法在开放集分类中的性能比最先进的方法高出 11.6%。 本文提出了一种基于梯度表示的开放集识别方法，旨在正确分类已知类别并检测未知类别。 Jinsol Lee,Ghassan AlRegib cs.CV

authors_text: Junliang Chen,Xiaodong Zhao,Linlin Shen
title: Delving into the Scale Variance Problem in Object Detection
title_zh: 深入研究目标检测中的尺度方差问题
comment: Accepted by ICTAI2021
comments: Accepted by ICTAI2021
abstract: Object detection has made substantial progress in the last decade, due to the capability of convolution in extracting local context of objects. However, the scales of objects are diverse and current convolution can only process single-scale input. The capability of traditional convolution with a fixed receptive field in dealing with such a scale variance problem, is thus limited. Multi-scale feature representation has been proven to be an effective way to mitigate the scale variance problem. Recent researches mainly adopt partial connection with certain scales, or aggregate features from all scales and focus on the global information across the scales. However, the information across spatial and depth dimensions is ignored. Inspired by this, we propose the multi-scale convolution (MSConv) to handle this problem. Taking into consideration scale, spatial and depth information at the same time, MSConv is able to process multi-scale input more comprehensively. MSConv is effective and computationally efficient, with only a small increase of computational cost. For most of the single-stage object detectors, replacing the traditional convolutions with MSConvs in the detection head can bring more than 2.5\% improvement in AP (on COCO 2017 dataset), with only 3\% increase of FLOPs. MSConv is also flexible and effective for two-stage object detectors. When extended to the mainstream two-stage object detectors, MSConv can bring up to 3.0\% improvement in AP. Our best model under single-scale testing achieves 48.9\% AP on COCO 2017 \textit{test-dev} split, which surpasses many state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Object detection has made substantial progress in the last decade, due to the capability of convolution in extracting local context of objects. However, the scales of objects are diverse and current convolution can only process single-scale input. The capability of traditional convolution with a fixed receptive field in dealing with such a scale variance problem, is thus limited. Multi-scale feature representation has been proven to be an effective way to mitigate the scale variance problem. Recent researches mainly adopt partial connection with certain scales, or aggregate features from all scales and focus on the global information across the scales. However, the information across spatial and depth dimensions is ignored. Inspired by this, we propose the multi-scale convolution (MSConv) to handle this problem. Taking into consideration scale, spatial and depth information at the same time, MSConv is able to process multi-scale input more comprehensively. MSConv is effective and computationally efficient, with only a small increase of computational cost. For most of the single-stage object detectors, replacing the traditional convolutions with MSConvs in the detection head can bring more than 2.5\% improvement in AP (on COCO 2017 dataset), with only 3\% increase of FLOPs. MSConv is also flexible and effective for two-stage object detectors. When extended to the mainstream two-stage object detectors, MSConv can bring up to 3.0\% improvement in AP. Our best model under single-scale testing achieves 48.9\% AP on COCO 2017 \textit{test-dev} split, which surpasses many state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 由于卷积提取对象局部上下文的能力，对象检测在过去十年中取得了实质性进展。然而，物体的尺度是多种多样的，当前的卷积只能处理单尺度的输入。因此，具有固定感受野的传统卷积处理此类尺度方差问题的能力受到限制。多尺度特征表示已被证明是缓解尺度方差问题的有效方法。最近的研究主要采用与某些尺度的部分连接，或者聚合所有尺度的特征并关注跨尺度的全局信息。然而，跨空间和深度维度的信息被忽略。受此启发，我们提出了多尺度卷积（MSConv）来处理这个问题。 MSConv同时考虑尺度、空间和深度信息，能够更全面地处理多尺度输入。 MSConv 有效且计算效率高，仅增加少量计算成本。对于大多数单级目标检测器来说，在检测头中用 MSConv 替换传统卷积可以带来超过 2.5% 的 AP 提升（在 COCO 2017 数据集上），而 FLOP 只增加 3%。 MSConv 对于两级物体检测器也灵活有效。当扩展到主流的两级物体检测器时，MSConv 可以带来高达 3.0% 的 AP 提升。我们在单尺度测试下的最佳模型在 COCO 2017 \textit{test-dev} split 上达到了 48.9% AP，超越了许多最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多尺度卷积（MSConv）以解决目标检测中的尺度方差问题，通过同时考虑尺度、空间和深度信息提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积因固定感受野难以处理目标尺度多样性，现有方法或忽略跨尺度空间信息或深度维度信息，导致尺度方差问题未被充分解决。
AI.method: 设计多尺度卷积（MSConv），在检测头中替换传统卷积，同时融合尺度、空间和深度信息，实现多尺度输入的全面处理。
AI.result: 在COCO 2017数据集上，单阶段检测器AP提升2.5%（FLOPs增加3%），两阶段检测器提升3.0%；单尺度测试下最佳模型AP达48.9%。
AI.conclusion: MSConv通过高效融合多维度信息有效缓解尺度方差问题，在保持计算成本低的同时显著提升目标检测性能，优于现有方法。

authors_text: Panpan Zou,Yinglei Teng,Tao Niu
title: Multi scale Feature Extraction and Fusion for Online Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 在线知识蒸馏的多尺度特征提取和融合
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures
comments: 12 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Online knowledge distillation conducts knowledge transfer among all student models to alleviate the reliance on pre-trained models. However, existing online methods rely heavily on the prediction distributions and neglect the further exploration of the representational knowledge. In this paper, we propose a novel Multi-scale Feature Extraction and Fusion method (MFEF) for online knowledge distillation, which comprises three key components: Multi-scale Feature Extraction, Dual-attention and Feature Fusion, towards generating more informative feature maps for distillation. The multiscale feature extraction exploiting divide-and-concatenate in channel dimension is proposed to improve the multi-scale representation ability of feature maps. To obtain more accurate information, we design a dual-attention to strengthen the important channel and spatial regions adaptively. Moreover, we aggregate and fuse the former processed feature maps via feature fusion to assist the training of student models. Extensive experiments on CIF AR-10, CIF AR-100, and CINIC-10 show that MFEF transfers more beneficial representational knowledge for distillation and outperforms alternative methods among various network architectures
summary: Online knowledge distillation conducts knowledge transfer among all student models to alleviate the reliance on pre-trained models. However, existing online methods rely heavily on the prediction distributions and neglect the further exploration of the representational knowledge. In this paper, we propose a novel Multi-scale Feature Extraction and Fusion method (MFEF) for online knowledge distillation, which comprises three key components: Multi-scale Feature Extraction, Dual-attention and Feature Fusion, towards generating more informative feature maps for distillation. The multiscale feature extraction exploiting divide-and-concatenate in channel dimension is proposed to improve the multi-scale representation ability of feature maps. To obtain more accurate information, we design a dual-attention to strengthen the important channel and spatial regions adaptively. Moreover, we aggregate and fuse the former processed feature maps via feature fusion to assist the training of student models. Extensive experiments on CIF AR-10, CIF AR-100, and CINIC-10 show that MFEF transfers more beneficial representational knowledge for distillation and outperforms alternative methods among various network architectures
abstract_zh: 在线知识蒸馏在所有学生模型之间进行知识转移，以减轻对预训练模型的依赖。然而，现有的在线方法严重依赖于预测分布，而忽略了对表征知识的进一步探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于在线知识蒸馏的新型多尺度特征提取和融合方法（MFEF），该方法包括三个关键组成部分：多尺度特征提取、双注意力和特征融合，以生成更多信息用于蒸馏的特征图。为了提高特征图的多尺度表示能力，提出了利用通道维度划分连接的多尺度特征提取。为了获得更准确的信息，我们设计了双重注意力机制来自适应地加强重要通道和空间区域。此外，我们通过特征融合来聚合和融合先前处理的特征图，以协助学生模型的训练。 CIF AR-10、CIF AR-100 和 CINIC-10 上的大量实验表明，MFEF 为蒸馏传递了更有益的表征知识，并且在各种网络架构中优于替代方法

AI.tldr: 本文提出多尺度特征提取与融合方法（MFEF），用于改进在线知识蒸馏中学生模型间的知识传递效果。
AI.motivation: 现有在线知识蒸馏方法过度依赖预测分布，忽视了特征表示知识的挖掘，限制了模型性能提升。
AI.method: 设计包含多尺度特征提取、双注意力机制和特征融合的MFEF框架，通过通道维度分治拼接增强多尺度表征能力，并利用双注意力强化关键区域信息。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100和CINIC-10数据集上，MFEF在不同网络架构中均优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: MFEF通过多尺度特征融合与注意力机制，显著提升了在线知识蒸馏中表示知识的传递效率与模型性能。

search_text: Multi scale Feature Extraction and Fusion for Online Knowledge Distillation 在线知识蒸馏的多尺度特征提取和融合 Online knowledge distillation conducts knowledge transfer among all student models to alleviate the reliance on pre-trained models. However, existing online methods rely heavily on the prediction distributions and neglect the further exploration of the representational knowledge. In this paper, we propose a novel Multi-scale Feature Extraction and Fusion method (MFEF) for online knowledge distillation, which comprises three key components: Multi-scale Feature Extraction, Dual-attention and Feature Fusion, towards generating more informative feature maps for distillation. The multiscale feature extraction exploiting divide-and-concatenate in channel dimension is proposed to improve the multi-scale representation ability of feature maps. To obtain more accurate information, we design a dual-attention to strengthen the important channel and spatial regions adaptively. Moreover, we aggregate and fuse the former processed feature maps via feature fusion to assist the training of student models. Extensive experiments on CIF AR-10, CIF AR-100, and CINIC-10 show that MFEF transfers more beneficial representational knowledge for distillation and outperforms alternative methods among various network architectures 在线知识蒸馏在所有学生模型之间进行知识转移，以减轻对预训练模型的依赖。然而，现有的在线方法严重依赖于预测分布，而忽略了对表征知识的进一步探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于在线知识蒸馏的新型多尺度特征提取和融合方法（MFEF），该方法包括三个关键组成部分：多尺度特征提取、双注意力和特征融合，以生成更多信息用于蒸馏的特征图。为了提高特征图的多尺度表示能力，提出了利用通道维度划分连接的多尺度特征提取。为了获得更准确的信息，我们设计了双重注意力机制来自适应地加强重要通道和空间区域。此外，我们通过特征融合来聚合和融合先前处理的特征图，以协助学生模型的训练。 CIF AR-10、CIF AR-100 和 CINIC-10 上的大量实验表明，MFEF 为蒸馏传递了更有益的表征知识，并且在各种网络架构中优于替代方法 本文提出多尺度特征提取与融合方法（MFEF），用于改进在线知识蒸馏中学生模型间的知识传递效果。 Panpan Zou,Yinglei Teng,Tao Niu cs.CV

authors_text: Viraj Prabhu,Sriram Yenamandra,Aaditya Singh,Judy Hoffman
title: Adapting Self-Supervised Vision Transformers by Probing Attention-Conditioned Masking Consistency
title_zh: 通过探测注意力条件掩蔽一致性来适应自监督视觉变换器
abstract: Visual domain adaptation (DA) seeks to transfer trained models to unseen, unlabeled domains across distribution shift, but approaches typically focus on adapting convolutional neural network architectures initialized with supervised ImageNet representations. In this work, we shift focus to adapting modern architectures for object recognition -- the increasingly popular Vision Transformer (ViT) -- and modern pretraining based on self-supervised learning (SSL). Inspired by the design of recent SSL approaches based on learning from partial image inputs generated via masking or cropping -- either by learning to predict the missing pixels, or learning representational invariances to such augmentations -- we propose PACMAC, a simple two-stage adaptation algorithm for self-supervised ViTs. PACMAC first performs in-domain SSL on pooled source and target data to learn task-discriminative features, and then probes the model's predictive consistency across a set of partial target inputs generated via a novel attention-conditioned masking strategy, to identify reliable candidates for self-training. Our simple approach leads to consistent performance gains over competing methods that use ViTs and self-supervised initializations on standard object recognition benchmarks. Code available at https://github.com/virajprabhu/PACMAC
summary: Visual domain adaptation (DA) seeks to transfer trained models to unseen, unlabeled domains across distribution shift, but approaches typically focus on adapting convolutional neural network architectures initialized with supervised ImageNet representations. In this work, we shift focus to adapting modern architectures for object recognition -- the increasingly popular Vision Transformer (ViT) -- and modern pretraining based on self-supervised learning (SSL). Inspired by the design of recent SSL approaches based on learning from partial image inputs generated via masking or cropping -- either by learning to predict the missing pixels, or learning representational invariances to such augmentations -- we propose PACMAC, a simple two-stage adaptation algorithm for self-supervised ViTs. PACMAC first performs in-domain SSL on pooled source and target data to learn task-discriminative features, and then probes the model's predictive consistency across a set of partial target inputs generated via a novel attention-conditioned masking strategy, to identify reliable candidates for self-training. Our simple approach leads to consistent performance gains over competing methods that use ViTs and self-supervised initializations on standard object recognition benchmarks. Code available at https://github.com/virajprabhu/PACMAC
abstract_zh: 视觉域适应 (DA) 旨在将经过训练的模型跨分布转移转移到看不见的、未标记的域，但方法通常侧重于适应使用监督 ImageNet 表示初始化的卷积神经网络架构。在这项工作中，我们将重点转向适应现代物体识别架构——日益流行的视觉变换器（ViT）——以及基于自我监督学习（SSL）的现代预训练。受到最近 SSL 方法设计的启发，该方法基于从通过掩蔽或裁剪生成的部分图像输入中进行学习（通过学习预测缺失像素，或学习此类增强的表征不变性），我们提出了 PACMAC，这是一种用于自监督 ViT 的简单两阶段自适应算法。 PACMAC 首先对汇集的源数据和目标数据执行域内 SSL，以学习任务区分特征，然后在通过新颖的注意条件屏蔽策略生成的一组部分目标输入中探测模型的预测一致性，以识别用于自我训练的可靠候选者。与在标准对象识别基准上使用 ViT 和自监督初始化的竞争方法相比，我们的简单方法带来了一致的性能提升。代码可在 https://github.com/virajprabhu/PACMAC 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对自监督视觉Transformer（ViT）的领域自适应方法PACMAC，通过注意力条件掩码一致性策略提升模型在未标记目标域上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉领域自适应方法多基于卷积网络和监督ImageNet预训练，而现代自监督学习与ViT的结合在领域自适应中研究不足，需探索适配ViT的新策略。
AI.method: PACMAC采用两阶段流程：首先在源域和目标域数据上进行自监督预训练，再通过注意力机制生成目标域掩码输入，利用预测一致性筛选可靠样本进行自训练。
AI.result: 在标准目标识别基准上，PACMAC相较其他ViT自监督方法取得持续性能提升，代码已开源验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: PACMAC验证了自监督ViT在领域自适应中的潜力，注意力条件掩码策略能有效提升模型对目标域的适应能力。

authors_text: Alexander Kapitanov,Karina Kvanchiani,Alexander Nagaev,Roman Kraynov,Andrei Makhliarchuk
title: HaGRID - HAnd Gesture Recognition Image Dataset
title_zh: HaGRID - HAnd手势识别图像数据集
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, open-source dataset for computer vision
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures, open-source dataset for computer vision
abstract: This paper introduces an enormous dataset, HaGRID (HAnd Gesture Recognition Image Dataset), to build a hand gesture recognition (HGR) system concentrating on interaction with devices to manage them. That is why all 18 chosen gestures are endowed with the semiotic function and can be interpreted as a specific action. Although the gestures are static, they were picked up, especially for the ability to design several dynamic gestures. It allows the trained model to recognize not only static gestures such as "like" and "stop" but also "swipes" and "drag and drop" dynamic gestures. The HaGRID contains 554,800 images and bounding box annotations with gesture labels to solve hand detection and gesture classification tasks. The low variability in context and subjects of other datasets was the reason for creating the dataset without such limitations. Utilizing crowdsourcing platforms allowed us to collect samples recorded by 37,583 subjects in at least as many scenes with subject-to-camera distances from 0.5 to 4 meters in various natural light conditions. The influence of the diversity characteristics was assessed in ablation study experiments. Also, we demonstrate the HaGRID ability to be used for pretraining models in HGR tasks. The HaGRID and pretrained models are publicly available.
summary: This paper introduces an enormous dataset, HaGRID (HAnd Gesture Recognition Image Dataset), to build a hand gesture recognition (HGR) system concentrating on interaction with devices to manage them. That is why all 18 chosen gestures are endowed with the semiotic function and can be interpreted as a specific action. Although the gestures are static, they were picked up, especially for the ability to design several dynamic gestures. It allows the trained model to recognize not only static gestures such as "like" and "stop" but also "swipes" and "drag and drop" dynamic gestures. The HaGRID contains 554,800 images and bounding box annotations with gesture labels to solve hand detection and gesture classification tasks. The low variability in context and subjects of other datasets was the reason for creating the dataset without such limitations. Utilizing crowdsourcing platforms allowed us to collect samples recorded by 37,583 subjects in at least as many scenes with subject-to-camera distances from 0.5 to 4 meters in various natural light conditions. The influence of the diversity characteristics was assessed in ablation study experiments. Also, we demonstrate the HaGRID ability to be used for pretraining models in HGR tasks. The HaGRID and pretrained models are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 本文引入了一个巨大的数据集 HaGRID（H 和手势识别图像数据集）来构建手势识别（HGR）系统，专注于与设备的交互以管理它们。这就是为什么所有18个手势都被赋予了符号功能，可以被解释为一个特定的动作。虽然手势是静态的，但还是被拾取了，尤其是能够设计几个动态手势。它允许训练后的模型不仅可以识别“喜欢”和“停止”等静态手势，还可以识别“滑动”和“拖放”动态手势。 HaGRID 包含 554,800 张图像和带有手势标签的边界框注释，用于解决手部检测和手势分类任务。其他数据集的背景和主题的低可变性是创建没有此类限制的数据集的原因。利用众包平台，我们收集了 37,583 个拍摄对象在至少同样多的场景中记录的样本，在各种自然光条件下，拍摄对象到相机的距离为 0.5 至 4 米。在消融研究实验中评估了多样性特征的影响。此外，我们还展示了 HaGRID 用于 HGR 任务中预训练模型的能力。 HaGRID 和预训练模型是公开可用的。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了HaGRID数据集，用于构建手部手势识别系统，包含静态和动态手势的图像及标注，以提升设备交互能力。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集在场景和主体多样性上存在局限，难以满足实际应用需求，因此需要创建一个具有高多样性的手势识别数据集。
AI.method: 通过众包平台收集37,583名受试者在不同距离、光照条件下的手势图像，涵盖18种具有语义功能的手势，并进行消融实验验证多样性影响。
AI.result: HaGRID包含554,800张图像及边界框标注，支持静态和动态手势识别；实验表明数据集多样性显著提升模型性能，且可应用于预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: HaGRID通过高多样性数据解决了传统数据集的局限性，为手势识别研究提供了公开数据集和预训练模型，推动了实际交互场景的应用。
