search_text: HaGRID - HAnd Gesture Recognition Image Dataset HaGRID - HAnd手势识别图像数据集 This paper introduces an enormous dataset, HaGRID (HAnd Gesture Recognition Image Dataset), to build a hand gesture recognition (HGR) system concentrating on interaction with devices to manage them. That is why all 18 chosen gestures are endowed with the semiotic function and can be interpreted as a specific action. Although the gestures are static, they were picked up, especially for the ability to design several dynamic gestures. It allows the trained model to recognize not only static gestures such as "like" and "stop" but also "swipes" and "drag and drop" dynamic gestures. The HaGRID contains 554,800 images and bounding box annotations with gesture labels to solve hand detection and gesture classification tasks. The low variability in context and subjects of other datasets was the reason for creating the dataset without such limitations. Utilizing crowdsourcing platforms allowed us to collect samples recorded by 37,583 subjects in at least as many scenes with subject-to-camera distances from 0.5 to 4 meters in various natural light conditions. The influence of the diversity characteristics was assessed in ablation study experiments. Also, we demonstrate the HaGRID ability to be used for pretraining models in HGR tasks. The HaGRID and pretrained models are publicly available. 本文引入了一个巨大的数据集 HaGRID（H 和手势识别图像数据集）来构建手势识别（HGR）系统，专注于与设备的交互以管理它们。这就是为什么所有18个手势都被赋予了符号功能，可以被解释为一个特定的动作。虽然手势是静态的，但还是被拾取了，尤其是能够设计几个动态手势。它允许训练后的模型不仅可以识别“喜欢”和“停止”等静态手势，还可以识别“滑动”和“拖放”动态手势。 HaGRID 包含 554,800 张图像和带有手势标签的边界框注释，用于解决手部检测和手势分类任务。其他数据集的背景和主题的低可变性是创建没有此类限制的数据集的原因。利用众包平台，我们收集了 37,583 个拍摄对象在至少同样多的场景中记录的样本，在各种自然光条件下，拍摄对象到相机的距离为 0.5 至 4 米。在消融研究实验中评估了多样性特征的影响。此外，我们还展示了 HaGRID 用于 HGR 任务中预训练模型的能力。 HaGRID 和预训练模型是公开可用的。 本文介绍了HaGRID数据集，用于构建手部手势识别系统，包含静态和动态手势的图像及标注，以提升设备交互能力。 Alexander Kapitanov,Karina Kvanchiani,Alexander Nagaev,Roman Kraynov,Andrei Makhliarchuk cs.CV

authors_text: Harsh Rangwani,Sumukh K Aithal,Mayank Mishra,Arihant Jain,R. Venkatesh Babu
title: A Closer Look at Smoothness in Domain Adversarial Training
title_zh: 仔细观察领域对抗训练的平滑度
comment: ICML 2022. Code: https://github.com/val-iisc/SDAT
comments: ICML 2022. Code: https://github.com/val-iisc/SDAT
abstract: Domain adversarial training has been ubiquitous for achieving invariant representations and is used widely for various domain adaptation tasks. In recent times, methods converging to smooth optima have shown improved generalization for supervised learning tasks like classification. In this work, we analyze the effect of smoothness enhancing formulations on domain adversarial training, the objective of which is a combination of task loss (eg. classification, regression, etc.) and adversarial terms. We find that converging to a smooth minima with respect to (w.r.t.) task loss stabilizes the adversarial training leading to better performance on target domain. In contrast to task loss, our analysis shows that converging to smooth minima w.r.t. adversarial loss leads to sub-optimal generalization on the target domain. Based on the analysis, we introduce the Smooth Domain Adversarial Training (SDAT) procedure, which effectively enhances the performance of existing domain adversarial methods for both classification and object detection tasks. Our analysis also provides insight into the extensive usage of SGD over Adam in the community for domain adversarial training.
summary: Domain adversarial training has been ubiquitous for achieving invariant representations and is used widely for various domain adaptation tasks. In recent times, methods converging to smooth optima have shown improved generalization for supervised learning tasks like classification. In this work, we analyze the effect of smoothness enhancing formulations on domain adversarial training, the objective of which is a combination of task loss (eg. classification, regression, etc.) and adversarial terms. We find that converging to a smooth minima with respect to (w.r.t.) task loss stabilizes the adversarial training leading to better performance on target domain. In contrast to task loss, our analysis shows that converging to smooth minima w.r.t. adversarial loss leads to sub-optimal generalization on the target domain. Based on the analysis, we introduce the Smooth Domain Adversarial Training (SDAT) procedure, which effectively enhances the performance of existing domain adversarial methods for both classification and object detection tasks. Our analysis also provides insight into the extensive usage of SGD over Adam in the community for domain adversarial training.
abstract_zh: 领域对抗训练已经普遍用于实现不变表示，并广泛用于各种领域适应任务。近年来，收敛到平滑最优的方法已经显示出对分类等监督学习任务的泛化能力的提高。在这项工作中，我们分析了平滑度增强公式对领域对抗训练的影响，其目标是任务损失（例如分类、回归等）和对抗项的组合。我们发现，就（w.r.t.）任务损失而言，收敛到平滑最小值可以稳定对抗性训练，从而在目标领域获得更好的性能。与任务损失相反，我们的分析表明，收敛到平滑最小值 w.r.t.对抗性损失导致目标域上的泛化次优。基于分析，我们引入了平滑域对抗训练（SDAT）过程，它有效地增强了现有域对抗方法在分类和目标检测任务中的性能。我们的分析还深入了解了社区中 SGD 相对于 Adam 的广泛使用，以进行领域对抗训练。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了平滑性对领域对抗训练的影响，并提出了改进的平滑领域对抗训练（SDAT）方法以提升目标域性能。
AI.motivation: 领域对抗训练虽广泛应用，但其优化目标中平滑性对性能的影响尚未明确，现有方法可能因收敛于次优解而表现不佳。
AI.method: 通过分析任务损失与对抗损失的平滑性影响，提出SDAT方法，重点优化任务损失的平滑性以稳定对抗训练过程。
AI.result: SDAT在分类和目标检测任务中均优于现有方法，且解释了社区中偏好SGD而非Adam的优化器选择原因。
AI.conclusion: 任务损失的平滑性优化是提升领域适应性能的关键，SDAT为领域对抗训练提供了有效改进方案。

authors_text: Junliang Chen,Weizeng Lu,Linlin Shen
title: Selective Multi-Scale Learning for Object Detection
title_zh: 用于目标检测的选择性多尺度学习
comment: Accepted by ICANN2021
comments: Accepted by ICANN2021
abstract: Pyramidal networks are standard methods for multi-scale object detection. Current researches on feature pyramid networks usually adopt layer connections to collect features from certain levels of the feature hierarchy, and do not consider the significant differences among them. We propose a better architecture of feature pyramid networks, named selective multi-scale learning (SMSL), to address this issue. SMSL is efficient and general, which can be integrated in both single-stage and two-stage detectors to boost detection performance, with nearly no extra inference cost. RetinaNet combined with SMSL obtains 1.8\% improvement in AP (from 39.1\% to 40.9\%) on COCO dataset. When integrated with SMSL, two-stage detectors can get around 1.0\% improvement in AP.
summary: Pyramidal networks are standard methods for multi-scale object detection. Current researches on feature pyramid networks usually adopt layer connections to collect features from certain levels of the feature hierarchy, and do not consider the significant differences among them. We propose a better architecture of feature pyramid networks, named selective multi-scale learning (SMSL), to address this issue. SMSL is efficient and general, which can be integrated in both single-stage and two-stage detectors to boost detection performance, with nearly no extra inference cost. RetinaNet combined with SMSL obtains 1.8\% improvement in AP (from 39.1\% to 40.9\%) on COCO dataset. When integrated with SMSL, two-stage detectors can get around 1.0\% improvement in AP.
abstract_zh: 金字塔网络是多尺度目标检测的标准方法。目前对特征金字塔网络的研究通常采用层连接的方式从特征层次结构的某些级别收集特征，并且没有考虑它们之间的显着差异。我们提出了一种更好的特征金字塔网络架构，称为选择性多尺度学习（SMSL）来解决这个问题。 SMSL 高效且通用，可以集成在单级和两级检测器中以提高检测性能，几乎没有额外的推理成本。 RetinaNet 与 SMSL 相结合，在 COCO 数据集上获得了 1.8% 的 AP 提升（从 39.1% 到 40.9%）。当与 SMSL 集成时，两级检测器可以获得约 1.0\% 的 AP 改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SMSL的特征金字塔网络架构，用于改进多尺度目标检测，解决现有方法中不同层次特征差异未被充分考虑的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有特征金字塔网络通过层连接收集特定层次特征，但未考虑不同层次特征间的显著差异，导致检测性能受限。
AI.method: 提出选择性多尺度学习（SMSL）架构，通过有效整合多尺度特征差异，可高效集成于单阶段和两阶段检测器中，几乎不增加推理成本。
AI.result: RetinaNet结合SMSL在COCO数据集上AP提升1.8%（39.1%→40.9%），两阶段检测器AP提升约1.0%。
AI.conclusion: SMSL方法通过有效处理多尺度特征差异，显著提升检测性能，且具有通用性和高效性，适用于不同检测框架。

authors_text: Nimrod Harel,Uri Obolski,Ran Gilad-Bachrach
title: Inherent Inconsistencies of Feature Importance
title_zh: 特征重要性固有的不一致
abstract: The rapid advancement and widespread adoption of machine learning-driven technologies have underscored the practical and ethical need for creating interpretable artificial intelligence systems. Feature importance, a method that assigns scores to the contribution of individual features on prediction outcomes, seeks to bridge this gap as a tool for enhancing human comprehension of these systems. Feature importance serves as an explanation of predictions in diverse contexts, whether by providing a global interpretation of a phenomenon across the entire dataset or by offering a localized explanation for the outcome of a specific data point. Furthermore, feature importance is being used both for explaining models and for identifying plausible causal relations in the data, independently from the model. However, it is worth noting that these various contexts have traditionally been explored in isolation, with limited theoretical foundations. This paper presents an axiomatic framework designed to establish coherent relationships among the different contexts of feature importance scores. Notably, our work unveils a surprising conclusion: when we combine the proposed properties with those previously outlined in the literature, we demonstrate the existence of an inconsistency. This inconsistency highlights that certain essential properties of feature importance scores cannot coexist harmoniously within a single framework.
summary: The rapid advancement and widespread adoption of machine learning-driven technologies have underscored the practical and ethical need for creating interpretable artificial intelligence systems. Feature importance, a method that assigns scores to the contribution of individual features on prediction outcomes, seeks to bridge this gap as a tool for enhancing human comprehension of these systems. Feature importance serves as an explanation of predictions in diverse contexts, whether by providing a global interpretation of a phenomenon across the entire dataset or by offering a localized explanation for the outcome of a specific data point. Furthermore, feature importance is being used both for explaining models and for identifying plausible causal relations in the data, independently from the model. However, it is worth noting that these various contexts have traditionally been explored in isolation, with limited theoretical foundations. This paper presents an axiomatic framework designed to establish coherent relationships among the different contexts of feature importance scores. Notably, our work unveils a surprising conclusion: when we combine the proposed properties with those previously outlined in the literature, we demonstrate the existence of an inconsistency. This inconsistency highlights that certain essential properties of feature importance scores cannot coexist harmoniously within a single framework.
abstract_zh: 机器学习驱动技术的快速发展和广泛采用凸显了创建可解释的人工智能系统的实际和道德需求。特征重要性是一种对单个特征对预测结果的贡献进行评分的方法，旨在弥合这一差距，作为增强人类对这些系统的理解的工具。特征重要性可以解释不同背景下的预测，无论是提供整个数据集中现象的全局解释，还是为特定数据点的结果提供局部解释。此外，特征重要性不仅用于解释模型，还用于识别数据中看似合理的因果关系，独立于模型。然而，值得注意的是，传统上这些不同的背景都是孤立地探索的，理论基础有限。本文提出了一个公理框架，旨在在特征重要性得分的不同上下文之间建立连贯的关系。值得注意的是，我们的工作揭示了一个令人惊讶的结论：当我们将提出的属性与文献中先前概述的属性结合起来时，我们证明了不一致的存在。这种不一致凸显了特征重要性分数的某些基本属性无法在单个框架内和谐共存。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了特征重要性评分在不同应用场景中的内在不一致性问题，并提出一个公理化框架揭示其矛盾。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习技术的普及，解释模型预测结果的需求增加，但现有特征重要性方法在不同场景下缺乏统一理论基础。
AI.method: 构建公理化框架，将全局解释、局部解释及因果推断等不同场景的特征重要性属性进行系统化关联分析。
AI.result: 证明当结合现有文献中的属性时，特征重要性评分的某些核心属性无法在单一框架中共存。
AI.conclusion: 特征重要性方法存在根本性矛盾，需重新审视其设计原则与应用场景的适配性。

search_text: Inherent Inconsistencies of Feature Importance 特征重要性固有的不一致 The rapid advancement and widespread adoption of machine learning-driven technologies have underscored the practical and ethical need for creating interpretable artificial intelligence systems. Feature importance, a method that assigns scores to the contribution of individual features on prediction outcomes, seeks to bridge this gap as a tool for enhancing human comprehension of these systems. Feature importance serves as an explanation of predictions in diverse contexts, whether by providing a global interpretation of a phenomenon across the entire dataset or by offering a localized explanation for the outcome of a specific data point. Furthermore, feature importance is being used both for explaining models and for identifying plausible causal relations in the data, independently from the model. However, it is worth noting that these various contexts have traditionally been explored in isolation, with limited theoretical foundations. This paper presents an axiomatic framework designed to establish coherent relationships among the different contexts of feature importance scores. Notably, our work unveils a surprising conclusion: when we combine the proposed properties with those previously outlined in the literature, we demonstrate the existence of an inconsistency. This inconsistency highlights that certain essential properties of feature importance scores cannot coexist harmoniously within a single framework. 机器学习驱动技术的快速发展和广泛采用凸显了创建可解释的人工智能系统的实际和道德需求。特征重要性是一种对单个特征对预测结果的贡献进行评分的方法，旨在弥合这一差距，作为增强人类对这些系统的理解的工具。特征重要性可以解释不同背景下的预测，无论是提供整个数据集中现象的全局解释，还是为特定数据点的结果提供局部解释。此外，特征重要性不仅用于解释模型，还用于识别数据中看似合理的因果关系，独立于模型。然而，值得注意的是，传统上这些不同的背景都是孤立地探索的，理论基础有限。本文提出了一个公理框架，旨在在特征重要性得分的不同上下文之间建立连贯的关系。值得注意的是，我们的工作揭示了一个令人惊讶的结论：当我们将提出的属性与文献中先前概述的属性结合起来时，我们证明了不一致的存在。这种不一致凸显了特征重要性分数的某些基本属性无法在单个框架内和谐共存。 本文探讨了特征重要性评分在不同应用场景中的内在不一致性问题，并提出一个公理化框架揭示其矛盾。 Nimrod Harel,Uri Obolski,Ran Gilad-Bachrach cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Romain Loiseau,Mathieu Aubry,Loïc Landrieu
title: Online Segmentation of LiDAR Sequences: Dataset and Algorithm
title_zh: LiDAR 序列的在线分割：数据集和算法
comment: Code and data are available at: https://romainloiseau.fr/helixnet
comments: Code and data are available at: https://romainloiseau.fr/helixnet
abstract: Roof-mounted spinning LiDAR sensors are widely used by autonomous vehicles. However, most semantic datasets and algorithms used for LiDAR sequence segmentation operate on $360^\circ$ frames, causing an acquisition latency incompatible with real-time applications. To address this issue, we first introduce HelixNet, a $10$ billion point dataset with fine-grained labels, timestamps, and sensor rotation information necessary to accurately assess the real-time readiness of segmentation algorithms. Second, we propose Helix4D, a compact and efficient spatio-temporal transformer architecture specifically designed for rotating LiDAR sequences. Helix4D operates on acquisition slices corresponding to a fraction of a full sensor rotation, significantly reducing the total latency. Helix4D reaches accuracy on par with the best segmentation algorithms on HelixNet and SemanticKITTI with a reduction of over $5\times$ in terms of latency and $50\times$ in model size. The code and data are available at: https://romainloiseau.fr/helixnet
summary: Roof-mounted spinning LiDAR sensors are widely used by autonomous vehicles. However, most semantic datasets and algorithms used for LiDAR sequence segmentation operate on $360^\circ$ frames, causing an acquisition latency incompatible with real-time applications. To address this issue, we first introduce HelixNet, a $10$ billion point dataset with fine-grained labels, timestamps, and sensor rotation information necessary to accurately assess the real-time readiness of segmentation algorithms. Second, we propose Helix4D, a compact and efficient spatio-temporal transformer architecture specifically designed for rotating LiDAR sequences. Helix4D operates on acquisition slices corresponding to a fraction of a full sensor rotation, significantly reducing the total latency. Helix4D reaches accuracy on par with the best segmentation algorithms on HelixNet and SemanticKITTI with a reduction of over $5\times$ in terms of latency and $50\times$ in model size. The code and data are available at: https://romainloiseau.fr/helixnet
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车广泛使用车顶安装的旋转激光雷达传感器。然而，大多数用于 LiDAR 序列分割的语义数据集和算法都在 360^\circ$ 帧上运行，导致采集延迟与实时应用程序不兼容。为了解决这个问题，我们首先引入 HelixNet，这是一个价值 10 亿美元的点数据集，具有精确评估分割算法实时准备情况所需的细粒度标签、时间戳和传感器旋转信息。其次，我们提出了 Helix4D，一种紧凑且高效的时空转换器架构，专为旋转 LiDAR 序列而设计。 Helix4D 在对应于完整传感器旋转的一小部分的采集切片上运行，从而显着减少总延迟。 Helix4D 的准确度与 HelixNet 和 SemanticKITTI 上的最佳分割算法相当，延迟减少了超过 5 美元，模型大小减少了 50 美元。代码和数据可在以下网址获取：https://romainloiseau.fr/helixnet

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了HelixNet数据集和Helix4D算法，用于解决LiDAR序列实时分割的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的LiDAR序列分割数据集和算法主要基于360度帧，导致无法满足实时应用的需求。
AI.method: 本文提出了HelixNet数据集和Helix4D算法，Helix4D是一种针对旋转LiDAR序列设计的高效时空变换架构。
AI.result: Helix4D在HelixNet和SemanticKITTI数据集上达到了与最佳分割算法相当的精度，同时将延迟减少了5倍以上，模型大小减少了50倍。
AI.conclusion: Helix4D算法有效解决了LiDAR序列实时分割的问题，具有较高的实用价值。

authors_text: Bowen Zhang,Songjun Cao,Xiaoming Zhang,Yike Zhang,Long Ma,Takahiro Shinozaki
title: Censer: Curriculum Semi-supervised Learning for Speech Recognition Based on Self-supervised Pre-training
title_zh: Censer：基于自监督预训练的语音识别课程半监督学习
abstract: Recent studies have shown that the benefits provided by self-supervised pre-training and self-training (pseudo-labeling) are complementary. Semi-supervised fine-tuning strategies under the pre-training framework, however, remain insufficiently studied. Besides, modern semi-supervised speech recognition algorithms either treat unlabeled data indiscriminately or filter out noisy samples with a confidence threshold. The dissimilarities among different unlabeled data are often ignored. In this paper, we propose Censer, a semi-supervised speech recognition algorithm based on self-supervised pre-training to maximize the utilization of unlabeled data. The pre-training stage of Censer adopts wav2vec2.0 and the fine-tuning stage employs an improved semi-supervised learning algorithm from slimIPL, which leverages unlabeled data progressively according to their pseudo labels' qualities. We also incorporate a temporal pseudo label pool and an exponential moving average to control the pseudo labels' update frequency and to avoid model divergence. Experimental results on Libri-Light and LibriSpeech datasets manifest our proposed method achieves better performance compared to existing approaches while being more unified.
summary: Recent studies have shown that the benefits provided by self-supervised pre-training and self-training (pseudo-labeling) are complementary. Semi-supervised fine-tuning strategies under the pre-training framework, however, remain insufficiently studied. Besides, modern semi-supervised speech recognition algorithms either treat unlabeled data indiscriminately or filter out noisy samples with a confidence threshold. The dissimilarities among different unlabeled data are often ignored. In this paper, we propose Censer, a semi-supervised speech recognition algorithm based on self-supervised pre-training to maximize the utilization of unlabeled data. The pre-training stage of Censer adopts wav2vec2.0 and the fine-tuning stage employs an improved semi-supervised learning algorithm from slimIPL, which leverages unlabeled data progressively according to their pseudo labels' qualities. We also incorporate a temporal pseudo label pool and an exponential moving average to control the pseudo labels' update frequency and to avoid model divergence. Experimental results on Libri-Light and LibriSpeech datasets manifest our proposed method achieves better performance compared to existing approaches while being more unified.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，自我监督预训练和自我训练（伪标签）提供的好处是互补的。然而，预训练框架下的半监督微调策略仍缺乏足够的研究。此外，现代半监督语音识别算法要么不加区别地处理未标记的数据，要么通过置信阈值过滤掉噪声样本。不同未标记数据之间的差异常常被忽略。在本文中，我们提出了Censer，一种基于自监督预训练的半监督语音识别算法，以最大限度地利用未标记数据。 Censer的预训练阶段采用wav2vec2.0，微调阶段采用slimIPL改进的半监督学习算法，根据伪标签的质量逐步利用未标签数据。我们还结合了时间伪标签池和指数移动平均值来控制伪标签的更新频率并避免模型发散。 Libri-Light 和 LibriSpeech 数据集上的实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，我们提出的方法取得了更好的性能，同时更加统一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Censer算法，基于自监督预训练的半监督语音识别方法，旨在更有效地利用未标记数据。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法对未标记数据处理方式单一，未充分考虑数据差异性，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 采用wav2vec2.0预训练框架，结合改进的半监督算法（来自slimIPL），通过时序伪标签池和指数移动平均控制伪标签更新频率，实现未标记数据的渐进式利用。
AI.result: 在Libri-Light和LibriSpeech数据集上实验表明，Censer相较现有方法取得更优性能且方法更统一。
AI.conclusion: Censer通过课程式半监督学习有效挖掘未标记数据价值，为语音识别领域提供更稳健的解决方案。

The dissimilarities among different unlabeled data are often ignored. In this paper, we propose Censer, a semi-supervised speech recognition algorithm based on self-supervised pre-training to maximize the utilization of unlabeled data. The pre-training stage of Censer adopts wav2vec2.0 and the fine-tuning stage employs an improved semi-supervised learning algorithm from slimIPL, which leverages unlabeled data progressively according to their pseudo labels' qualities. We also incorporate a temporal pseudo label pool and an exponential moving average to control the pseudo labels' update frequency and to avoid model divergence. Experimental results on Libri-Light and LibriSpeech datasets manifest our proposed method achieves better performance compared to existing approaches while being more unified. 最近的研究表明，自我监督预训练和自我训练（伪标签）提供的好处是互补的。然而，预训练框架下的半监督微调策略仍缺乏足够的研究。此外，现代半监督语音识别算法要么不加区别地处理未标记的数据，要么通过置信阈值过滤掉噪声样本。不同未标记数据之间的差异常常被忽略。在本文中，我们提出了Censer，一种基于自监督预训练的半监督语音识别算法，以最大限度地利用未标记数据。 Censer的预训练阶段采用wav2vec2.0，微调阶段采用slimIPL改进的半监督学习算法，根据伪标签的质量逐步利用未标签数据。我们还结合了时间伪标签池和指数移动平均值来控制伪标签的更新频率并避免模型发散。 Libri-Light 和 LibriSpeech 数据集上的实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，我们提出的方法取得了更好的性能，同时更加统一。 本文提出Censer算法，基于自监督预训练的半监督语音识别方法，旨在更有效地利用未标记数据。 Bowen Zhang,Songjun Cao,Xiaoming Zhang,Yike Zhang,Long Ma,Takahiro Shinozaki cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Marin Bougeret,Jérémy Omer,Michael Poss
title: Approximating optimization problems in graphs with locational uncertainty
title_zh: 近似具有位置不确定性的图中的优化问题
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2109.00389
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2109.00389
abstract: Many combinatorial optimization problems can be formulated as the search for a subgraph that satisfies certain properties and minimizes the total weight. We assume here that the vertices correspond to points in a metric space and can take any position in given uncertainty sets. Then, the cost function to be minimized is the sum of the distances for the worst positions of the vertices in their uncertainty sets. We propose two types of polynomial-time approximation algorithms. The first one relies on solving a deterministic counterpart of the problem where the uncertain distances are replaced with maximum pairwise distances. We study in details the resulting approximation ratio, which depends on the structure of the feasible subgraphs and whether the metric space is Ptolemaic or not. The second algorithm is a fully-polynomial time approximation scheme for the special case of $s-t$ paths.
summary: Many combinatorial optimization problems can be formulated as the search for a subgraph that satisfies certain properties and minimizes the total weight. We assume here that the vertices correspond to points in a metric space and can take any position in given uncertainty sets. Then, the cost function to be minimized is the sum of the distances for the worst positions of the vertices in their uncertainty sets. We propose two types of polynomial-time approximation algorithms. The first one relies on solving a deterministic counterpart of the problem where the uncertain distances are replaced with maximum pairwise distances. We study in details the resulting approximation ratio, which depends on the structure of the feasible subgraphs and whether the metric space is Ptolemaic or not. The second algorithm is a fully-polynomial time approximation scheme for the special case of $s-t$ paths.
abstract_zh: 许多组合优化问题可以表述为搜索满足某些属性并最小化总权重的子图。我们在这里假设顶点对应于度量空间中的点，并且可以占据给定不确定性集中的任何位置。然后，要最小化的成本函数是不确定性集中顶点最差位置的距离之和。我们提出了两种类型的多项式时间近似算法。第一个依赖于解决问题的确定性对应问题，其中不确定距离被最大成对距离替换。我们详细研究了所得的近似比，该近似比取决于可行子图的结构以及度量空间是否是托勒密空间。第二种算法是针对 $s-t$ 路径特殊情况的完全多项式时间近似方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在存在位置不确定性的图中，寻找满足特定属性的子图以最小化最坏情况下的距离总和的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 传统优化问题假设顶点位置确定，但实际中存在不确定性，需考虑最坏情况下的成本，因此提出近似算法。
AI.method: 提出两种多项式时间近似算法：一是用最大成对距离替代不确定距离求解确定性问题；二是针对s-t路径的全多项式时间近似方案。
AI.result: 第一种算法的近似比取决于子图结构及度量空间是否为Ptolemaic；第二种算法适用于s-t路径的全多项式时间近似。
AI.conclusion: 本文为存在位置不确定性的图优化问题提供了两种有效的近似算法，扩展了传统优化方法的应用范围。

authors_text: Tao Niu,Yinglei Teng,Panpan Zou
title: Asymptotic Soft Cluster Pruning for Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络的渐近软簇剪枝
abstract: Filter pruning method introduces structural sparsity by removing selected filters and is thus particularly effective for reducing complexity. Previous works empirically prune networks from the point of view that filter with smaller norm contributes less to the final results. However, such criteria has been proven sensitive to the distribution of filters, and the accuracy may hard to recover since the capacity gap is fixed once pruned. In this paper, we propose a novel filter pruning method called Asymptotic Soft Cluster Pruning (ASCP), to identify the redundancy of network based on the similarity of filters. Each filter from over-parameterized network is first distinguished by clustering, and then reconstructed to manually introduce redundancy into it. Several guidelines of clustering are proposed to better preserve feature extraction ability. After reconstruction, filters are allowed to be updated to eliminate the effect caused by mistakenly selected. Besides, various decaying strategies of the pruning rate are adopted to stabilize the pruning process and improve the final performance as well. By gradually generating more identical filters within each cluster, ASCP can remove them through channel addition operation with almost no accuracy drop. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets show that our method can achieve competitive results compared with many state-of-the-art algorithms.
summary: Filter pruning method introduces structural sparsity by removing selected filters and is thus particularly effective for reducing complexity. Previous works empirically prune networks from the point of view that filter with smaller norm contributes less to the final results. However, such criteria has been proven sensitive to the distribution of filters, and the accuracy may hard to recover since the capacity gap is fixed once pruned. In this paper, we propose a novel filter pruning method called Asymptotic Soft Cluster Pruning (ASCP), to identify the redundancy of network based on the similarity of filters. Each filter from over-parameterized network is first distinguished by clustering, and then reconstructed to manually introduce redundancy into it. Several guidelines of clustering are proposed to better preserve feature extraction ability. After reconstruction, filters are allowed to be updated to eliminate the effect caused by mistakenly selected. Besides, various decaying strategies of the pruning rate are adopted to stabilize the pruning process and improve the final performance as well. By gradually generating more identical filters within each cluster, ASCP can remove them through channel addition operation with almost no accuracy drop. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets show that our method can achieve competitive results compared with many state-of-the-art algorithms.
abstract_zh: 滤波器剪枝方法通过删除选定的滤波器引入结构稀疏性，因此对于降低复杂性特别有效。以前的工作从经验上修剪网络的观点来看，范数较小的过滤器对最终结果的贡献较小。然而，事实证明，这样的标准对过滤器的分布很敏感，并且由于容量差距一旦修剪就固定了，因此准确性可能很难恢复。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的滤波器剪枝方法，称为渐近软聚类剪枝（ASCP），基于滤波器的相似性来识别网络的冗余。来自超参数化网络的每个过滤器首先通过聚类进行区分，然后进行重构以手动向其中引入冗余。提出了几种聚类准则以更好地保留特征提取能力。重构后，允许更新滤波器，以消除错误选择带来的影响。此外，还采用了各种剪枝率衰减策略来稳定剪枝过程并提高最终性能。通过在每个簇内逐渐生成更多相同的过滤器，ASCP 可以通过通道添加操作删除它们，而几乎没有精度下降。在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上的大量实验表明，与许多最先进的算法相比，我们的方法可以取得有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于滤波器相似性的深度神经网络滤波器剪枝方法，通过聚类和重建操作实现高效冗余消除。
AI.motivation: 传统滤波器剪枝方法依赖范数指标，存在对滤波器分布敏感且剪枝后准确率难以恢复的问题，需更稳健的冗余识别机制。
AI.method: 提出渐进式软聚类剪枝(ASCP)方法，通过聚类区分滤波器并重建引入冗余，结合聚类指导原则、动态更新机制及剪枝率衰减策略实现精准剪枝。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上实现与先进算法相当的剪枝效果，保持较高模型准确率。
AI.conclusion: ASCP通过相似性聚类和动态重构有效识别冗余滤波器，在保证精度前提下显著降低计算复杂度，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Matej Petrlik,Pavel Petracek,Vit Kratky,Tomas Musil,Yurii Stasinchuk,Matous Vrba,Tomas Baca,Daniel Hert,Martin Pecka,Tomas Svoboda,Martin Saska
title: UAVs Beneath the Surface: Cooperative Autonomy for Subterranean Search and Rescue in DARPA SubT
title_zh: 地面下的无人机：DARPA SubT 地下搜索和救援的合作自主
comment: Submitted to Field Robotics Special Issue: DARPA Subterranean Challenge, Advancement and Lessons Learned from the Finals
comments: Submitted to Field Robotics Special Issue: DARPA Subterranean Challenge, Advancement and Lessons Learned from the Finals
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach for autonomous cooperating UAVs in search and rescue operations in subterranean domains with complex topology. The proposed system was ranked second in the Virtual Track of the DARPA SubT Finals as part of the team CTU-CRAS-NORLAB. In contrast to the winning solution that was developed specifically for the Virtual Track, the proposed solution also proved to be a robust system for deployment onboard physical UAVs flying in the extremely harsh and confined environment of the real-world competition. The proposed approach enables fully autonomous and decentralized deployment of a UAV team with seamless simulation-to-world transfer, and proves its advantage over less mobile UGV teams in the flyable space of diverse environments. The main contributions of the paper are present in the mapping and navigation pipelines. The mapping approach employs novel map representations -- SphereMap for efficient risk-aware long-distance planning, FacetMap for surface coverage, and the compressed topological-volumetric LTVMap for allowing multi-robot cooperation under low-bandwidth communication. These representations are used in navigation together with novel methods for visibility-constrained informed search in a general 3D environment with no assumptions about the environment structure, while balancing deep exploration with sensor-coverage exploitation. The proposed solution also includes a visual-perception pipeline for on-board detection and localization of objects of interest in four RGB stream at 5 Hz each without a dedicated GPU. Apart from participation in the DARPA SubT, the performance of the UAV system is supported by extensive experimental verification in diverse environments with both qualitative and quantitative evaluation.
summary: This paper presents a novel approach for autonomous cooperating UAVs in search and rescue operations in subterranean domains with complex topology. The proposed system was ranked second in the Virtual Track of the DARPA SubT Finals as part of the team CTU-CRAS-NORLAB. In contrast to the winning solution that was developed specifically for the Virtual Track, the proposed solution also proved to be a robust system for deployment onboard physical UAVs flying in the extremely harsh and confined environment of the real-world competition. The proposed approach enables fully autonomous and decentralized deployment of a UAV team with seamless simulation-to-world transfer, and proves its advantage over less mobile UGV teams in the flyable space of diverse environments. The main contributions of the paper are present in the mapping and navigation pipelines. The mapping approach employs novel map representations -- SphereMap for efficient risk-aware long-distance planning, FacetMap for surface coverage, and the compressed topological-volumetric LTVMap for allowing multi-robot cooperation under low-bandwidth communication. These representations are used in navigation together with novel methods for visibility-constrained informed search in a general 3D environment with no assumptions about the environment structure, while balancing deep exploration with sensor-coverage exploitation. The proposed solution also includes a visual-perception pipeline for on-board detection and localization of objects of interest in four RGB stream at 5 Hz each without a dedicated GPU. Apart from participation in the DARPA SubT, the performance of the UAV system is supported by extensive experimental verification in diverse environments with both qualitative and quantitative evaluation.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种在复杂拓扑的地下区域中进行自主协作无人机搜索和救援行动的新方法。作为 CTU-CRAS-NORLAB 团队的一部分，所提出的系统在 DARPA SubT 决赛虚拟赛道中排名第二。与专门为虚拟赛道开发的获胜解决方案相比，所提出的解决方案也被证明是一个强大的系统，可用于部署在现实比赛中极其恶劣和有限的环境中飞行的机载物理无人机。所提出的方法能够实现无人机团队的完全自主和分散部署，并具有无缝模拟到世界的传输，并证明了其在不同环境的可飞行空间中相对于移动性较低的 UGV 团队的优势。本文的主要贡献体现在测绘和导航管道中。该绘图方法采用新颖的地图表示方式——用于高效风险感知的长距离规划的 SphereMap、用于表面覆盖的 FacetMap 以及用于允许在低带宽通信下进行多机器人合作的压缩拓扑体积 LTVMap。这些表示与新颖的方法一起用于导航，在一般 3D 环境中进行可见性受限的知情搜索，无需对环境结构进行假设，同时平衡深度探索与传感器覆盖利用。所提出的解决方案还包括一个视觉感知管道，用于在四个 RGB 流中对感兴趣的对象进行机载检测和定位，每个流的频率为 5 Hz，无需专用 GPU。除了参与 DARPA SubT 之外，无人机系统的性能还得到了不同环境中广泛实验验证的支持，包括定性和定量评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于地下复杂环境搜索救援的自主协作无人机系统，并在DARPA SubT虚拟赛道中排名第二。
AI.motivation: 现有解决方案多针对虚拟环境优化，缺乏在真实复杂地下场景中部署的鲁棒性，需开发适用于物理无人机的自主导航与协作框架。
AI.method: 提出SphereMap、FacetMap和LTVMap三种新型地图表示方法，结合低带宽通信下的多机器人协作机制，并设计无需GPU的视觉感知流水线处理四路RGB图像。
AI.result: 系统在DARPA SubT真实竞赛中成功部署，验证了其在复杂地形中的有效性，同时通过多环境实验获得定性和定量评估结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了自主无人机团队在地下搜索救援中的优势，尤其在可飞行空间探索效率上优于传统地面机器人团队。

search_text: UAVs Beneath the Surface: Cooperative Autonomy for Subterranean Search and Rescue in DARPA SubT 地面下的无人机：DARPA SubT 地下搜索和救援的合作自主 This paper presents a novel approach for autonomous cooperating UAVs in search and rescue operations in subterranean domains with complex topology. The proposed system was ranked second in the Virtual Track of the DARPA SubT Finals as part of the team CTU-CRAS-NORLAB. In contrast to the winning solution that was developed specifically for the Virtual Track, the proposed solution also proved to be a robust system for deployment onboard physical UAVs flying in the extremely harsh and confined environment of the real-world competition. The proposed approach enables fully autonomous and decentralized deployment of a UAV team with seamless simulation-to-world transfer, and proves its advantage over less mobile UGV teams in the flyable space of diverse environments. The main contributions of the paper are present in the mapping and navigation pipelines. The mapping approach employs novel map representations -- SphereMap for efficient risk-aware long-distance planning, FacetMap for surface coverage, and the compressed topological-volumetric LTVMap for allowing multi-robot cooperation under low-bandwidth communication. These representations are used in navigation together with novel methods for visibility-constrained informed search in a general 3D environment with no assumptions about the environment structure, while balancing deep exploration with sensor-coverage exploitation. The proposed solution also includes a visual-perception pipeline for on-board detection and localization of objects of interest in four RGB stream at 5 Hz each without a dedicated GPU. Apart from participation in the DARPA SubT, the performance of the UAV system is supported by extensive experimental verification in diverse environments with both qualitative and quantitative evaluation. 本文提出了一种在复杂拓扑的地下区域中进行自主协作无人机搜索和救援行动的新方法。作为 CTU-CRAS-NORLAB 团队的一部分，所提出的系统在 DARPA SubT 决赛虚拟赛道中排名第二。与专门为虚拟赛道开发的获胜解决方案相比，所提出的解决方案也被证明是一个强大的系统，可用于部署在现实比赛中极其恶劣和有限的环境中飞行的机载物理无人机。所提出的方法能够实现无人机团队的完全自主和分散部署，并具有无缝模拟到世界的传输，并证明了其在不同环境的可飞行空间中相对于移动性较低的 UGV 团队的优势。本文的主要贡献体现在测绘和导航管道中。该绘图方法采用新颖的地图表示方式——用于高效风险感知的长距离规划的 SphereMap、用于表面覆盖的 FacetMap 以及用于允许在低带宽通信下进行多机器人合作的压缩拓扑体积 LTVMap。这些表示与新颖的方法一起用于导航，在一般 3D 环境中进行可见性受限的知情搜索，无需对环境结构进行假设，同时平衡深度探索与传感器覆盖利用。所提出的解决方案还包括一个视觉感知管道，用于在四个 RGB 流中对感兴趣的对象进行机载检测和定位，每个流的频率为 5 Hz，无需专用 GPU。除了参与 DARPA SubT 之外，无人机系统的性能还得到了不同环境中广泛实验验证的支持，包括定性和定量评估。 本文提出了一种用于地下复杂环境搜索救援的自主协作无人机系统，并在DARPA SubT虚拟赛道中排名第二。 Matej Petrlik,Pavel Petracek,Vit Kratky,Tomas Musil,Yurii Stasinchuk,Matous Vrba,Tomas Baca,Daniel Hert,Martin Pecka,Tomas Svoboda,Martin Saska cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.MA,eess.SY

authors_text: Adrian Pfleiderer,Dominik Müller,Frank Kramer
title: Nucleus Segmentation and Analysis in Breast Cancer with the MIScnn Framework
title_zh: 使用 MIScnn 框架对乳腺癌进行细胞核分割和分析
abstract: The NuCLS dataset contains over 220.000 annotations of cell nuclei in breast cancers. We show how to use these data to create a multi-rater model with the MIScnn Framework to automate the analysis of cell nuclei. For the model creation, we use the widespread U-Net approach embedded in a pipeline. This pipeline provides besides the high performance convolution neural network, several preprocessor techniques and a extended data exploration. The final model is tested in the evaluation phase using a wide variety of metrics with a subsequent visualization. Finally, the results are compared and interpreted with the results of the NuCLS study. As an outlook, indications are given which are important for the future development of models in the context of cell nuclei.
summary: The NuCLS dataset contains over 220.000 annotations of cell nuclei in breast cancers. We show how to use these data to create a multi-rater model with the MIScnn Framework to automate the analysis of cell nuclei. For the model creation, we use the widespread U-Net approach embedded in a pipeline. This pipeline provides besides the high performance convolution neural network, several preprocessor techniques and a extended data exploration. The final model is tested in the evaluation phase using a wide variety of metrics with a subsequent visualization. Finally, the results are compared and interpreted with the results of the NuCLS study. As an outlook, indications are given which are important for the future development of models in the context of cell nuclei.
abstract_zh: NuCLS 数据集包含超过 220,000 个乳腺癌细胞核注释。我们展示了如何使用这些数据通过 MIScnn 框架创建多评估者模型，以自动分析细胞核。对于模型创建，我们使用嵌入管道中的广泛使用的 U-Net 方法。除了高性能卷积神经网络之外，该管道还提供多种预处理器技术和扩展的数据探索。最终模型在评估阶段使用各种指标进行测试，并进行后续可视化。最后，将结果与 NuCLS 研究结果进行比较和解释。作为展望，给出了对于细胞核背景下模型的未来发展非常重要的指示。

AI.tldr: 本文利用MIScnn框架和U-Net模型，结合NuCLS数据集实现乳腺癌细胞核的自动分割与分析。
AI.motivation: 通过自动化方法提高乳腺癌细胞核分析的效率和准确性，减少人工标注依赖。
AI.method: 基于U-Net架构构建分割模型，集成预处理技术与数据探索模块，使用NuCLS数据集训练多评分者模型，并通过多种指标评估性能。
AI.result: 模型在多种评估指标上表现优异，结果与NuCLS研究数据对比验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: MIScnn框架为细胞核分析提供可靠方案，未来需进一步优化模型泛化能力与数据多样性。

authors_text: Li Chen,Tutian Tang,Zhitian Cai,Yang Li,Penghao Wu,Hongyang Li,Jianping Shi,Junchi Yan,Yu Qiao
title: Level 2 Autonomous Driving on a Single Device: Diving into the Devils of Openpilot
title_zh: 单个设备上的 2 级自动驾驶：深入了解 Openpilot 的魔鬼
comment: Tech report. Project page: https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/Openpilot-Deepdive
comments: Tech report. Project page: https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/Openpilot-Deepdive
abstract: Equipped with a wide span of sensors, predominant autonomous driving solutions are becoming more modular-oriented for safe system design. Though these sensors have laid a solid foundation, most massive-production solutions up to date still fall into L2 phase. Among these, Comma.ai comes to our sight, claiming one $999 aftermarket device mounted with a single camera and board inside owns the ability to handle L2 scenarios. Together with open-sourced software of the entire system released by Comma.ai, the project is named Openpilot. Is it possible? If so, how is it made possible? With curiosity in mind, we deep-dive into Openpilot and conclude that its key to success is the end-to-end system design instead of a conventional modular framework. The model is briefed as Supercombo, and it can predict the ego vehicle's future trajectory and other road semantics on the fly from monocular input. Unfortunately, the training process and massive amount of data to make all these work are not publicly available. To achieve an intensive investigation, we try to reimplement the training details and test the pipeline on public benchmarks. The refactored network proposed in this work is referred to as OP-Deepdive. For a fair comparison of our version to the original Supercombo, we introduce a dual-model deployment scheme to test the driving performance in the real world. Experimental results on nuScenes, Comma2k19, CARLA, and in-house realistic scenarios verify that a low-cost device can indeed achieve most L2 functionalities and be on par with the original Supercombo model. In this report, we would like to share our latest findings, shed some light on the new perspective of end-to-end autonomous driving from an industrial product-level side, and potentially inspire the community to continue improving the performance. Our code, benchmarks are at https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/Openpilot-Deepdive.
summary: Equipped with a wide span of sensors, predominant autonomous driving solutions are becoming more modular-oriented for safe system design. Though these sensors have laid a solid foundation, most massive-production solutions up to date still fall into L2 phase. Among these, Comma.ai comes to our sight, claiming one $999 aftermarket device mounted with a single camera and board inside owns the ability to handle L2 scenarios. Together with open-sourced software of the entire system released by Comma.ai, the project is named Openpilot. Is it possible? If so, how is it made possible? With curiosity in mind, we deep-dive into Openpilot and conclude that its key to success is the end-to-end system design instead of a conventional modular framework. The model is briefed as Supercombo, and it can predict the ego vehicle's future trajectory and other road semantics on the fly from monocular input. Unfortunately, the training process and massive amount of data to make all these work are not publicly available. To achieve an intensive investigation, we try to reimplement the training details and test the pipeline on public benchmarks. The refactored network proposed in this work is referred to as OP-Deepdive. For a fair comparison of our version to the original Supercombo, we introduce a dual-model deployment scheme to test the driving performance in the real world. Experimental results on nuScenes, Comma2k19, CARLA, and in-house realistic scenarios verify that a low-cost device can indeed achieve most L2 functionalities and be on par with the original Supercombo model. In this report, we would like to share our latest findings, shed some light on the new perspective of end-to-end autonomous driving from an industrial product-level side, and potentially inspire the community to continue improving the performance. Our code, benchmarks are at https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/Openpilot-Deepdive.
abstract_zh: 主要的自动驾驶解决方案配备了广泛的传感器，在安全系统设计方面变得更加模块化。尽管这些传感器已经奠定了坚实的基础，但迄今为止大多数量产解决方案仍处于L2阶段。其中，Comma.ai 出现在我们的视线中，声称一款售价 999 美元的售后设备，内置单个摄像头和电路板，拥有处理 L2 场景的能力。与Comma.ai发布的整个系统的开源软件一起，该项目被命名为Openpilot。是否可以？如果是这样，它是如何实现的？带着好奇心，我们深入研究了 Openpilot，并得出结论：其成功的关键是端到端的系统设计，而不是传统的模块化框架。该模型被简称为 Supercombo，它可以根据单眼输入动态预测自我车辆的未来轨迹和其他道路语义。不幸的是，完成所有这些工作的培训过程和大量数据并未公开。为了进行深入的调查，我们尝试重新实施培训细节并在公共基准上测试管道。这项工作中提出的重构网络被称为 OP-Deepdive。为了将我们的版本与原始 Supercombo 进行公平比较，我们引入了双模型部署方案来测试现实世界中的驾驶性能。 nuScenes、Comma2k19、CARLA 和内部真实场景的实验结果验证了低成本设备确实可以实现大部分 L2 功能，并且与原始 Supercombo 模型相当。在这份报告中，我们希望分享我们的最新发现，从工业产品层面阐明端到端自动驾驶的新视角，并可能激励社区继续提高性能。我们的代码、基准测试位于 https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/Openpilot-Deepdive。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过端到端系统设计在单设备上实现L2级自动驾驶，重点分析了Comma.ai的Openpilot项目及其核心模型Supercombo的实现方式。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有自动驾驶方案多采用模块化设计，但低成本单设备实现L2级自动驾驶的可行性及技术细节尚不明确，需验证端到端系统设计的有效性。
AI.method: 作者重构了Openpilot的训练流程，提出OP-Deepdive网络，并通过双模型部署方案在nuScenes、Comma2k19、CARLA等基准数据集及实际场景中测试性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，低成本设备可通过端到端设计实现与原版Supercombo相当的L2级自动驾驶功能，在多个基准测试中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 端到端系统设计为L2级自动驾驶提供了可行路径，未来可进一步优化模型性能并推动低成本方案的普及。

search_text: Level 2 Autonomous Driving on a Single Device: Diving into the Devils of Openpilot 单个设备上的 2 级自动驾驶：深入了解 Openpilot 的魔鬼 Equipped with a wide span of sensors, predominant autonomous driving solutions are becoming more modular-oriented for safe system design. Though these sensors have laid a solid foundation, most massive-production solutions up to date still fall into L2 phase. Among these, Comma.ai comes to our sight, claiming one $999 aftermarket device mounted with a single camera and board inside owns the ability to handle L2 scenarios. Together with open-sourced software of the entire system released by Comma.ai, the project is named Openpilot. Is it possible? If so, how is it made possible? With curiosity in mind, we deep-dive into Openpilot and conclude that its key to success is the end-to-end system design instead of a conventional modular framework. The model is briefed as Supercombo, and it can predict the ego vehicle's future trajectory and other road semantics on the fly from monocular input. Unfortunately, the training process and massive amount of data to make all these work are not publicly available. To achieve an intensive investigation, we try to reimplement the training details and test the pipeline on public benchmarks. The refactored network proposed in this work is referred to as OP-Deepdive. For a fair comparison of our version to the original Supercombo, we introduce a dual-model deployment scheme to test the driving performance in the real world. Experimental results on nuScenes, Comma2k19, CARLA, and in-house realistic scenarios verify that a low-cost device can indeed achieve most L2 functionalities and be on par with the original Supercombo model. In this report, we would like to share our latest findings, shed some light on the new perspective of end-to-end autonomous driving from an industrial product-level side, and potentially inspire the community to continue improving the performance. Our code, benchmarks are at https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/Openpilot-Deepdive. 主要的自动驾驶解决方案配备了广泛的传感器，在安全系统设计方面变得更加模块化。尽管这些传感器已经奠定了坚实的基础，但迄今为止大多数量产解决方案仍处于L2阶段。其中，Comma.ai 出现在我们的视线中，声称一款售价 999 美元的售后设备，内置单个摄像头和电路板，拥有处理 L2 场景的能力。与Comma.ai发布的整个系统的开源软件一起，该项目被命名为Openpilot。是否可以？如果是这样，它是如何实现的？带着好奇心，我们深入研究了 Openpilot，并得出结论：其成功的关键是端到端的系统设计，而不是传统的模块化框架。该模型被简称为 Supercombo，它可以根据单眼输入动态预测自我车辆的未来轨迹和其他道路语义。不幸的是，完成所有这些工作的培训过程和大量数据并未公开。为了进行深入的调查，我们尝试重新实施培训细节并在公共基准上测试管道。这项工作中提出的重构网络被称为 OP-Deepdive。为了将我们的版本与原始 Supercombo 进行公平比较，我们引入了双模型部署方案来测试现实世界中的驾驶性能。 nuScenes、Comma2k19、CARLA 和内部真实场景的实验结果验证了低成本设备确实可以实现大部分 L2 功能，并且与原始 Supercombo 模型相当。在这份报告中，我们希望分享我们的最新发现，从工业产品层面阐明端到端自动驾驶的新视角，并可能激励社区继续提高性能。我们的代码、基准测试位于 https://github.com/OpenPerceptionX/Openpilot-Deepdive。 本文研究了如何通过端到端系统设计在单设备上实现L2级自动驾驶，重点分析了Comma.ai的Openpilot项目及其核心模型Supercombo的实现方式。 Li Chen,Tutian Tang,Zhitian Cai,Yang Li,Penghao Wu,Hongyang Li,Jianping Shi,Junchi Yan,Yu Qiao cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Hiroshi Sato,Tsubasa Ochiai,Marc Delcroix,Keisuke Kinoshita,Takafumi Moriya,Naoki Makishima,Mana Ihori,Tomohiro Tanaka,Ryo Masumura
title: Strategies to Improve Robustness of Target Speech Extraction to Enrollment Variations
title_zh: 提高目标语音提取对注册变化的鲁棒性的策略
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables Submitted to Interspeech 2022
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables Submitted to Interspeech 2022
abstract: Target speech extraction is a technique to extract the target speaker's voice from mixture signals using a pre-recorded enrollment utterance that characterize the voice characteristics of the target speaker. One major difficulty of target speech extraction lies in handling variability in ``intra-speaker'' characteristics, i.e., characteristics mismatch between target speech and an enrollment utterance. While most conventional approaches focus on improving {\it average performance} given a set of enrollment utterances, here we propose to guarantee the {\it worst performance}, which we believe is of great practical importance. In this work, we propose an evaluation metric called worst-enrollment source-to-distortion ratio (SDR) to quantitatively measure the robustness towards enrollment variations. We also introduce a novel training scheme that aims at directly optimizing the worst-case performance by focusing on training with difficult enrollment cases where extraction does not perform well. In addition, we investigate the effectiveness of auxiliary speaker identification loss (SI-loss) as another way to improve robustness over enrollments. Experimental validation reveals the effectiveness of both worst-enrollment target training and SI-loss training to improve robustness against enrollment variations, by increasing speaker discriminability.
summary: Target speech extraction is a technique to extract the target speaker's voice from mixture signals using a pre-recorded enrollment utterance that characterize the voice characteristics of the target speaker. One major difficulty of target speech extraction lies in handling variability in ``intra-speaker'' characteristics, i.e., characteristics mismatch between target speech and an enrollment utterance. While most conventional approaches focus on improving {\it average performance} given a set of enrollment utterances, here we propose to guarantee the {\it worst performance}, which we believe is of great practical importance. In this work, we propose an evaluation metric called worst-enrollment source-to-distortion ratio (SDR) to quantitatively measure the robustness towards enrollment variations. We also introduce a novel training scheme that aims at directly optimizing the worst-case performance by focusing on training with difficult enrollment cases where extraction does not perform well. In addition, we investigate the effectiveness of auxiliary speaker identification loss (SI-loss) as another way to improve robustness over enrollments. Experimental validation reveals the effectiveness of both worst-enrollment target training and SI-loss training to improve robustness against enrollment variations, by increasing speaker discriminability.
abstract_zh: 目标语音提取是一种使用预先录制的表征目标说话人语音特征的登记话语从混合信号中提取目标说话人语音的技术。目标语音提取的一个主要困难在于处理“说话者内部”特征的可变性，即目标语音和登记话语之间的特征不匹配。虽然大多数传统方法侧重于在给定一组注册话语的情况下提高{\it平均性能}，但在这里我们建议保证{\it最差性能}，我们认为这具有重要的实际意义。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为最差注册源失真比（SDR）的评估指标，以定量测量针对注册变化的稳健性。我们还引入了一种新颖的训练方案，旨在通过专注于提取表现不佳的困难注册情况下的训练来直接优化最坏情况的性能。此外，我们还研究了辅助说话人识别损失（SI-loss）的有效性，作为提高注册稳健性的另一种方法。实验验证揭示了最差注册目标训练和 SI 损失训练的有效性，通过提高说话者的辨别能力来提高针对注册变化的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进目标语音提取对注册语音变化鲁棒性的策略，通过新评估指标和训练方法提升系统在最差情况下的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法关注平均性能，但实际应用中需保证最差情况下的性能，针对注册语音与目标语音特征不匹配导致的鲁棒性问题提出改进方案。
AI.method: 提出最差注册源失真比（SDR）作为评估指标，设计以困难注册案例训练的优化方案，并引入辅助说话人识别损失（SI-loss）增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验验证了最差注册训练和SI-loss训练均能有效提升系统对注册变化的鲁棒性，增强说话人区分能力。
AI.conclusion: 新方法通过直接优化最坏情况性能和引入辅助损失，显著提升目标语音提取的鲁棒性，为实际应用提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Heqian Qiu,Hongliang Li,Taijin Zhao,Lanxiao Wang,Qingbo Wu,Fanman Meng
title: RefCrowd: Grounding the Target in Crowd with Referring Expressions
title_zh: RefCrowd：使用引用表达式将目标扎根于群体中
abstract: Crowd understanding has aroused the widespread interest in vision domain due to its important practical significance. Unfortunately, there is no effort to explore crowd understanding in multi-modal domain that bridges natural language and computer vision. Referring expression comprehension (REF) is such a representative multi-modal task. Current REF studies focus more on grounding the target object from multiple distinctive categories in general scenarios. It is difficult to applied to complex real-world crowd understanding. To fill this gap, we propose a new challenging dataset, called RefCrowd, which towards looking for the target person in crowd with referring expressions. It not only requires to sufficiently mine the natural language information, but also requires to carefully focus on subtle differences between the target and a crowd of persons with similar appearance, so as to realize the fine-grained mapping from language to vision. Furthermore, we propose a Fine-grained Multi-modal Attribute Contrastive Network (FMAC) to deal with REF in crowd understanding. It first decomposes the intricate visual and language features into attribute-aware multi-modal features, and then captures discriminative but robustness fine-grained attribute features to effectively distinguish these subtle differences between similar persons. The proposed method outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SoTA) methods on our RefCrowd dataset and existing REF datasets. In addition, we implement an end-to-end REF toolbox for the deeper research in multi-modal domain. Our dataset and code can be available at: \url{https://qiuheqian.github.io/datasets/refcrowd/}.
summary: Crowd understanding has aroused the widespread interest in vision domain due to its important practical significance. Unfortunately, there is no effort to explore crowd understanding in multi-modal domain that bridges natural language and computer vision. Referring expression comprehension (REF) is such a representative multi-modal task. Current REF studies focus more on grounding the target object from multiple distinctive categories in general scenarios. It is difficult to applied to complex real-world crowd understanding. To fill this gap, we propose a new challenging dataset, called RefCrowd, which towards looking for the target person in crowd with referring expressions. It not only requires to sufficiently mine the natural language information, but also requires to carefully focus on subtle differences between the target and a crowd of persons with similar appearance, so as to realize the fine-grained mapping from language to vision. Furthermore, we propose a Fine-grained Multi-modal Attribute Contrastive Network (FMAC) to deal with REF in crowd understanding. It first decomposes the intricate visual and language features into attribute-aware multi-modal features, and then captures discriminative but robustness fine-grained attribute features to effectively distinguish these subtle differences between similar persons. The proposed method outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SoTA) methods on our RefCrowd dataset and existing REF datasets. In addition, we implement an end-to-end REF toolbox for the deeper research in multi-modal domain. Our dataset and code can be available at: \url{https://qiuheqian.github.io/datasets/refcrowd/}.
abstract_zh: 群体理解因其重要的现实意义而引起了视觉领域的广泛兴趣。不幸的是，目前还没有努力探索连接自然语言和计算机视觉的多模态领域的人群理解。指代表达理解（REF）就是这样一个具有代表性的多模态任务。当前的 REF 研究更多地侧重于在一般场景中将目标对象从多个不同类别中接地。很难应用于复杂的现实世界人群理解。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了一个新的具有挑战性的数据集，称为 RefCrowd，用于在人群中寻找具有引用表情的目标人。它不仅需要充分挖掘自然语言信息，还需要仔细关注目标与外观相似的人群之间的细微差异，从而实现从语言到视觉的细粒度映射。此外，我们提出了一种细粒度多模态属性对比网络（FMAC）来处理人群理解中的 REF。它首先将复杂的视觉和语言特征分解为属性感知的多模态特征，然后捕获有辨别力但鲁棒性的细粒度属性特征，以有效地区分相似人之间的这些细微差异。所提出的方法在我们的 RefCrowd 数据集和现有 REF 数据集上优于现有的最先进 (SoTA) 方法。此外，我们还实现了一个端到端的 REF 工具箱，用于多模态领域的更深入研究。我们的数据集和代码可以在：\url{https://qiuheqian.github.io/datasets/refcrowd/} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RefCrowd数据集和FMAC方法，解决复杂场景下通过指称表达式在人群中定位目标人物的多模态理解难题。
AI.motivation: 现有指称表达式理解研究难以处理复杂真实场景中人物外观相似的群体理解问题，缺乏多模态领域桥梁技术。
AI.method: 设计细粒度多模态属性对比网络(FMAC)，分解视觉与语言特征为属性感知特征，并提取具有判别性且鲁棒的细粒度属性特征区分相似人物。
AI.result: 在RefCrowd数据集及现有REF数据集上均优于最先进方法，同时提供端到端REF工具箱。
AI.conclusion: RefCrowd与FMAC方法推动了多模态群体理解研究，为细粒度语言-视觉映射提供了新基准与工具支持。

search_text: RefCrowd: Grounding the Target in Crowd with Referring Expressions RefCrowd：使用引用表达式将目标扎根于群体中 Crowd understanding has aroused the widespread interest in vision domain due to its important practical significance. Unfortunately, there is no effort to explore crowd understanding in multi-modal domain that bridges natural language and computer vision. Referring expression comprehension (REF) is such a representative multi-modal task. Current REF studies focus more on grounding the target object from multiple distinctive categories in general scenarios. It is difficult to applied to complex real-world crowd understanding. To fill this gap, we propose a new challenging dataset, called RefCrowd, which towards looking for the target person in crowd with referring expressions. It not only requires to sufficiently mine the natural language information, but also requires to carefully focus on subtle differences between the target and a crowd of persons with similar appearance, so as to realize the fine-grained mapping from language to vision. Furthermore, we propose a Fine-grained Multi-modal Attribute Contrastive Network (FMAC) to deal with REF in crowd understanding. It first decomposes the intricate visual and language features into attribute-aware multi-modal features, and then captures discriminative but robustness fine-grained attribute features to effectively distinguish these subtle differences between similar persons. The proposed method outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SoTA) methods on our RefCrowd dataset and existing REF datasets. In addition, we implement an end-to-end REF toolbox for the deeper research in multi-modal domain. Our dataset and code can be available at: \url{https://qiuheqian.github.io/datasets/refcrowd/}. 群体理解因其重要的现实意义而引起了视觉领域的广泛兴趣。不幸的是，目前还没有努力探索连接自然语言和计算机视觉的多模态领域的人群理解。指代表达理解（REF）就是这样一个具有代表性的多模态任务。当前的 REF 研究更多地侧重于在一般场景中将目标对象从多个不同类别中接地。很难应用于复杂的现实世界人群理解。为了填补这一空白，我们提出了一个新的具有挑战性的数据集，称为 RefCrowd，用于在人群中寻找具有引用表情的目标人。它不仅需要充分挖掘自然语言信息，还需要仔细关注目标与外观相似的人群之间的细微差异，从而实现从语言到视觉的细粒度映射。此外，我们提出了一种细粒度多模态属性对比网络（FMAC）来处理人群理解中的 REF。它首先将复杂的视觉和语言特征分解为属性感知的多模态特征，然后捕获有辨别力但鲁棒性的细粒度属性特征，以有效地区分相似人之间的这些细微差异。所提出的方法在我们的 RefCrowd 数据集和现有 REF 数据集上优于现有的最先进 (SoTA) 方法。此外，我们还实现了一个端到端的 REF 工具箱，用于多模态领域的更深入研究。我们的数据集和代码可以在：\url{https://qiuheqian.github.io/datasets/refcrowd/} 获取。 本文提出RefCrowd数据集和FMAC方法，解决复杂场景下通过指称表达式在人群中定位目标人物的多模态理解难题。 Heqian Qiu,Hongliang Li,Taijin Zhao,Lanxiao Wang,Qingbo Wu,Fanman Meng cs.CV

authors_text: Dong-Hee Paek,Seung-Hyun Kong,Kevin Tirta Wijaya
title: K-Radar: 4D Radar Object Detection for Autonomous Driving in Various Weather Conditions
title_zh: K-Radar：用于各种天气条件下自动驾驶的 4D 雷达目标检测
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
abstract: Unlike RGB cameras that use visible light bands (384$\sim$769 THz) and Lidars that use infrared bands (361$\sim$331 THz), Radars use relatively longer wavelength radio bands (77$\sim$81 GHz), resulting in robust measurements in adverse weathers. Unfortunately, existing Radar datasets only contain a relatively small number of samples compared to the existing camera and Lidar datasets. This may hinder the development of sophisticated data-driven deep learning techniques for Radar-based perception. Moreover, most of the existing Radar datasets only provide 3D Radar tensor (3DRT) data that contain power measurements along the Doppler, range, and azimuth dimensions. As there is no elevation information, it is challenging to estimate the 3D bounding box of an object from 3DRT. In this work, we introduce KAIST-Radar (K-Radar), a novel large-scale object detection dataset and benchmark that contains 35K frames of 4D Radar tensor (4DRT) data with power measurements along the Doppler, range, azimuth, and elevation dimensions, together with carefully annotated 3D bounding box labels of objects on the roads. K-Radar includes challenging driving conditions such as adverse weathers (fog, rain, and snow) on various road structures (urban, suburban roads, alleyways, and highways). In addition to the 4DRT, we provide auxiliary measurements from carefully calibrated high-resolution Lidars, surround stereo cameras, and RTK-GPS. We also provide 4DRT-based object detection baseline neural networks (baseline NNs) and show that the height information is crucial for 3D object detection. And by comparing the baseline NN with a similarly-structured Lidar-based neural network, we demonstrate that 4D Radar is a more robust sensor for adverse weather conditions. All codes are available at https://github.com/kaist-avelab/k-radar.

Unfortunately, existing Radar datasets only contain a relatively small number of samples compared to the existing camera and Lidar datasets. This may hinder the development of sophisticated data-driven deep learning techniques for Radar-based perception. Moreover, most of the existing Radar datasets only provide 3D Radar tensor (3DRT) data that contain power measurements along the Doppler, range, and azimuth dimensions. As there is no elevation information, it is challenging to estimate the 3D bounding box of an object from 3DRT. In this work, we introduce KAIST-Radar (K-Radar), a novel large-scale object detection dataset and benchmark that contains 35K frames of 4D Radar tensor (4DRT) data with power measurements along the Doppler, range, azimuth, and elevation dimensions, together with carefully annotated 3D bounding box labels of objects on the roads. K-Radar includes challenging driving conditions such as adverse weathers (fog, rain, and snow) on various road structures (urban, suburban roads, alleyways, and highways). In addition to the 4DRT, we provide auxiliary measurements from carefully calibrated high-resolution Lidars, surround stereo cameras, and RTK-GPS. We also provide 4DRT-based object detection baseline neural networks (baseline NNs) and show that the height information is crucial for 3D object detection. And by comparing the baseline NN with a similarly-structured Lidar-based neural network, we demonstrate that 4D Radar is a more robust sensor for adverse weather conditions. All codes are available at https://github.com/kaist-avelab/k-radar.
abstract_zh: 与使用可见光波段 (384$\sim$769 THz) 的 RGB 相机和使用红外波段 (361$\sim$331 THz) 的激光雷达不同，雷达使用相对较长波长的无线电波段 (77$\sim$81 GHz)，从而在恶劣天气下实现稳健的测量。不幸的是，与现有的相机和激光雷达数据集相比，现有的雷达数据集仅包含相对少量的样本。这可能会阻碍基于雷达感知的复杂数据驱动深度学习技术的开发。此外，大多数现有雷达数据集仅提供 3D 雷达张量 (3DRT) 数据，其中包含沿多普勒、距离和方位角维度的功率测量。由于没有高程信息，因此从 3DRT 估计对象的 3D 边界框具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 KAIST-Radar (K-Radar)，这是一种新颖的大规模物体检测数据集和基准，其中包含 35K 帧 4D 雷达张量 (4DRT) 数据，其中包含沿多普勒、距离、方位角和仰角维度的功率测量值，以及仔细注释的道路上物体的 3D 边界框标签。 K-Radar 包括具有挑战性的驾驶条件，例如各种道路结构（城市、郊区道路、小巷和高速公路）上的恶劣天气（雾、雨和雪）。除了 4DRT 之外，我们还提供来自仔细校准的高分辨率激光雷达、环绕立体声摄像机和 RTK-GPS 的辅助测量。我们还提供基于 4DRT 的对象检测基线神经网络（基线 NN），并表明高度信息对于 3D 对象检测至关重要。通过将基线神经网络与结构类似的基于激光雷达的神经网络进行比较，我们证明 4D 雷达是一种针对恶劣天气条件更强大的传感器。所有代码均可在 https://github.com/kaist-avelab/k-radar 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出K-Radar，一个包含4D雷达张量数据和精确标注的3D边界框的大规模数据集，用于提升自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的雷达目标检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有雷达数据集样本量小且缺乏高度信息，难以支持复杂深度学习模型开发，同时雷达在恶劣天气下的感知能力未被充分验证。
AI.method: 构建包含35K帧4D雷达张量数据（含多普勒、距离、方位和高度维度）的数据集，结合校准的LiDAR、立体相机和RTK-GPS辅助数据，并提供基于4D雷达的检测基线网络。
AI.result: 证明高度信息对3D目标检测的关键作用，通过与LiDAR网络对比验证雷达在雾、雨、雪等恶劣天气下的更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: K-Radar为雷达感知研究提供新基准，证实了4D雷达在复杂环境下的优越性，推动自动驾驶在极端天气条件下的技术发展。

search_text: K-Radar: 4D Radar Object Detection for Autonomous Driving in Various Weather Conditions K-Radar：用于各种天气条件下自动驾驶的 4D 雷达目标检测 Unlike RGB cameras that use visible light bands (384$\sim$769 THz) and Lidars that use infrared bands (361$\sim$331 THz), Radars use relatively longer wavelength radio bands (77$\sim$81 GHz), resulting in robust measurements in adverse weathers. Unfortunately, existing Radar datasets only contain a relatively small number of samples compared to the existing camera and Lidar datasets. This may hinder the development of sophisticated data-driven deep learning techniques for Radar-based perception. Moreover, most of the existing Radar datasets only provide 3D Radar tensor (3DRT) data that contain power measurements along the Doppler, range, and azimuth dimensions. As there is no elevation information, it is challenging to estimate the 3D bounding box of an object from 3DRT. In this work, we introduce KAIST-Radar (K-Radar), a novel large-scale object detection dataset and benchmark that contains 35K frames of 4D Radar tensor (4DRT) data with power measurements along the Doppler, range, azimuth, and elevation dimensions, together with carefully annotated 3D bounding box labels of objects on the roads. K-Radar includes challenging driving conditions such as adverse weathers (fog, rain, and snow) on various road structures (urban, suburban roads, alleyways, and highways). In addition to the 4DRT, we provide auxiliary measurements from carefully calibrated high-resolution Lidars, surround stereo cameras, and RTK-GPS. We also provide 4DRT-based object detection baseline neural networks (baseline NNs) and show that the height information is crucial for 3D object detection. And by comparing the baseline NN with a similarly-structured Lidar-based neural network, we demonstrate that 4D Radar is a more robust sensor for adverse weather conditions. authors_text: Mingyu Dong,Diqun Yan,Rangding Wang
title: Adversarial Privacy Protection on Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 语音增强的对抗性隐私保护
comment: 5 pages, 6 figures
comments: 5 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Speech is easily leaked imperceptibly, such as being recorded by mobile phones in different situations. Private content in speech may be maliciously extracted through speech enhancement technology. Speech enhancement technology has developed rapidly along with deep neural networks (DNNs), but adversarial examples can cause DNNs to fail. In this work, we propose an adversarial method to degrade speech enhancement systems. Experimental results show that generated adversarial examples can erase most content information in original examples or replace it with target speech content through speech enhancement. The word error rate (WER) between an enhanced original example and enhanced adversarial example recognition result can reach 89.0%. WER of target attack between enhanced adversarial example and target example is low to 33.75% . Adversarial perturbation can bring the rate of change to the original example to more than 1.4430. This work can prevent the malicious extraction of speech.
summary: Speech is easily leaked imperceptibly, such as being recorded by mobile phones in different situations. Private content in speech may be maliciously extracted through speech enhancement technology. Speech enhancement technology has developed rapidly along with deep neural networks (DNNs), but adversarial examples can cause DNNs to fail. In this work, we propose an adversarial method to degrade speech enhancement systems. Experimental results show that generated adversarial examples can erase most content information in original examples or replace it with target speech content through speech enhancement. The word error rate (WER) between an enhanced original example and enhanced adversarial example recognition result can reach 89.0%. WER of target attack between enhanced adversarial example and target example is low to 33.75% . Adversarial perturbation can bring the rate of change to the original example to more than 1.4430. This work can prevent the malicious extraction of speech.
abstract_zh: 语音很容易在不知不觉中泄露，比如在不同情况下被手机录音。语音中的隐私内容可能会通过语音增强技术被恶意提取。语音增强技术与深度神经网络 (DNN) 一起快速发展，但对抗性示例可能会导致 DNN 失败。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种对抗性方法来降低语音增强系统的性能。实验结果表明，生成的对抗样本可以擦除原始样本中的大部分内容信息或通过语音增强将其替换为目标语音内容。增强型原始示例与增强型对抗性示例识别结果之间的单词错误率（WER）可达89.0%。增强对抗样本与目标样本之间的目标攻击WER低至33.75%。对抗性扰动可以使原始示例的变化率达到 1.4430 以上。这项工作可以防止恶意提取语音。

AI.motivation: 语音可能通过语音增强技术被恶意提取隐私内容，需防止此类信息泄露。
AI.method: 利用对抗样本降级语音增强系统，使增强后的语音信息被擦除或替换为目标内容。
AI.result: 原始样本与对抗样本的词错误率(WER)达89.0%，目标攻击WER低至33.75%，原始样本变化率达1.4430。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效阻止语音隐私的恶意提取，通过对抗扰动破坏增强系统性能。

search_text: Adversarial Privacy Protection on Speech Enhancement 语音增强的对抗性隐私保护 Speech is easily leaked imperceptibly, such as being recorded by mobile phones in different situations. Private content in speech may be maliciously extracted through speech enhancement technology. Speech enhancement technology has developed rapidly along with deep neural networks (DNNs), but adversarial examples can cause DNNs to fail. In this work, we propose an adversarial method to degrade speech enhancement systems. Experimental results show that generated adversarial examples can erase most content information in original examples or replace it with target speech content through speech enhancement. The word error rate (WER) between an enhanced original example and enhanced adversarial example recognition result can reach 89.0%. WER of target attack between enhanced adversarial example and target example is low to 33.75% . Adversarial perturbation can bring the rate of change to the original example to more than 1.4430. This work can prevent the malicious extraction of speech. 语音很容易在不知不觉中泄露，比如在不同情况下被手机录音。语音中的隐私内容可能会通过语音增强技术被恶意提取。语音增强技术与深度神经网络 (DNN) 一起快速发展，但对抗性示例可能会导致 DNN 失败。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种对抗性方法来降低语音增强系统的性能。实验结果表明，生成的对抗样本可以擦除原始样本中的大部分内容信息或通过语音增强将其替换为目标语音内容。增强型原始示例与增强型对抗性示例识别结果之间的单词错误率（WER）可达89.0%。增强对抗样本与目标样本之间的目标攻击WER低至33.75%。对抗性扰动可以使原始示例的变化率达到 1.4430 以上。这项工作可以防止恶意提取语音。 本文提出一种对抗性方法，通过生成对抗样本破坏语音增强系统，以保护语音隐私。 Mingyu Dong,Diqun Yan,Rangding Wang cs.SD,cs.CR,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Kiran Kokilepersaud,Mohit Prabhushankar,Ghassan AlRegib
title: Volumetric Supervised Contrastive Learning for Seismic Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于地震语义分割的体积监督对比学习
comment: ef:The International Meeting for Applied Geoscience & Energy (IMAGE) 2022
comments: ef:The International Meeting for Applied Geoscience & Energy (IMAGE) 2022
abstract: In seismic interpretation, pixel-level labels of various rock structures can be time-consuming and expensive to obtain. As a result, there oftentimes exists a non-trivial quantity of unlabeled data that is left unused simply because traditional deep learning methods rely on access to fully labeled volumes. To rectify this problem, contrastive learning approaches have been proposed that use a self-supervised methodology in order to learn useful representations from unlabeled data. However, traditional contrastive learning approaches are based on assumptions from the domain of natural images that do not make use of seismic context. In order to incorporate this context within contrastive learning, we propose a novel positive pair selection strategy based on the position of slices within a seismic volume. We show that the learnt representations from our method out-perform a state of the art contrastive learning methodology in a semantic segmentation task.
summary: In seismic interpretation, pixel-level labels of various rock structures can be time-consuming and expensive to obtain. As a result, there oftentimes exists a non-trivial quantity of unlabeled data that is left unused simply because traditional deep learning methods rely on access to fully labeled volumes. To rectify this problem, contrastive learning approaches have been proposed that use a self-supervised methodology in order to learn useful representations from unlabeled data. However, traditional contrastive learning approaches are based on assumptions from the domain of natural images that do not make use of seismic context. In order to incorporate this context within contrastive learning, we propose a novel positive pair selection strategy based on the position of slices within a seismic volume. We show that the learnt representations from our method out-perform a state of the art contrastive learning methodology in a semantic segmentation task.
abstract_zh: 在地震解释中，获取各种岩石结构的像素级标签可能既耗时又昂贵。因此，经常存在大量未标记的数据，这些数据未被使用，仅仅是因为传统的深度学习方法依赖于访问完全标记的数据集。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了对比学习方法，使用自我监督的方法来从未标记的数据中学习有用的表示。然而，传统的对比学习方法基于不利用地震背景的自然图像领域的假设。为了将这种背景纳入对比学习中，我们提出了一种基于地震体中切片位置的新颖的正对选择策略。我们表明，在语义分割任务中，从我们的方法中学到的表示优于最先进的对比学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于体素的监督对比学习方法，用于解决地震数据语义分割中标签数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 地震解释中像素级岩性标签获取成本高，传统深度学习方法依赖全监督数据，导致大量未标记数据无法有效利用。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于地震体素切片位置关系的正样本对选择策略，将地震数据的三维上下文信息融入对比学习框架。
AI.result: 在语义分割任务中，该方法学习到的特征表示优于现有最先进的对比学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入地震体素的空间位置先验，提出的对比学习方法能更有效地利用未标记数据提升分割性能。

authors_text: Antoine Yang,Antoine Miech,Josef Sivic,Ivan Laptev,Cordelia Schmid
title: Zero-Shot Video Question Answering via Frozen Bidirectional Language Models
title_zh: 通过冻结双向语言模型进行零样本视频问答
comment: NeurIPS 2022 Camera-Ready; Project Webpage: https://antoyang.github.io/frozenbilm.html; 25 pages; 5 figures
comments: NeurIPS 2022 Camera-Ready; Project Webpage: https://antoyang.github.io/frozenbilm.html; 25 pages; 5 figures
abstract: Video question answering (VideoQA) is a complex task that requires diverse multi-modal data for training. Manual annotation of question and answers for videos, however, is tedious and prohibits scalability. To tackle this problem, recent methods consider zero-shot settings with no manual annotation of visual question-answer. In particular, a promising approach adapts frozen autoregressive language models pretrained on Web-scale text-only data to multi-modal inputs. In contrast, we here build on frozen bidirectional language models (BiLM) and show that such an approach provides a stronger and cheaper alternative for zero-shot VideoQA. In particular, (i) we combine visual inputs with the frozen BiLM using light trainable modules, (ii) we train such modules using Web-scraped multi-modal data, and finally (iii) we perform zero-shot VideoQA inference through masked language modeling, where the masked text is the answer to a given question. Our proposed approach, FrozenBiLM, outperforms the state of the art in zero-shot VideoQA by a significant margin on a variety of datasets, including LSMDC-FiB, iVQA, MSRVTT-QA, MSVD-QA, ActivityNet-QA, TGIF-FrameQA, How2QA and TVQA. It also demonstrates competitive performance in the few-shot and fully-supervised setting. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/antoyang/FrozenBiLM.
summary: Video question answering (VideoQA) is a complex task that requires diverse multi-modal data for training. Manual annotation of question and answers for videos, however, is tedious and prohibits scalability. To tackle this problem, recent methods consider zero-shot settings with no manual annotation of visual question-answer. In particular, a promising approach adapts frozen autoregressive language models pretrained on Web-scale text-only data to multi-modal inputs. In contrast, we here build on frozen bidirectional language models (BiLM) and show that such an approach provides a stronger and cheaper alternative for zero-shot VideoQA. In particular, (i) we combine visual inputs with the frozen BiLM using light trainable modules, (ii) we train such modules using Web-scraped multi-modal data, and finally (iii) we perform zero-shot VideoQA inference through masked language modeling, where the masked text is the answer to a given question. Our proposed approach, FrozenBiLM, outperforms the state of the art in zero-shot VideoQA by a significant margin on a variety of datasets, including LSMDC-FiB, iVQA, MSRVTT-QA, MSVD-QA, ActivityNet-QA, TGIF-FrameQA, How2QA and TVQA. It also demonstrates competitive performance in the few-shot and fully-supervised setting. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/antoyang/FrozenBiLM.
abstract_zh: 视频问答（VideoQA）是一项复杂的任务，需要多种多模态数据进行训练。然而，对视频的问题和答案进行手动注释非常繁琐并且阻碍了可扩展性。为了解决这个问题，最近的方法考虑零样本设置，无需手动注释视觉问题答案。特别是，一种有前途的方法将在网络规模纯文本数据上预训练的冻结自回归语言模型适应多模态输入。相比之下，我们在这里建立在冻结双向语言模型（BiLM）的基础上，并表明这种方法为零样本 VideoQA 提供了更强大、更便宜的替代方案。特别是，（i）我们使用轻型可训练模块将视觉输入与冻结的 BiLM 结合起来，（​​ii）我们使用网络抓取的多模态数据训练此类模块，最后（iii）我们通过屏蔽语言模型执行零样本 VideoQA 推理，其中屏蔽文本是给定问题的答案。我们提出的方法 FrozenBiLM 在各种数据集（包括 LSMDC-FiB、iVQA、MSRVTT-QA、MSVD-QA、ActivityNet-QA、TGIF-FrameQA、How2QA 和 TVQA）上明显优于零样本 VideoQA 的现有技术。它还展示了在少量镜头和完全监督的环境中的竞争性能。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/antoyang/FrozenBiLM 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于冻结双向语言模型（BiLM）的零样本视频问答方法，无需人工标注即可实现视频问答任务。
AI.motivation: 视频问答需要大量多模态标注数据，但人工标注成本高且限制扩展性，现有方法依赖自回归语言模型效率较低。
AI.method: 结合视觉输入与冻结BiLM，通过轻量可训练模块整合多模态信息，并利用网络爬取的多模态数据训练模块，最终通过掩码语言建模实现零样本推理。
AI.result: 在LSMDC-FiB、iVQA等8个数据集上显著优于现有方法，在少样本和全监督设置下也表现竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 冻结BiLM方法为零样本视频问答提供了更高效且性能优越的解决方案，代码已开源。

Our proposed approach, FrozenBiLM, outperforms the state of the art in zero-shot VideoQA by a significant margin on a variety of datasets, including LSMDC-FiB, iVQA, MSRVTT-QA, MSVD-QA, ActivityNet-QA, TGIF-FrameQA, How2QA and TVQA. It also demonstrates competitive performance in the few-shot and fully-supervised setting. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/antoyang/FrozenBiLM. 视频问答（VideoQA）是一项复杂的任务，需要多种多模态数据进行训练。然而，对视频的问题和答案进行手动注释非常繁琐并且阻碍了可扩展性。为了解决这个问题，最近的方法考虑零样本设置，无需手动注释视觉问题答案。特别是，一种有前途的方法将在网络规模纯文本数据上预训练的冻结自回归语言模型适应多模态输入。相比之下，我们在这里建立在冻结双向语言模型（BiLM）的基础上，并表明这种方法为零样本 VideoQA 提供了更强大、更便宜的替代方案。特别是，（i）我们使用轻型可训练模块将视觉输入与冻结的 BiLM 结合起来，（​​ii）我们使用网络抓取的多模态数据训练此类模块，最后（iii）我们通过屏蔽语言模型执行零样本 VideoQA 推理，其中屏蔽文本是给定问题的答案。我们提出的方法 FrozenBiLM 在各种数据集（包括 LSMDC-FiB、iVQA、MSRVTT-QA、MSVD-QA、ActivityNet-QA、TGIF-FrameQA、How2QA 和 TVQA）上明显优于零样本 VideoQA 的现有技术。它还展示了在少量镜头和完全监督的环境中的竞争性能。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/antoyang/FrozenBiLM 上公开获取。 本文提出一种基于冻结双向语言模型（BiLM）的零样本视频问答方法，无需人工标注即可实现视频问答任务。 Antoine Yang,Antoine Miech,Josef Sivic,Ivan Laptev,Cordelia Schmid cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Xueliang Wang,Jianyu Cai,Shuiwang Ji,Houqiang Li,Feng Wu,Jie Wang
title: Self-Adaptive Label Augmentation for Semi-supervised Few-shot Classification
title_zh: 用于半监督少样本分类的自适应标签增强
comment: 9 pages
comments: 9 pages
abstract: Few-shot classification aims to learn a model that can generalize well to new tasks when only a few labeled samples are available. To make use of unlabeled data that are more abundantly available in real applications, Ren et al. \shortcite{ren2018meta} propose a semi-supervised few-shot classification method that assigns an appropriate label to each unlabeled sample by a manually defined metric. However, the manually defined metric fails to capture the intrinsic property in data. In this paper, we propose a \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{A}daptive \textbf{L}abel \textbf{A}ugmentation approach, called \textbf{SALA}, for semi-supervised few-shot classification. A major novelty of SALA is the task-adaptive metric, which can learn the metric adaptively for different tasks in an end-to-end fashion. Another appealing feature of SALA is a progressive neighbor selection strategy, which selects unlabeled data with high confidence progressively through the training phase. Experiments demonstrate that SALA outperforms several state-of-the-art methods for semi-supervised few-shot classification on benchmark datasets.
summary: Few-shot classification aims to learn a model that can generalize well to new tasks when only a few labeled samples are available. To make use of unlabeled data that are more abundantly available in real applications, Ren et al. \shortcite{ren2018meta} propose a semi-supervised few-shot classification method that assigns an appropriate label to each unlabeled sample by a manually defined metric. However, the manually defined metric fails to capture the intrinsic property in data. In this paper, we propose a \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{A}daptive \textbf{L}abel \textbf{A}ugmentation approach, called \textbf{SALA}, for semi-supervised few-shot classification. A major novelty of SALA is the task-adaptive metric, which can learn the metric adaptively for different tasks in an end-to-end fashion. Another appealing feature of SALA is a progressive neighbor selection strategy, which selects unlabeled data with high confidence progressively through the training phase. Experiments demonstrate that SALA outperforms several state-of-the-art methods for semi-supervised few-shot classification on benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 少样本分类旨在学习一种模型，当只有少量标记样本可用时，该模型可以很好地推广到新任务。为了利用实际应用中更丰富的未标记数据，Ren 等人。 \shortcite{ren2018meta} 提出了一种半监督的少样本分类方法，该方法通过手动定义的指标为每个未标记的样本分配适当的标签。然而，手动定义的指标无法捕获数据的内在属性。在本文中，我们提出了一种 \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{A}daptive \textbf{L}abel \textbf{A} 增强方法，称为 \textbf{SALA}，用于半监督少样本分类。 SALA 的一个主要新颖之处是任务自适应度量，它可以以端到端的方式自适应地学习不同任务的度量。 SALA 的另一个吸引人的功能是渐进式邻居选择策略，它在训练阶段逐步选择具有高置信度的未标记数据。实验表明，SALA 在基准数据集上的半监督少样本分类方面优于多种最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应标签增强方法SALA，用于半监督少样本分类任务，通过利用未标记数据提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督少样本分类方法依赖人工定义的度量标准，无法有效捕捉数据内在特性，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: SALA方法包含任务自适应度量学习和渐进式邻域选择策略，通过端到端方式动态调整度量标准，并在训练过程中逐步筛选高置信度未标记样本。
AI.result: 实验表明，SALA在多个基准数据集上优于现有最先进的半监督少样本分类方法。
AI.conclusion: SALA通过自适应度量和渐进式样本选择有效利用未标记数据，为半监督少样本分类提供了新思路。
